Name: ecoATM Gazelle
Description:
ecoATM and Gazelle are redefining how people and businesses manage technology responsibly. With more than 7,000 kiosks nationwide and a robust online platform, we make it easy to trade in, trade up, or recycle devices securely and sustainably.

For consumers, that means turning old tech into instant cash—or upgrading to a certified pre-owned device that’s better for your wallet and the planet. For our retail and brand partners, it means driving foot traffic, offering customers a value driving service they love, and supporting measurable ESG impact.

Together, ecoATM and Gazelle are building the infrastructure for a circular tech economy—one where every device gets a second life, every trade-in makes a difference, and sustainability scales across millions of users and organizations.

Name: MV Recycling (UK) Ltd
Description:
MV Recycling UK Ltd are a fully EA accredited total waste management company that specialises in plastic recycling. We have 3 overseas facilities that reprocesses your plastic waste into new feedstock which is then used to create a variety of durable and recyclable products such as garden chairs, stadium seating, black bags, shopping bags and many more. 

MV Recycling UK Ltd was established in 2009 as a major paper plastic exporter. The MV brand was founded by Muhammed Master in 2006 who built the company to what it is today, his dedication to his customers and general work ethic to diverting previously landfilled waste has resulted in the expansion of the company and the reduction of carbon emissions for multiple businesses.

With satellite networking sites and partnerships throughout the UK, MV Recycling can guarantee 100% success rates, collections done on time and landfill cost reductions, from which we can ensure that customers are looked after and needs are fulfilled. Our proud and loyal customers are testimony to our success and ability to provide an excellent no hassle service throughout the UK. 

What separates MV Recycling UK Ltd from other recycling businesses is that we are knowledgeable of the circular economy and value our customers just as much as we value the waste product we purchase. We not only provide a tailored waste management service but can advise customers on how to better themselves environmentally. 

With a quick turn around and experience in dealing with both large and small companies on a local and national basis, with our simple 5 step process MV Recycling UK Ltd are determined to improve the depletion of natural resources to maintain an ecological balance for both the planet and our suppliers.

Name: Modern American Recycling Services, Inc.
Description:
We are M.A.R.S.

Established in 1971, Modern American Recycling Services, Inc. (M.A.R.S., Inc.) was founded by “Butch” Dwight Caton. M.A.R.S is the largest barge dismantler and offshore decommissioning provider in the United States.
Recently the company has expanded its scope of offerings with the acquisition of a shipyard providing ship repair, conversions, and overhauls of all types of vessels, including tankers, dredgers, ATBs, tugs, barges and more. 

We are a company committed to providing quality demolition and recycling services to our customers, while protecting the environment and maintaining a safe working environment for our people.

We have facilities in Gibson Louisiana, Waggaman Louisiana, Houma Louisiana, Pascagoula Mississippi, Frederikshavn Danmark, and .......

Name: Happen Ventures
Description: Happen Ventures specializes in waste diversion and sustainability solutions, focusing on reuse rather than recycling. Our innovative programs help businesses repurpose surplus inventory, reducing landfill waste and promoting environmental sustainability. With services tailored for retailers, warehouses, cosmetics companies, and consumer brands, we offer bulk pick-up options and streamlined processes for waste diversion. Join us in our mission to minimize environmental impact and create a more sustainable future through reuse and recycling initiatives

Name: Laps
Description:
At Laps, we’re on a journey to change the way people buy and consume products, but this can only be achieved if we all set our wheels in motion.

We are a network of recommerce platforms where, not unlike a relay race, products are passed from one person to another, helping everyone advance.
The more relays – or laps – our products complete, the greater our collective impact becomes. 
And like any successful relay, it all starts with those who choose to participate.

Ready... Set...
Pass It Forward

Name: Lunettes de Zac
Description:
Zac collecte et reconditionne les montures de lunettes pour leur donner une seconde vie. 

Dans votre entreprise, votre école ou chez votre opticien, organisez une collecte de lunettes usagées !

Les montures sélectionnées sont nettoyées et réparées par nos Sublimeurs de lunette, des personnes en situation de handicap ou en réinsertion dans le Nord de la France. 

Retrouvez ces pépites en magasin au 35 rue Basse à Lille, chez nos opticiens partenaires partout en France  ou sur lunettesdezac.com !

Suivez nos aventures sur Instagram, Facebook, linkedin et Tiktok, ou abonnez-vous à la Newsletter sur notre site internet.

Name: CertiDeal
Description:
CertiDeal l’anti-déchet électronique positif pour la planète, et le portefeuille !

Des solutions pour le réemploi des produits électroniques  :
	•	Collecte et achat de produits électroniques usagés via les opérateurs, le site internet ou des associations 
	•	Vente de smartphones, tablettes et macs reconditionnés sur notre e-commerce 
	•	Vente à des opérateurs et acteurs du retail de produits issus du remploi 

CertiDeal assure aussi la réinsertion de personnes en état de détresse économique via divers programme dont la CertiAcadémie.

Chaque produit est vérifié et certifié par un expert avant d'être expédié à l'acheteur. CertiDeal assure la conformité du produit lors de votre achat, ce qui signifie qu’aucun produit ne sera expédié sans son tampon « certifié conforme ».

Nous sommes fiers de notre impact collectif :

	•	80 000 tonnes d’économie carbone grâce à nos programme de reprises et reconditionnement

	•	1 million de clients dans toute l’Europe 
	
	•	120 collaborateurs. La majorité formée chez nous. Des dizaines de CertiAcademiciens en poste à l’extérieur.

CertiDeal est une Entreprise de l’Economie Sociale et Solidaire.

Name: FGL Reciclagem  |  Equipamentos Industriais e Mineração
Description:
A FGL Reciclagem é uma empresa que atua no ramo de sucatas ferrosas e não ferrosas, peneiramento, comércio e locação de equipamentos industriais e de mineração.

Prezamos pela transparência nas negociações e visamos sempre parcerias duradouras.

Nossos principais objetivos são a qualidade e a satisfação dos clientes.

Name: İKİNCİ EL ALIYORUZ
Description:
25 yıldır sektörde hizmet vermekte, özel sektör, kamu ve son kullanıcı bünyesinde bulunan stok fazlası veya atıl durumda olan ürünlerin güncel ticari değerleri üzerinden satın alım işlemlerini gerçekleştirmekteyiz.
Satın alma süreçleri, istenildiğinde Geri dönüşüm firmaları ile işbirliği yürütülerek lisanslı ve belgeli olarak yapılmaktadır.
Bilişim Ürünlerinde Kurumsal Satın Alma Platformu
Son yıllarda yaşanan hızlı teknolojik gelişimler nedeniyle özellikle bilgisayar ve server gibi ürünlerin yaşam süreleri kısalmıştır. Bu teknolojik gelişim rüzgarı ile birlikte hızla gelişen ve büyüyen kurumsal firmaların belirli periyotlar ile neredeyse tüm altyapısını oluşturan bilgi teknolojisi ürünlerini yenilemesi gerekliliği oluşmaktadır.
Kurumsal firmaların altyapısını oluşturan sistemin yenilenmesi oldukça zahmetli olmakla birlikte eski sistemlerin de kullanılmaması durumundan kaynaklanan gereksiz stoklar da oluşmaktadır.
İşte bu stoklar ikincielaliyoruz.com ile oluşturduğumuz ikinci el kurumsal alım satım platformu ile kolayca değerlendirilebilmektedir. Firma, kurum veya organizasyonunuzda bulunan kullanmadığınız teknolojik ürünleri iki şekilde değerlendirebiliyoruz;
• Hala kullanılabilir ve piyasa değeri mevcut olan ürünleri yerinde ekspertiz yaparak fiyatlandırıp toplu olarak satın alıyoruz, gerekli bakım ve yenilemeleri yapılan ürünler ise yeniden hayat buluyor.
• Güncel piyasa değeri olmayan ve elektronik atık statüsüne geçmiş ürünlerinizi ise elektronik geri dönüşüm fiyatına göre satın alıyoruz, lisanslı olarak imha ediyoruz.
Her iki durumda da firma bütçesine katkı sağlanmakla birlikte aynı zamanda da kaynakların bilinçli kullanımı ile geri dönüşüme de katkı sağlanmış olmaktadır.
2. El Total Station, Topraklama Cihazları, Spektrometre, GPS ve Dahası..
Şirketinizde kullanılma şansı olmayan çeşitli ikinci el Topraklama cihazlarından total station’a birçok ürünü alıyoruz. Bu sayede hem stoklarınızda yer açılmış olur hem 2. el elektronik cihazları alıcı firmalara satarak

Name: JW Engenharia Polias Industriais e Correias
Description:
História
Sediada em Contagem-MG, atuando no mercado industrial desde 2008, a JW ENGENHARIA segue a passos largos atuando como importante fornecedor de produtos industriais para empresas de pequeno, médio e grande porte. Atuando no setor de mineração, siderurgia, cimenteira, papel e celulose, construção civil, fertilizantes, fundições, montadoras, alimentício, distribuidor de peças especiais em borracha, revestimentos cerâmicos em tambores de sistemas transportadores para as principais empresas industriais do Brasil.

A JW Engenharia se destaca e se diferencia pelo fornecimento de produtos especiais e desenvolvimentos que proporcionem ao cliente garantia e maior disponibilidade operacional. Distribuidor Autorizado do Condicionador de metais ALFA-X (redutor de atrito, temperatura e vibração), trouxe a seus clientes uma revolução em relação aos conceitos de lubrificação industrial, proporcionando maior vida útil e redução nas quebras e manutenções dos equipamentos mecânicos.

Missão
Atender com excelência às demandas de nossos clientes a partir do desenvolvimento e oferta de produtos e serviços que contribuam para a melhoria da qualidade de vida das pessoas, gerando riqueza de forma sustentável.

Visão
Ser empresa de referência, reconhecida como a melhor opção por clientes, colaboradores, comunidade, fornecedores e investidores, devido à qualidade de nossos produtos, serviços e relacionamento.

Valores
• Integridade
• Comprometimento
• Valorização Humana
• Superação de Resultados
• Melhoria contínua
• Inovação
•Sustentabilidade

Name: Genbyg A/S
Description:
Genbyg A/S sætter nye standarder for genanvendelse af brugte byggematerialer til både private og professionelle. Vi vil hæve barren for bæredygtigt byggeri og påvirke de måder, man gennem øget genbrug af byggematerialer, nu og i fremtiden, kan gavne miljøet, når byggeprojekter udvikles og realiseres. 

Genbyg blev stiftet i 1998 for at sætte genbrug af byggematerialer i system.
I dag står vi med +20 medarbejdere, eget snedkeri og Danmarks største lager med brugte byggematerialer som byggeriets største og mest professionelle genbrugsvirksomhed med speciale i opkøb og videresalg af brugte byggematerialer. Alle materialer lagerføres og udbydes til salg for både professionelle og private kunder via. nettet og i Genbygs butik med tilstødende lagerbygninger i København

Name: Cirkulær
Description:
Hvor mye av klesskapet ditt bruker du egentlig? I gjennomsnitt har over 25% av skapet ligget ubrukt det siste året. Hvorfor ikke sirkulere dine ubrukte klær?

Velkommen til Cirkulær, en fysisk markedsplass for kommisjonssalg av pre-loved klær og tilbehør. Hos Cirkulær finner du et kuratert utvalg av klær og merkevarer som holder høy kvalitet til en god pris.

Vi har en sirkulær forretningsmodell hvor: 
Vi samler inn pre-loved klær og tilbehør i god stand. 
Vi priser, markedsfører og selger plaggene i vår butikk. 
Du får 40% av salgssummen når vi selger varen din. Du får penger inn på konto eller kreditt til å handle i butikken.

Name: SELLIT9
Description: SELLIT9 is the software layer for trade-ins. We turn used household items into instant liquidity, either as a direct payout or instant store credit redeemable with merchants, brands, or loyalty programs using the SELLIT9 Trade platform. It works out of the box via one-click Shopify install or as a custom white-label solution. Our fully managed programs help our merchant, brand, and loyalty partners unlock hidden value, boost conversions, and support sustainability without any operational lift or need to handle inventory.

Name: KIDIBAM
Description:
Un jouet qui a été aimé

Pas de finir à la poubelle ou au placard.

Nous avons créé KIDIBAM,
parce qu’un nouveau jouet n’a pas besoin d’être un jouet neuf,
parce qu’un enfant qui apprend à faire le tri saura qu’on peut toujours donner aux objets une seconde vie,

Faites un tour sur KIDIBAM,
pour acheter à prix doux les jouets des plus belles marques,
pour vendre facilement les jouets de vos enfants,
pour qu’avec vous demain se joue aujourd’hui.

Name: Renov
Description:
Estamos revolucionando a forma como as pessoas adquirem dispositivos novos utilizando seus bens usados no Varejo. Combinando tecnologia avançada e automação eficiente no processo de Trade in de dispositivos móveis como Smartphones, iPhones, iPads, entre outros. Estamos simplificando o acesso a produtos de qualidade. Através da economia circular e práticas de ESG (Environmental, Social, and Governance), incentivamos um estilo de vida sustentável, reduzindo o impacto ambiental e promovendo a conscientização.

Imagine um mundo onde os dispositivos eletrônicos usados ganham uma nova vida em novas mãos, evitando que se tornem lixo eletrônico. Nós acreditamos nisso e trabalhamos diariamente para tornar isso uma realidade. Nosso processo de compra e revenda é ágil e confiável, garantindo que nossos clientes varejistas tenham acesso a dispositivos de qualidade, testados e verificados.

Conectamos toda a cadeia de produtos usados desde o Cliente no Varejo através do nosso Software e Know How até a Distribuição no Mercado Corporativo e Marketplace.

Estamos impulsionando a economia circular, promovendo a reutilização inteligente de dispositivos usados. Através da nossa plataforma, conectamos vendedores e compradores, facilitando as transações e proporcionando uma experiência positiva para todos. 

Junte-se a nós nessa jornada em direção a um futuro mais sustentável. Você estará fazendo parte de uma comunidade comprometida com a inovação, tecnologia e preservação do meio ambiente. Estamos construindo parcerias estratégicas com empresas que compartilham dos mesmos valores, fortalecendo a economia circular e impulsionando o desenvolvimento sustentável.

Vamos juntos criar um mundo onde os dispositivos usados tenham um impacto positivo, impulsionando a sustentabilidade e construindo um futuro melhor para todos nós.

Name: El Recycling
Description:
EL Recycling blev stiftet i 2020, med det formål at sætte fokus på bæredygtig genbrug af elektronik.

Elrecycling er bygget op på at alle skal vinde. Vi tror på, at du vinder ved at købe et kvalitetsprodukt til en bedre pris end tilsvarende nyt – det gavner miljøet – og vi vinder, når du er glad for dit nye produkt. Derfor arbejder vi for at gøre en forskel økonomisk og miljømæssigt i IT-branchen – baseret på cirkulær økonomi.

Genbrug er en enkeltstående handling, der giver en stor værdi for miljøet. Det sparer miljøet for mange tons CO2 om året. 

Elrecycling opkøber brugt IT fra de største virksomheder. Herefter renoverer, opgraderer og rengør vi enhederne og sælger dem igen på samme vilkår som nyt.

Name: WecycleNYC
Description:
At WecycleNYC we are committed to helping solve a worldwide environmental crisis where discarded clothing are either incinerated or dumped in landfills. 
We offer unique and customizable clothing repurposing and recycling programs to New Yorkers who want to make a difference. Together we can reduce waste and give unwanted clothing new life by getting them back into the circular economy.
-Indoor Wecycling Bin Programs
-Outdoor Wecycling Bin Programs
-Sneaker Wecycling Bin Programs
-Wecycling Clothing Drive Programs
-Wecycling Clothing Pick-ups
-24 Hour Wecycling Clothing Drop-offs at our  206 Varick Street headquarters in NYC

Description:
A trusted and convenient online platform to buy and resell preloved luxury brands!
Making luxury fashion circular. 
Buy well, Sell More.

Name: Recytronics Waste Solutions
Description: Your Sustainable E-Waste Solution. We are a cutting-edge e-waste management company committed to responsibly handling electronic waste. Through advanced recycling techniques and eco-friendly processes, we provide efficient disposal and repurposing of electronics while minimizing environmental impact. Join us in creating a greener future by turning your electronic waste into a valuable resource

Name: DHR
Description:
Divine Hero Recycling , nestled in the picturesque Nsukka Local Government Area of Enugu State, Nigeria, stands as a beacon of environmental responsibility and sustainability. This forward-thinking recycling facility is dedicated to the meticulous and eco-conscious recycling of a wide array of materials, including PET (Polyethylene Terephthalate) bottles, PP (Polypropylene), HDPE (High-Density Polyethylene), and LDPE (Low-Density Polyethylene) cartons.

As an environmentally conscious enterprise, AMMENo Recycling is more than just a waste management facility; it is a vital contributor to the preservation of our planet's fragile ecosystem. The facility operates with an unwavering commitment to reducing the environmental footprint of plastics, steering them away from landfills and oceans and into a cycle of renewal and reuse.

AMMENo Recycling's location in Nsukka LGA, Enugu State, is a testament to its community-centric approach. It recognizes that sustainable practices are not only beneficial for the environment but also integral to uplifting local communities. By providing a responsible avenue for plastic waste management, AMMENo Recycling fosters a cleaner and healthier environment for the residents of Nsukka while concurrently generating economic opportunities for the region.

At the core of AMMENo Recycling's mission is a dedication to excellence in recycling practices. With state-of-the-art equipment and a team of passionate experts, the facility ensures that every PET bottle, PP, HDPE, and LDPE carton that passes through its gates is meticulously sorted, cleaned, and processed. This commitment to quality extends to its rigorous quality control procedures, guaranteeing that the recycled materials meet the highest industry standards.

AMMENo Recycling serves as a model of sustainable innovation, demonstrating that responsible waste management and environmental protection can go hand in hand with economic growth. By transforming discarded plastics into valuable resources, the facility contributes to the circular economy, reducing the demand for virgin materials and conserving precious natural resources.

In summary, AMMENo Recycling, situated in the heart of Nsukka LGA, Enugu State, Nigeria, embodies the spirit of environmental stewardship and community empowerment. It is a symbol of hope and progress, proving that responsible recycling practices can create a brighter and more sustainable future for all.

Name: Retreasure
Description:
Retreasure is the Point-Of-Sales (P.O.S) & Logistics Solution for Recycling Services.
Retreasure provides access to inclusive infrastructure for streamlined recyclables collection at scale that fosters segregation at the source and value capture. 
See Demonstration Video

Name: One More Time
Description:
At One More Time, we know everything can have a second life. We are a design and engineering firm built for the circular economy, specializing in recovering, reimagining, and reinventing products from discarded materials.

Starting with lithium-ion batteries from single-use vapes and EVs, we’ve developed systems that recover valuable components and transform them into new, functional technologies. But we’re not stopping there.

Our focus is on creating smart, scalable solutions that unlock new value from all kinds of waste — using design thinking, engineering innovation, and a relentless drive for real-world impact.

From recycling processes to new product development, One More Time is building a future where materials never go to waste — they go one more time.

Name: FIBERIGHT LIMITED
Description:
At Fiberight, we foster technology that creates more environmentally friendly and economically sustainable processes to recover, recycle and repurpose resources found in every day household waste.

Our environmentally friendly process works with existing consumer behaviour to enhance local recycling efforts and the upgraded commodities, allowing us to access and market to an expanded number of manufacturing sectors. All of this results in a more sustainable and profitable resource recovery solution for our partner communities.

Name: OTH Produtos
Description:
OTH Produtos é uma empresa com mais de 25 anos de experiência no mercado de informática, especializada na compra, venda e troca de produtos de informática seminovos. 

 Desde 1997, nosso compromisso é oferecer soluções eficientes e sustentáveis para empresas e consumidores que buscam equipamentos de qualidade com preços competitivos. Acreditamos que cada produto tem valor e pode ganhar novas possibilidades nas mãos certas. 

 Na OTH Produtos, você encontra não apenas equipamentos, mas também um atendimento personalizado e consultoria especializada para garantir a melhor escolha. Nossa expertise de décadas no setor nos permite oferecer a você um negócio justo, transparente e seguro.

Name: Recycledevice
Description:
Recycledevice is a registered trademark of Relcube India Private limited which is one of the topmost re-commerce companies in India involved in end-to-end management of reverse inventories. 

Products merchandise, Pricing engine, Advanced diagnostics, Fintech integrations, Forward & Reverse logistics, and Liquidation of devices are built, managed, and run by Recycledevice in-house teams and partners. Our efforts in building these tools are a step ahead to make the pre-owned market digital and transparent which is largely unorganized in India and around the world.
The super-efficient C2B2B reverse inventory ecosystem and AI tech enable wholesalers, retailers, e-commerce giants, and brands to execute buybacks directly from end customers in a very transparent, digital, and organized way. Door-step pick-up service and instant payments make the selling process simpler for our customers. Our warehouses and offices across India enable us to operate in all major states.

We are technology aggregators and inventory providers supporting top refurbishers, retailers, and wholesalers of the re-commerce world. We also offer our technology as Platform as a Service (PaaS) and various business opportunities to new, budding micro-entrepreneurs. We at Recycledevice have aligned our efforts to the country's collective vision to brace our people for the upcoming digital revolution. We serve thousands of customers every day and their overwhelmingly positive feedback tells us we are on right track.

•	Among Top 3 Buyback partners for Amazon
•	Among Top 3 Re-commerce companies in India.
•	Market Leaders of C2B and B2B reverse inventory ecosystem.
•	Physical presence in 7 India States and still growing.

Name: Ni Met Recycling Fz LLC
Description:
Based in Ras Al Khaimah, UAE, Ni Met Recycling FZ LLC is a leading metal recycling company dedicated to transforming industrial scrap into high-quality, sustainable metals. As the recycling division of Ni-Met Inc., we advance the circular economy by processing stainless steel and non-ferrous scrap into fully recyclable materials for a wide range of industries worldwide.

Our 29,900 m² state-of-the-art facility operates under ISO 9001, ISO 14001, and ISO 45001 standards, reflecting our commitment to quality, safety, and environmental responsibility. We are honored to have received the EcoVadis Gold Medal, recognizing our excellence in sustainability and corporate social responsibility.

With a strategic location and global network, we supply premium recycled metals to clients across India, Europe, and North America, supporting sustainable growth and a greener future.
Location: Ras Al Khaimah, Ras Al Khaimah

Name: Yoti
Description:
Yoti est une association/acteur de l’Économie Social et Solidaire (ESS) qui porte un projet écologique, social et solidaire :

 Nous collectons des dons de jouets peu importe l'état (très bon état, bon état, usé, incomplet)
 Ils sont reconditionnés dans notre l'atelier (triés, réparés, complétés, nettoyés) par des personnes en réinsertion professionnelle, des détenus à la Maison d'Arrêt de Bois d'Arcy.
Les jouets et jeux sont ensuite vendus à prix doux sur sur notre boutique en ligne www.yoti-shop.fr

Yoti permet dès aujourd'hui de donner une seconde vie à tous les jouets, de lutter contre le gaspillage et également de donner seconde chance à des personnes éloignées du monde du travail.

Entreprises, municipalités, écoles, particuliers vous souhaitez faire des dons ? Nous gérons l'ensemble de la logistique (bac, affiches...). N'hésitez pas nous contacter : collecte@yoti-shop.fr

Showroom à Paris (métro Châtelet) pour les professionnels de la petite enfance. Tous nos jeux et jouets sont issus du réemploi et conformes à la AGEC.
Nos services :
- Commandes à distance
- Livraison
- Service après vente
- Garanti
- Certifie « Service France Garanti »

Name: Benmet Steel and Metal
Description:
One of the most established, reputable, independent, and trusted processors of recycled metals in Canada for over 50 years.

Founded in 1956, Benmet Steel & Metal’s roots are in recycling, brokerage and all aspects of the scrap metal and steel industry.

In August 2007, Benmet Steel & Metal came under new ownership and management, with a focus on sustainable growth through excellent service, competitive pricing and integrity in all our relationships with both producers and consumers of scrap metals.

Due to our team’s extensive experience and commitment to integrity and superior service, we have become one of Ontario’s fastest growing scrap metal recycling companies. Our new management group’s vast network of both domestic and international markets will help ensure our customers receive the most competitive pricing available. This, combined with our capital investment in technology, new equipment and state-of-the art facilities will allow the Benmet team to meet and exceed all your expectations

Name: ReupCycle App
Description:
Welcome to Reup-Cycle App! 

 Transforming Plastic, Transforming Lives: At Reup-Cycle App, we're not just a plastic recycling company; we're pioneers of a circular economy. Our core values revolve around sustainability, innovation, and a commitment to combatting climate change.

 Circular Economy Champions: Join us in the movement towards a circular economy by seamlessly connecting the dots in the plastic lifecycle. We collect used plastic, transforming it into a premium raw material that fuels industries committed to recycling and upcycling.

 From Collection to Transformation: As a vertically integrated startup, we've revolutionized the plastic recycling landscape. We collect plastic, process it, and deliver a high-quality raw material directly to industries. We're proud to be trailblazers in closing the loop on plastic waste.

 Achieving Milestones Together: Celebrate with us as we make strides in sustainable practices. Reup-Cycle App stands tall as a one-of-a-kind plastic recycling startup, making waves as a bridge between used plastic and the industries that breathe new life into it.

Join us in our mission to make a meaningful impact on the world. Together, let's reupcycle for a better, greener future! 

#Sustainability #CircularEconomy #PlasticRecycling #Innovation

Name: The Cup Collective
Description:
The Cup Collective is a unique European partnership programme to recycle and regenerate paper cups on an industrial scale, aiming to see recycling of paper cups surpass a minimum of 5,000 tonnes in the coming years.
 
 An at-scale solution: 
Removing barriers to accelerate industrial scale solutions for paper cup recycling across Europe.
 
 Realising commercial value: 
Maximizing paper cup value through recovering cups as raw materials for recycling.
 
 Delivering systemic change through partnership: 
Delivering an industry solution to a global challenge. We work with our partners through the value chain to put systems in place driving at-scale recycling of single use paper cups.
 
 Every cup counts: 
We believe in the value of every single use paper cup. We are developing transparent and traceable solutions to regenerate the value of each cup for new uses.
 
 Making it easy, making it the everyday: 
Creating a movement starts one cup at a time. By making it easy for consumers to do the right thing, we will ensure that no cup is left behind.

Name: Sneaker Impact
Description:
At Sneaker Impact, we're on a mission to make the world more sustainable while creating opportunities for those in need. With over 40 years of experience, we've become global leaders in recycling apparel and shoes, ensuring that these items don't end up in landfills but instead contribute to a brighter, eco-friendly future.

Extended Life Location Matching
We pride ourselves on our Geolocation expertise, which we use to assist our micro partners. We understand precisely where products are needed and ensure they don't become waste in landfills. Currently, we recycle a staggering 700,000 shoes and a whopping 2,000,000 pounds of apparel every month. Our commitment to sustainability is evident in our actions.

End of Life Circular Programs
Our innovative circular programs for shoes and textiles take end-of-life products and give them a new lease on life. We transform these items into new material streams, reducing waste and conserving resources. Sustainability isn't just a buzzword for us; it's a way of life.

ESG/Scope 3
We've also developed a Sneaker Impact Credit system based on CO2e for reporting purposes, benefitting our partners. This system helps organizations measure and reduce their carbon footprint, aligning with environmental, social, and governance (ESG) goals. By working with us, partners can demonstrate their commitment to sustainability and make a significant impact on Scope 3 emissions.

At Sneaker Impact, our passion for sustainability drives everything we do. We believe in turning challenges into opportunities, transforming end-of-life products into valuable resources, and helping organizations achieve their environmental goals. Together, we can create a more sustainable world while making a positive impact on people's lives.

Description:
What we do at CYCLING BATTERIES.

At Cycling Batteries, we are pioneering E-Bike battery technology to make THE BEST E-bike batteries in the world. We call them "FaZtBatts",  they have significantly improved safety, performance, longevity, and a far more sustainable life cycle than any other e-bike battery. 

They are also more affordable because they are smart.
What’s more, FaZtBatts are intelligent and have additional SAFETY and FaZt charging performance enhancements. They charge like cellphones in any cafe worldwide. Consequently, they have virtually infinite range, like your cell phone, and charge faster than you can order and drink a cafe drink at Starbucks.

IN LESS THAN 12 minutes!

Our world-leading, better solution for 300+ million current E-bikes and 30+ million new ones are being built annually. 

Few realize that the E-bike sector of the transport economy is nine times bigger than the four-wheel EV sector. All e-bike batteries on the market will only last 2-4 years, depending on use, but they will all need replacing at some point. It's a BIG MARKET, AND WE PROVIDE THE BEST SOLUTION that works on 90% of all e-bikes

In human transport numbers: more people travel more miles on two-wheeled electrified vehicles than they have ever traveled on four-wheeled electrical vehicles, possibly 7-10 times more! 

I am proud to lead a great team of climate-conscious, science-aware, experienced designers, engineering, technology, and business professionals. Our core mission is sustainable practices, aligning with the global push for viable eco-friendly technologies that deliver lower-cost, better products and services. We believe that aligning actions, business, and mission is the only way to survive on this planet as an individual or organization.

Embracing honesty, authenticity, and mission before short-term profit-only thinking, with these principles, we will be a favored, ever-growing love brand; more importantly, we will directly contribute to COOLING EARTH FAST.

« Une 2ème chance pour un homme, une 2ème vie pour un livre. » 	PDF 	Imprimer 	Envoyer

Tel pourrait être le slogan de Book Hémisphères. A la fois Association de loi 1901 et Entreprise d'Insertion (dite AEI), Book Hémisphères collecte, trie, puis redistribue des livres d'occasion de tous genres et de tous types. Elle est à ce titre un acteur de l'économie sociale et solidaire (dite ESS).

Elle a une triple vocation :

    *  solidaire et sociale : outre ses deux permanents, la structure embauche d'ores et déjà deux salariés en contrat d'insertion à temps plein en tant que « trieurs de livres », et elle ambitionne de s'agrandir dès 2011.
    *  humanitaire et culturelle : en tant que plate-forme spécialiste du tri de livres, Book Hémisphères souhaite s'associer à différents projets et organisations nécessitant la fourniture de livres et ayant pour but de favoriser l'accès à la culture pour tous.
    * environnementale : les livres trop usagés sont orientés vers une autre entreprise d'insertion partenaire, qui collecte le vieux papier destiné à être transformé en pâte à papier.

Name: CTR Group UK
Description:
Who is the CTR Group?
The CTR Group is a pioneering reuse, recycling, and repurposing business. We are the UK’s largest charity shop collector working with charity partners to help reduce their costs, increase revenues and safeguard their reputations. We partner with leading brands to set up and run ethical, sustainable and profitable product disposal schemes for everything from giveback schemes to reselling overstock. CTR also works with the public sector to offer closed loop recycling programmes for IT asset disposal, data wiping, WEEE waste, and toner and cartridge recycling. 
 
At CTR Group we’re on a mission to make a difference. To waste nothing, reuse everything and protect the planet. We’re giving our customers a way to reuse, recycle and repurpose practically everything. It’s better for the planet, our clients and their customers. And because it’s better for them, it’s also better for their bottom line. 
 
Our vision is to be part of a global circular economy, where it is the norm (not the exception), and landfill is a thing of the past. 
 
Specialties.
Sustainability, recycling, reuse, repurposing and logistics. We are the UK’s largest charity shop collector working. We work with leading brands to set-up and run ethical, sustainable and profitable product disposal schemes for everything from giveback schemes to reselling overstock. We work with the public sector to offer closed loop recycling programmes for IT asset disposal, data wiping, WEEE waste, and toner and cartridge recycling.

Welcome to MM Enterprises, where Merchandising meets Mastery. We are not just a merchandising agency; we are architects of brand elevation and consumer connection. With a commitment to excellence and an eye for innovation, MM Enterprises transforms merchandise into memorable experiences, helping brands resonate with their audience in meaningful ways.

At MM Enterprises, we understand that merchandising is more than just products – it's a strategic blend of creativity and market insight. Our team of seasoned professionals crafts bespoke merchandising solutions tailored to amplify your brand identity and captivate your target demographic.

Why MM Enterprises?

Strategic Brilliance: We don't just create merchandise; we architect strategic narratives. Our team dives deep into market trends and consumer behavior to ensure your merchandise tells a compelling story that resonates.

Quality Assurance: Excellence is our benchmark. From concept to execution, MM Enterprises upholds the highest standards of quality, ensuring that every product bearing your brand reflects the premium essence you strive for.

Innovative Designs: Creativity is our forte. We believe in pushing the boundaries of conventional merchandising, offering you designs that not only stand out but also set trends in your industry.

Client-Centric Approach: Your vision is our mission. MM Enterprises collaborates closely with clients, ensuring a personalized and seamless experience from ideation to delivery.

Global Reach: In a world where borders are no longer boundaries, MM Enterprises facilitates international reach for your brand through carefully crafted merchandising strategies that transcend geographical limitations.

Name: Wig-it Nigeria
Description:
WIG-IT Nigeria is a startup found in Port Harcourt, Nigeria that deals in recycling old weaves to brand new wigs, training/empowering professional skilled wig makers, and production of brand new wigs.

WIG-IT Nigeria started in 2017 and was borne out of the need for a more affordable hair beautification option. Studies have shown that 95% of wigs circulating the Nigerian wig market are imported and due to the global economic meltdown, importation cost is very high. As a result, these wigs have become highly expensive and are available mostly to the high class in society.

The WIG-IT Nigeria aims to promote the circulation of Nigerian-made wigs, thereby eliminating the high importation cost of wigs and making them available for all classes of women in Nigeria.

Name: Belepok
Description:
Belepok c'est une entreprise à triple casquettes (pourquoi faire simple..)

- c'est tout d'abord une brocante en ligne, dans laquelle vous pourrez déambuler à loisir pour dénicher la petite pépite vintage qui viendra sublimer votre décoration pour des prix abordables

- c'est aussi un service de débarras. Imaginez que pour une vente, un déménagement ou une succession, vous ayez toute une maison à vider, de la cave au grenier.. Quelle plaie.. Il va falloir trier, jeter, descendre l'énorme armoire normande par le petit escalier.. enfin bref, la galère.
Imaginez maintenant qu'une équipe de gros bras se charge de ça pour vous ! 
Pour nos clients, nous débarrassons les maisons, appartements, caves, dépendances et locaux commerciaux. Nous évacuons en déchetterie et revalorisons tous les objets qui peuvent l'être, soit en les revendant sur notre site, soit en donnant à des associations partenaires.

-Belepok c'est également un atelier de relooking de mobilier. Si vous avez besoin de redonner un coup de jeune à un meuble de famille mais vous ne savez pas comment vous y prendre ? Si vous avez des idées pour un relooking mais vous n'osez pas vous lancer ?
Alors nous serons la pour mettre votre projet en oeuvre. Au sein de notre atelier nos décapons, ponçons, peignons, cirons pour redonner vie à vos meubles préférés.

Alors n'hésitez pas à venir échanger avec moi !

Name: Renewal Eco-Recyclers Ltd/Gte
Description:
Renewal Eco-Recyclers Ltd/Gte is a plastic waste recycling company based in Yola, Nigeria, committed to creating sustainable solutions through innovative recycling practices.

We collect, process, and recycle plastic waste, turning it into reusable raw materials that support manufacturing and reduce environmental pollution. Our goal is to tackle the growing challenge of plastic waste while contributing to a cleaner environment and a circular economy.

At RECOR, we partner with local communities, businesses, and stakeholders to:

Provide responsible plastic waste management solutions

Promote environmental awareness and sustainability

Support local industries with affordable recycled raw materials

Create job opportunities through green innovation

 Together, we are building a cleaner and more sustainable future—one recycled plastic at a time.

Name: NextTek Oy
Description:
NextTek Oy is a rapidly growing Finnish company specializing in the refurbishment, repair, and resale of used electronics, primarily laptops and computers. Our mission is to extend the life cycle of technology, reduce electronic waste, and make high-quality devices accessible and affordable for individuals, businesses, and institutions across Finland – and soon, throughout Europe.

We believe in sustainable business and the power of circular economy. Every device we restore is a step toward a smarter, more responsible future.

We are actively expanding our partner and customer network, both locally and internationally. Whether you're looking to buy, sell, recycle, or collaborate, we’re open for business – and open to building a better tech future together.

Name: Pond
Description: Pond is a student-only peer-to-peer marketplace built by University of Oregon students, for University of Oregon students. We make it easy and safe for students to buy and sell second-hand furniture, clothing, and essentials within the campus community. Each year, usable items are thrown away during move-outs because existing platforms are either not designed for selling or expose students to off-campus risks. Pond solves this by offering a verified, campus-exclusive marketplace that reduces waste, improves seller safety, and provides affordable options for students—helping build a stronger, more sustainable UO community.

Name: Prelovedby K
Description:
"Prelovedby K" is a sustainable fashion company that offers both new and pre-loved clothing. We believe that fashion should be affordable, accessible, and sustainable, which is why we offer a wide range of high-quality, stylish clothes at affordable prices.

Our pre-loved clothes are carefully curated to ensure that they meet our quality standards, so you can shop with confidence knowing that you're getting the best possible value for your money. We're committed to reducing waste and promoting sustainability, which is why we encourage our customers to buy second-hand clothes instead of buying new ones.

In addition to our pre-loved clothes, we also offer a selection of new clothes that are designed to be both fashionable and sustainable. Our new clothes are made from eco-friendly materials and are produced using ethical manufacturing processes, so you can feel good about your purchase.

Whether you're looking for trendy pieces to update your wardrobe or timeless classics that will never go out of style, "Prelovedby K" has something for everyone. Shop with us today and join the movement towards sustainable fashion!

Chez Nautic’Stcyp, nous mettons notre passion et notre expertise du nautisme au service des passionnés de la mer. Spécialistes du courtage de bateaux, nous accompagnons nos clients dans l’achat et la vente de leurs embarcations en assurant un service sur mesure, transparent et efficace.

 Courtage de bateaux : Nous facilitons chaque transaction en offrant un accompagnement personnalisé, de l’évaluation du bateau à la finalisation de la vente.

 Services nautiques : Nous proposons également des conseils spécialisés et des solutions adaptées aux besoins des plaisanciers, qu’il s’agisse d’entretien, d’équipement ou d’optimisation des performances de leurs bateaux.

 Pourquoi choisir Nautic’Stcyp ?
 Une expertise approfondie du marché nautique
 Un réseau solide de passionnés et de professionnels
 Un accompagnement dédié pour chaque client

Que vous soyez propriétaire souhaitant vendre votre bateau ou futur acquéreur à la recherche de la perle rare, Nautic’Stcyp est votre partenaire de confiance.

Name: Association 2ème Chance
Description:
Ressourcerie – Association loi 1901 – créée en 2009 et adhérente au Réseau National des Ressourceries et des Recycleries depuis 2013. Nous sommes basés à Abbeville dans les Hauts-de-France et agissons sur le territoire grâce à nos 4 magasins solidaires (3 à Abbeville dont deux dans des quartiers prioritaires de la ville, et 1 à Nouvion en Ponthieu). 
Notre périmètre s’étend jusqu’à environ 50 kilomètres autour de notre siège social. Nous proposons plusieurs services, à savoir :
-	La vente d’articles d’occasions dans notre différents magasins solidaires avec notamment de la vaisselle, des vêtements, de la puériculture, des livres, du linge de maison, des bijoux, des jouets, des meubles (customisés ou non)… et tant d’autres articles à des prix accessibles à tous !
-	Les collectes à domicile et les débarras de maison, appartements, cave, garage… Pour les particuliers et les professionnels ! Un service gratuit, rapide et réalisé avec soin. Grâce à son agrément ESUS et à sa reconnaissance d’intérêt générale, la structure peut également délivrer des reçus fiscaux. Pour toute demande, merci de nous appeler ou de nous envoyer un mail. 
-	L’aérogommage qui est une méthode de sablage à haute pression afin de retirer le vernis et les premières couches du bois afin de lui redonner un aspect brut. Cela permet de le garder en l’état, ou de le peindre dans notre atelier de customisation. Un service qui accepte les commandes, par téléphone ou par mail.
-	Les ateliers « Recup&Co. » qui sont des ateliers sur un thème précis qui ont lieu un samedi par mois. Ces ateliers sont sur inscription, et annoncés sur nos réseaux sociaux.
Notre structure emploie sous la forme de contrats aidés, mais a pu pérenniser une quinzaine de contrat durant ses 15 ans d’existence. Nous aspirons désormais à développer notre site de Nouvion, et à collecter davantage de matériels (notamment en sensibilisant les professionnels à cette démarche éco-responsable).

Name: JAHACO
Description:
JAHACO is a Woman-owned small business located in Coatesville PA that is  transforming “unrecyclables” like grocery bags, bread bags, shipping wrap, and soft plastics, into benches, tables, fencing, mailbox post, retaining walls, sign posts, and trail markers.  



A bench purchase removed the  equivalent of 13,000 grocery bags from the environment - a picnic table - 30,000.  Together let's clean up our communities in style.

Name: Mr. Ecobrick
Description:
Mr. Ecobrick - "Building a Sustainable Future: One Ecobrick at a Time"

Passionate about environmental stewardship and committed to reducing plastic waste, we are dedicated to the mission of transforming discarded plastics into eco-friendly building materials through the innovative practice of ecobricking.

Environmental Advocate: With plastic pollution ranking as the foremost environmental challenge of our time, we firmly believe in the power of Ecobricks to mitigate this crisis. By compacting plastic waste into sturdy bricks, we not only prevent it from polluting our oceans and landfills but also repurpose it into valuable resources for construction projects.

Reducing & Reusing Plastics: At Mr. Ecobrick, we are on a mission to change the narrative surrounding plastic waste. Hailing from the Philippines, our initiative began in San Mateo, Rizal, through the dedicated efforts of a family determined to recycle plastic waste and reuse materials such as bottles. By engaging communities in the ecobricking process, we empower individuals to take tangible action in reducing and reusing plastic materials. Every Ecobrick created represents a step towards a cleaner, greener future.

Eco-Friendly Building Solutions: We envision Ecobricks as more than just a means of waste management; they are a sustainable alternative for small-scale building projects. With their versatility and durability, Ecobricks offer an eco-friendly solution for constructing everything from garden walls to furniture, reducing our reliance on conventional materials and promoting a circular economy.

Join us in our journey to create a world where plastic waste becomes a valuable resource, and sustainable living is the norm. Together, we can build a brighter future one Ecobrick at a time!

Name: Calderdale Wood Recycling
Description:
Our mission is to create a sustainable future by reducing waste and saving valuable resources through wood recycling whilst creating opportunities for individuals to enhance their employability skills and become work-ready.

We work with construction companies and building sites to ensure wood they don’t need is collected and recycled rather than ending up in landfill. Wood is processed at our factory in Halifax where it is sold in our timber yard or made into products such as tables, planters, benches, bird boxes for sale to the public. Everything is recycled or used.

Alongside our environmental impact is our social mission to help people into work. Calderdale Wood Recycling operates under ISCAL, a service provided by Calderdale Council that assists individuals with disabilities and health conditions to overcome barriers and find work. We are co-located with our sister enterprise, ISCAL Coaster Factor, which produces disposable tissue coasters and other paper goods for the hospitality and travel sectors. Our shared objective is to offer a variety of inclusive work-related opportunities to help those who are furthest from the job market access worthwhile training and employment.

Name: Hawk’s Port Electronics
Description:
Hawk’s Port Electronics is a trusted local buyer of smartphones, laptops, tablets, smartwatches, and other premium electronics in Colorado Springs. We make selling your tech simple, safe, and stress-free — whether you’re upgrading, decluttering, or cashing out a drawer full of old devices.

We buy individual items and multi-device batches alike, with fast quotes, honest pricing, and same-day payment. No gimmicks, no runaround — just a smooth experience from a real small business that actually picks up the phone.

From everyday consumers to hobbyists, resellers, and people clearing out old gear, our mission is to make selling electronics easier for our community while keeping valuable tech out of landfills.

Colorado-owned. Customer-focused. Fair every time.

Name: North Verde Auto Salvage
Description:
North Verde Auto Salvage | Get Used!

Established in 1983, North Verde Auto Salvage is a family-owned business dedicated to keeping quality auto parts in circulation. With decades of expertise, we specialize in sourcing, salvaging, and supplying used and aftermarket parts—especially for Jeeps, 4x4s, trucks, and SUVs. Whether you're tackling an off-road build, repairing your daily driver, or restoring a classic, we’ve got the parts you need.

We take pride in our deep industry knowledge, competitive pricing, and commitment to sustainability—giving new life to used parts while reducing waste. From engines and transmissions to axles, body panels, and accessories, our inventory is constantly evolving.

Serving Ontario, Caldwell, Nampa, Boise and beyond, we offer nationwide shipping and convenient local pickup. Our team is dedicated to helping you find the right part fast, with expert service and support every step of the way.

Name: Continuous
Description:
Continuous is an innovative, circular economy business. 

We aim to increase the sustainability of the beverage industry by building a scalable reuse system for traditional one-way glass bottles. 

In doing so, we can help companies reduce their greenhouse emissions and increase their profitability. Our bottles are 30-50% cheaper and depending on the bottle type, responsible for up to 80% less carbon emissions.

Name: Groovy Anton
Description: Waarom vintage kleding? Elk item is uniek, gaat langer mee en je maakt een milieuvriendelijkere keuze! Name: DOBA Studio
Description: The plastic pollution is quite obvious by now. If you're on our web page, you're probably curious about what you can change to minimize it. DOBA Studio exists to reduce plastic waste. Sometimes we do it through boosting recycling, other time by adopting zero waste lifestyles, from time to time we organize educational workshops. Whatever works. Seeing people in the local community as the key element to fix this mess, counting on people to bring the necessary change. Small steps, multiplied by millions. That's how we can win our battle. We don't believe in techno-utopian, fix-it-all, dream technology. Being very inspired by the idea of Precious Plastic. It is a combination of people, machines, platforms and knowledge to create an alternative global recycling system. Thanks to Plastikowa Rewolucja in Warsaw where they showed how to do it, I decided to spread this further - in Edinburgh! Everyone can change the world (yes you too!)

Name: Prosan SpA Reciclaje Orgánico y Lombricultura
Description:
Prosan SpA
Desde 2005, hemos recorrido un emocionante viaje de transformación. Comenzamos con la producción de lombrices rojas californianas para reciclaje orgánico y lombricultura, marcando el inicio de nuestra pasión por la sostenibilidad.

En 2017, dimos un gran paso adelante al convertirnos en una SpA y expandir nuestro enfoque hacia el compostaje y la producción de tierras en San Pedro de la Paz. Posteriormente, trasladamos nuestras operaciones a Talcahuano, donde nos hemos consolidado como líderes en la industria del compostaje masivo.

Hoy, somos uno de los principales proveedores de compost, tierra compostada, humus de lombriz, tierras vegetales y tierras para jardín. Nuestro objetivo es ofrecer soluciones innovadoras y sostenibles que fomenten el cuidado del suelo y promuevan prácticas ecológicas responsables.

En Prosan SpA, estamos comprometidos con el futuro verde y el bienestar del planeta. Acompáñanos en este viaje hacia un mundo más sostenible!

Name: Brocante Soleil
Description:
Je propose une sélection unique d’objets, de mobilier et de luminaires vintage, soigneusement chinés pour leur caractère, leur histoire et leur esthétique. Chaque pièce est choisie avec attention, restaurée si besoin, pour retrouver tout son éclat et s’intégrer dans des intérieurs de caractère, chaleureux et authentiques.

En parallèle, je mets mon savoir-faire artisanal au service de la restauration de mobilier, notamment grâce à la technique traditionnelle du cannage. Je restaure à la main des assises, en respectant les gestes d’autrefois. L’objectif : préserver le patrimoine, valoriser les matières naturelles et offrir une seconde vie aux assises abîmées.

Je travaille aussi sur commande pour vos projets de restauration : cannage, nettoyage, petites réparations… Chaque intervention est personnalisée selon vos envies, l’histoire de votre meuble et son usage futur.

Name: Comptoir des Estimations
Description:
Le Comptoir des Estimations est une société familiale spécialisée dans l'expertise et l'estimation de biens de valeur, fondée pour offrir des services professionnels de haute qualité dans le domaine de l'art, des antiquités, des objets de collection, des bijoux, des meubles et d'autres objets précieux. 

Située à Paris en plein cœur du quartier Drouot, un véritable centre de la culture et du marché de l’art, cette société se distingue par son expertise et sa capacité à estimer et à acheter des objets aussi divers que des œuvres d’art, des bijoux anciens, des montres de collection, des pièces de Design, des objets décoratifs et bien plus encore. 

L'entreprise propose une large gamme de services d'évaluation, allant des estimations ponctuelles en vue de ventes aux enchères, à des conseils personnalisés pour des projets de succession, de ventes directes, ou d'achats. Grâce à une équipe d'experts spécialisés dans différents domaines, la société peut offrir une expertise fine et adaptée à chaque bien. Ces experts, souvent reconnus pour leur savoir-faire et leur expérience, sont capables de donner une évaluation précise et objective, en tenant compte des tendances du marché, de l'authenticité des objets et de leur état de conservation.

En plus de son activité d'estimation, Le Comptoir des Estimations organise régulièrement des événements tels que des journées d'estimation, où les clients peuvent venir avec leurs objets sans rendez-vous pour obtenir des évaluations gratuites ou à prix modéré. Ces événements sont très prisés par ceux qui souhaitent obtenir une estimation rapide ou découvrir la valeur de biens hérités, dénichés lors de brocantes ou d'enchères.

En résumé, le Comptoir des Estimations est un acteur clé dans le domaine de l'expertise, l’achat et la mise en vente aux enchères de biens précieux, offrant des services diversifiés et adaptés aux besoins spécifiques de chaque client, tout en alliant tradition et innovation.

Name: DIN Bildemontering AB
Description:
Om DIN Bildemontering i Örkelljunga AB
DIN Bildemontering i Örkelljunga AB är en auktoriserad bilskrotningsservice med fokus på miljövänlig återvinning av uttjänta fordon. Vi verkar i Skånes-Fagerhult och erbjuder våra tjänster i Skåne, Halland och Kronoberg. Vårt mål är att bidra till en hållbar framtid genom att hantera fordon som nått slutet av sin livslängd på ett ansvarsfullt sätt.

Miljö och hållbarhet
Vår moderna återvinningsprocess maximerar återanvändningen av fordon, minskar avfall och sparar resurser. Genom att välja oss bidrar du till hållbar bilskrotning och en cirkulär ekonomi.

Varför välja oss?
Auktoriserad bilskrotning – Säker hantering av fordon enligt alla regler.
Kostnadsfri upphämtning – kör hämtning av bilar i Skåne, Halland och Kronoberg.
Snabba betalningar – Du får ersättning innan upphämtning av bilen.
Konkurrenskraftig ersättning – Bra priser för skrotade fordon.
Kundfokus – Enkelt och smidigt för dig som kund.

Hur fungerar det?
Kontakt: Boka upphämtning via telefon, e-post eller hemsida.
Upphämtning: Vi hämtar bilen utan kostnad.
Betalning: Du får betalt innan vi transporterar bilen.
Återvinning: Bilen demonteras och återvinns.
Miljöcertifikat: Vi utfärdar ett intyg efter miljövänlig skrotning.

Våra tjänster
Reservdelar: Vi säljer bildelar till bra priser.

Välkommen till oss
DIN Bildemontering i Örkelljunga AB gör bilskrotning enkel och hållbar. 
Vi hjälper vi dig med hållbara lösningar och bra service.

Kontakta oss idag:

DIN Bildemontering i Örkelljunga AB
www.dinbilskrot.se

Name: Cost Little Inc.
Description:
At Cost Little, we’re more than a thrift store — we’re a people-first movement reviving the human connection in secondhand retail. Founded on the belief that second doesn’t mean second-class, we blend affordability with dignity, sustainability with style, and savings with soul.

Born in Calgary, our journey started with a single storefront — but our vision reaches far beyond. We're building a nationwide, community-rooted thrift chain and online marketplace, where every item tells a story and every purchase supports circular living.

But what truly sets us apart?
We don’t just sell goods — we adopt stories. Whether it’s a used book, a pair of jeans, or a vintage phone, every product finds a new purpose in a new home.

We saw what was missing in thrift retail: warmth, relationship, a smile.
So we made it our mission to bring it back — one customer, one community, one connection at a time.

What we stand for:
 People Before Profit
 Adoption Agency for Second Chances
 Circular Economy & Environmental Stewardship
 Local Impact, National Vision
 Supporting families, kids, and causes — quietly, but intentionally.

Follow us to join a growing community that’s reimagining retail — where reuse meets respect, and every dollar stretches further with meaning.

Name: OUTIC
Description:
Duurzaamheid zit diep in onze vezels en is meer dan en groene vinkje kunnen zetten in het jaarverslag. Het is een serieuze opgave aan ons allen, die wij met Outic heel concreet invullen. Outic bewijst dat bedrijfskleding een tot wel 90% lagere milieu-impact kan hebben. Dat doen we door te minimaliseren, reconditioneren en destineren. 
Onze aanpak is wezenlijk anders. Met Outic proberen we bedrijfskleding zo lang mogelijk in roulatie te houden, trachten we voorraden te minimaliseren en leggen de focus 100% op kwaliteit. Het begint met een goed passend kledingpakket op maat, waar medewerkers blij mee zijn. Want op wat goed zit is men net iets zuiniger. Wordt de kleding vies, dan wassen en strijken wij die voor je. Gaat er een knoop af of een rits stuk, dan repareren we dat in ons eigen naaiatelier. En als er medewerkers uit dienst gaan of het logo wordt aangepast, zoeken we voor u naar nieuwe gebruikers of naar een nieuw gebruik voor de textiel. Zo maken we de cirkel écht rond.

Name: Fabric Cycle Technology Inc.
Description:
Every second, the equivalent of one garbage truck full of textiles is landfilled or burned across the globe. Shocking, right? Now imagine if we could turn all that “waste” into something meaningful—something that helps the planet instead of harming it.

At Fabric Cycle, that’s not a dream. It’s our daily mission.

 The Real Cost of Throwaway Culture
Fast fashion has made clothes more accessible—but also more disposable. The result? Landfills overflowing with garments that could have been reused, repurposed, or recycled. Synthetic fibers can take hundreds of years to decompose, releasing harmful microplastics into our soil and water along the way.

But here’s the good news: we have the power to change this story.

 Recycling: More Than Just a Buzzword
Recycling isn’t just about sorting waste—it's about rethinking value.

When we recycle fabrics, we:

Reduce landfill waste and free up space for actual non-recyclables.

Conserve water and energy used in manufacturing virgin textiles.

Cut down on pollution caused by burning or dumping textiles.

Create jobs and fuel innovation in the circular economy.

It’s a win-win for the planet, people, and future generations.

 What We Do at Fabric Cycle
At Fabric Cycle, we collect:

Used garments

Textile scraps

Discarded and rejected clothing

Instead of sending them to landfills, we give them a second life—as raw materials, upcycled products, or reimagined fashion. Every piece we recover is a step toward a circular future.

 It's Time to Break the Cycle of Waste
Recycling isn’t just a solution—it’s a revolution. A shift from mindless consumption to conscious contribution. It starts with simple choices: Don’t toss it. Pass it on. Recycle it. Let it live again.

Because the clothes we wear shouldn’t cost the Earth.

Name: CaptuRE Recycling
Description:
Plastic waste has found itself in virtually every aspect of life. Ocean gyres contain hoards of
plastic spanning the size of entire countries. Whales have washed up on shore with almost
100 pounds of plastic bags in their stomachs. We’ve even found a plastic spoon’s worth (7
grams) of microplastics housed in our brains alone, on average (that is around half a percent
of our brains’ total weight!). Out of all of this, however, possibly the most frightening reality
about plastic is our horrific recycling rates - we recycle 5% of the plastics we produce.

Enter: CaptuRE Recycling, LLC.

CaptuRE Recycling, LLC, is a North Iowa startup that restores the value of the plastic we
throw away. Through active community and business participation, CaptuRE takes local
plastic waste and processes it into sheets that are made of 100% recycled content. Not only
does this plastic get diverted from our landfills, but it also transforms into sustainable
products that customers can enjoy and appreciate.
At its core, CaptuRE is more than just a recycling company - it’s a movement. Our mission is
to empower and inform the community of the single-use plastics crisis. Collective action is
one of the only tools we have to reduce our plastic intake effectively, and CaptuRE will be 
at the forefront of driving the change. CaptuRE strives to be a knowledge base for everything
plastic waste-based: Local presentations, park cleanup days, social media posts, waste
consultations, and much more will be offered to Iowa communities to pursue a cleaner
future.

Name: Dromgoole & Sons

If you need to hire a piece of plant for your next project – we have it. From a mini-excavator that will fit through your garden to a mighty 13-tonne earth-mover, we have the full range to deliver your project on time and to budget.

Name: New Socks City
Description:
New Socks City is the place where your socks style truly matters. For centuries, Humans have worn socks and they have evolved into our everyday choices. Our commitment is to introduce an affordable and sustainable era of fashion on your feet. Whilst maintaining sustainability, our collection includes a a new fusion of sharp illustrations and trending modern colors. Our collections can be filled with a variety of inspirational quotes, cultural figures or past prominent events. We are optimistic about our customers breaking away from the usual black and white socks. Our trusted customers can expect full and professional customer service while shopping online or seeing us at your local store. Our audience wears our socks for all occasions such as working from home, partying at the beach, or keeping warm outside for long nights. New Socks City is on track to become an internationally recognized sustainable fashion brand throughout the European Union, United Kingdom and The United States. We continue the new upward trend of long and colorful socks, however in true New Socks City style. 

 

New Socks City proudly produces all of its products within the state of Portugal. Portuguese Craftsmanship specializes in the combination of recycled materials and eco-friendly crafting techniques. We proudly produce our brand with our partners to ensure our cooperation in the global effort to reduce our carbon footprint in the ongoing battle against climate change. We have carefully selected ecological and non-polluting fabrics from ocean waste that are crafted into comfortable and sustainable fashion.

Name: ReciclaBlu
Description:
ReciclaBlu.mob.tec.br is a project developed in Blumenau with the main objective of recycling technological waste, such as cell phones, computers, and other electronic equipment. The project aims to promote environmental awareness and sustainability, as well as to offer citizens a place to properly dispose of these materials, thus avoiding damage to the environment and human health.

Through the project's website, it is possible to obtain information about the materials accepted for recycling, as well as to check the collection points available in the city. It is worth highlighting that the recycling of electronic equipment contributes to the reduction of raw material extraction, the reduction of soil and water pollution, as well as to the reduction of greenhouse gas emissions.

Thus, ReciclaBlu.mob.tec.br is an important initiative for the city of Blumenau, which seeks to promote sustainability and environmental preservation through the recycling of technological waste

Name: USTRG "U.S. TECHNOLOGY RECYCLING GROUP LTD"
Description:
We are a small, local company with BIG ideas. USTRG will help you to recycle because YOU care. You care about the world we live in, and the people that share it with you.  We can ensure a better future for us all by preserving our natural resources, re-using and re-purposing where applicable and reducing our waste, for the betterment of whole generations to come.

Technology changes so fast that companies, governments, schools, hospitals and all types of businesses need to regularly upgrade their IT hardware. This means a lot of waste! The storing or dumping of unwanted equipment, isn’t the solution. It can be detrimental to the environment and can poses security risks as well.

USTRG can help you to reduce security risks.  We will ensure that the data we receive is secured and information destroyed, upon receipt, according to NIST data sanitization guidelines. We can also secure and transfer the liability from you or provide data sanitization certificates upon request.

You can feel assured that we are adhering to the highest standards in the industry, as we believe in responsible recycling and are working towards our own R2V3 Certification. This means that all materials not reusable, sellable or recyclable, are destroyed in an EPA, SERI and RIOS compliant manner, which includes the use of only certified downstream vendors.

By recycling locally, you can be assured the recyclables are handled in a safe and compliant manner. We can all prosper by maximizing our resources, and minimizing our waste. It pays to care.

Name: As New SE
Description:
Vi grundades 2023 med visionen om ett hållbart samhälle. Vår drivkraft är att få fler att använda cirkulära tjänster genom att bygga upp ett koncept som vi själva skulle vilja använda. Med vetskapen om hur mycket saker och kläder som "behövs" till barn, och hur pass kort tid många av dessa faktiskt används, ser vi detta segment som en viktig del i arbetet mot vår vision.

As New är ett koncept för att köpa och sälja begagnat på ett bekvämt, enkelt och säkert sätt. Alla produkter som säljs via oss är i nyskick (As New) eller mycket gott skick (Almost As New) för att du som köpare inte ska behöva göra avkall på kvalitet när du väljer begagnat före nyproduktion. Vi har varumärken som Polarn O. Pyret, Kavat, Mini Rodini, BabyBjörn och många fler. 

Med As New kan du även sälja dina barnkläder och barnsaker på ett bekvämt, enkelt och säkert sätt. Skapa ett konto, beställ hem en påse, packa och lämna den till ditt Post Nord ombud, sen sköter vi resten. Vi tar emot produkter som haft ett nypris på minst 399 SEK, är i gott skick och passar barn i åldrarna 0-5 år. Som säljare får du alltid 65% av försäljningspriset.

Name: iniBags
Description:
*iniBags by Making Oceans Plastic Free*
iniBags is dedicated to addressing the fundamental cause of plastic pollution through behavioral change. iniBags is an idea by our Making Oceans Plastic Free initiative with the mission to break plastic habits, prevent waste, and foster a new culture of reuse for a sustainable future for our oceans.

*Distinctive iniBags Features*
Indonesia’s pioneering iniBags are the nation's first 100% recycled shopping bags made from 2 recycled plastic bottles. These unforgettable, foldable companions aren't just accessories; they're symbols of our commitment to ocean-friendly practices. Locally produced and community-empowering, each iniBag is a canvas showcasing your brand logo while championing the reduction of plastic pollution.

*Journey within Making Oceans Plastic Free*
IniBags was born from a shared passion to safeguard our oceans. Founded in 2016 by a group of like-minded friends, iniBags is inspired by diverse cultural backgrounds and expertise, uniting us in our mission to effect change with compassion and joy.

*Certifications and Impact*
Certified by the "Recycled 100 Claim Standard" and "Global Recycled Standard," iniBags stands as a testament to our unwavering commitment to quality and sustainability. Collaborations with local women and mothers have not only created economic opportunities but also supported the "Single-Use Plastic Free School Program" in Indonesia, impacting over 3000 school children by reducing their single-use plastic consumption by an impressive 40%.

*Joining the Movement*
By aligning with iniBags under the Making Oceans Plastic Free initiative, you're not merely partnering with a product; you're becoming an advocate for a plastic-free future. Elevate your brand's worth by connecting with our mission to protect our oceans.

Together, let's reshape behaviors, protect our oceans, and create a sustainable future: Join us and reach out to us now!

Name: Tudo Veg
Description:
Somos a Tudo Veg, uma plataforma online líder no mercado de venda de produtos veganos no Distrito Federal, comprometida em tornar o veganismo mais fácil, acessível e delicioso para todos.

Fundada por Fernando e Lucila, dois apaixonados pelo bem-estar animal, saúde e meio ambiente, enfrentaram as dificuldades que eles próprios experimentaram como veganos. A missão da empresa é superar esses obstáculos, oferecendo uma ampla variedade de opções veganas de alta qualidade a preços justos.

Com uma jornada empreendedora de seis anos, quando realizaram extensiva pesquisa, visitaram feiras e eventos veganos e estabeleceram parcerias com produtores e fornecedores comprometidos com a produção de alimentos veganos de qualidade. A paixão pelo veganismo os levou a enfrentar desafios ainda maiores durante a pandemia global, quando a oferta limitada de alimentos veganos se tornou ainda mais evidente.

No entanto, essa situação foi vista  como uma oportunidade única para transformar desafios em inspiração. Em 2020, lançaram a Tudo Veg, uma plataforma online abrangente que oferece uma experiência de compra personalizada e acolhedora. A plataforma permite que os consumidores explorem diferentes categorias de produtos veganos, descubram novas opções e recebam recomendações personalizadas, tudo isso no conforto e segurança de suas casas.

A Tudo Veg se orgulha de oferecer uma variedade diversificada de produtos veganos, desde substitutos de carne e laticínios até lanches, sobremesas e produtos de cuidados pessoais. Além disso, foram incluídas categorias como pet shop e até mesmo sex shop, atendendo às necessidades de diversos públicos interessados em um estilo de vida ético e consciente.

Na Tudo Veg são valorizados a qualidade, a sustentabilidade e o compromisso com o bem-estar animal. Os preços justos e competitivos permitem que veganos e aqueles que desejam experimentar um estilo de vida mais ético tenham acesso fácil a produtos de qualidade.

Name: Endossa Floripa
Description:
A Endossa foi a primeira loja colaborativa de Brasil. 

Como chegamos até aqui?

A Loja nasceu em São Paulo, em 2007, chegou em Floripa em meados de 2020 e resistimos!

Como funciona?

Nós disponibilizamos toda estrutura para o empreendedor independente expor e vender. A curadoria dos produtos é feita pelos clientes.

Temos box ("caixas") de diversos tamanhos, e o valor do aluguel depende do tamanho. Ou seja, a marca pode ter mais um canal de venda, investindo pouco.

Para começar a vender, é necessário entrar na fila e esperar ser chamado.
Para permanecer na loja, é necessário bater a meta de venda, em um período pré-estabelecido, ou até o momento que for oportuno.
Cada compra, portanto, é um ENDOSSO do cliente. Assim, os consumidores decidem quais marcas permanecem e quais saem, cedendo lugar a outra marca da lista de espera.

O que tem na loja?
Variedade, diversidade e muita criatividade- roupas, óculos, decoração, bolsas, bijuterias, joias e produtos de bem estar. 

Se interessou?
Entra na lista de espera: https://endossa.com/

At Ezy Auto Wreckers Melbourne, we are more than just a business; we are a part of the community. Our commitment to sustainability goes beyond recycling and repurposing car parts. Our mission is to provide a reliable, efficient, and eco-friendly solution for all your automotive needs.

Name: Brackley E-waste Recycling
Description:
At Brackley E-Waste Recycling, we understand the growing concern over the environmental impact of electronic waste. We believe that every person can make a positive contribution to the environment by properly disposing of their electronic waste. That's why we've made it our mission to provide safe, efficient and environmentally responsible e-waste disposal services.

We specialise in the collection, transportation, and safe disposal of all types of electronic waste, including computers, smartphones, laptops, and other electronic devices. Our state-of-the-art facility, located in Brackley, Northamptonshire, uses the latest technology and processes to ensure that your e-waste is recycled in an environmentally responsible manner.

We are committed to providing our business customers with the highest level of service and support. Our team of experts is always available to answer your questions and assist you with the e-waste disposal process. We believe in transparency, which is why we provide our customers the necessary waste transfer notes along with a certificate of disposal for their records, ensuring that their e-waste has been properly disposed of.

At Brackley E-Waste Recycling, we are passionate about protecting the environment and reducing the environmental impact of electronic waste. By choosing us, you are not only getting rid of your unwanted electronics, but you are also supporting a company that cares about the environment.

If you have any questions or would like to schedule a pickup, please do not hesitate to contact us. We look forward to serving you and helping you make a positive impact on the environment.

Diversiteit

Flexibiliteit
- We kunnen onze mensen, activiteiten, locatie en hulp altijd aanpassen aan verschillende behoeften. Onze service is breed, we staan altijd open voor nieuwe uitdagingen.

Recycling
- Wij doen er alles aan om verspilling van goede items terug te dringen. Deze waarde binnen onze organisatie maakt dat we de schoonheid van tweedehands goederen willen laten zien aan een breed publiek.

Passie
- Vanaf dag 1 is passie de motivatie geweest achter ons bedrijf. Oprichter Marc Rats kent historie van bijna al zijn producten en het hele team is ambitieus en ondernemend.

Creativiteit
- Creativiteit leid tot verrassende nieuwe ideeën, kansen en oplossingen. Ons bedrijf past niet in een hokje en onze denkwereld dus ook niet.

Description:
A RECICLE  é uma empresa de reciclagem de resíduos sólidos e líquidos das fontes geradoras do setor privado e publico, fundada em 2018, em
Palmares, interior de Tailândia-PA, atualmente com
sede ainda na região. Desde então,
tem contribuído para a destinação adequada dos resíduos recicláveis, através de atuação na coleta seletiva buscando reduzir ao máximo  descarte de resíduos para os locais inadequados ocasionando um impacto ambiental nas fonte de recursos naturais e contribuindo para propagação de pragas e doenças;
Nossa atuação é em parcerias firmadas com empresas do setor privado, comunidades do nosso município e municípios vizinhos, setor logístico e supermercados
.Através do nosso trabalho de reciclagem pela coleta seletiva conseguimos conseguimos produzir kits da coleta seletivo a partir dos resíduos (recipientes descarto), gerando emprego e renda para o município, gerando receita para manter o negocio e buscar atuação mais significativa onde estamos lotados.

A RECICLE tem buscado a qualidade
de seus serviços, sustentabilidade e redução da poluição  a partir de um
rigoroso planejamento e acompanhamento
de todas as etapas construtivas para atingir a melhoria continua no reaproveitamento, redução da poluição e compromisso com meio ambiente . 
Os parceiros, colaboradores são qualificados e avaliados
Periodicamente quanto ao seu compromisso e objetivo da RECILCLE com a busca para um futuro melhor para a nossa geração e geração futuras.
Os serviços são constantemente em conformidade com a legislação ambiental, trabalhista, de saúde e segurança, aplicável a nossa atividade.
Buscamos nosso espaço no meio onde estamos inseridos e temos a esperança em dias melhores na preservação do meio ambiente, bem como no uso consciente dos recursos naturais e conservação do mesmo.
