Name: Antimerch
Description:
Music merchandise has a problem...

…cheap throwaway tee shirts, leftover stock that can't be resold, airfreighting merch to shows all over the globe, etc. This all contributes to the global crisis in fashion and the environment.

At the same time, for many artists, already seeing a decline in revenue from other channels, merchandise is a vital source of income. Many tours would not be viable without this revenue plus fans want to buy things to support their favourite artists.

Having worked in music merchandise for over 25 years with some of the largest artists in the world we are guilty of having contributed to the problem. We have made more tote bags than any one person should be responsible for.

So we thought what if we built things differently this time. What if, instead of making more 'stuff' we only used things that were already made.

What if, instead of making merch we made Antimerch?

Name: BeCircular
Description:
BeCircular project is funded by the cross-border cooperation Programme Interreg IPA CBC Programme ”Greece – Republic of North Macedonia 2014-2020”, which is co-financed by the European Union under the Instrument for Pre-Accession Assistance (IPA II). 

BeCircular project is based on concepts of circular economy to create jobs for young engineers, scientists, artists and technicians, further training and preparing the young population to operate as entrepreneurs utilizing skills and knowledge of higher education. 

More specifically, using the know-how acquired in previous projects, which explored the potential of the bioeconomy in the region, as well as recording waste that could be upgraded by repair and reuse, BeCircular aims to seize this opportunity with the establishment and operation of Reuse and Entrepreneurship Centers in Florina and Pelagonia. By upgrading state-of-the-art technology to Circular Economy platforms linked to jobs, employment, and sustainable business models, BeCircular will seek to provide a way out of unemployment and low-paying jobs for young people by supporting the creation of new employment opportunities in the cross-border area.

The objectives of the programme are:
- create effective and durable Circular Economy (CE), Bio-Economy (BE) and Entrepreneurship centers
- provide employment opportunities for young educated unemployed people (incl. vulnerable groups)
- promote the cross-border mobility of people and ideas for better exploitation and elaboration of used materials, enhancing symbiotic BE, integrating cross-border labor markets, and supporting joint local employment initiatives
- build-up capacities of young graduates to startup their own business in CE & BE 
- strengthen centers’ capacity to enact efficient policies in becoming self-sustaining, evaluating their management, investment, and innovation readiness

After the completion of the project, 3 centers will be operational:
- a (R&R) center
- a (R&D) center
- an (E&C) center

Description:
Kringloop Kampen is een coöperatie die maatschappelijk verantwoord wil ondernemen. Dat betekent dat Kringloop Kampen in de regio van de gemeente Kampen meerwaarde wil creëren voor mens, maatschappij en milieu. Dat doen we door het hergebruik van grondstoffen, goederen en producten te stimuleren. Een gezonde zakelijke exploitatie van de onderneming is daarbij een voorwaarde. Financiën hebben ten doel de bedrijfsvoering van een financieel gezond bedrijf te faciliteren waardoor invulling kan worden gegeven aan onze missie.

Onze missie omvat meerdere doelen. Een daarvan is het creëren van werkgelegenheid voor de leden van de coöperatie. In casu doen wij dat door middel van de uitoefening van ons kringloopbedrijf. Om deze onderneming duurzaam te kunnen uitoefenen en de continuïteit ervan te borgen, streven wij naar jaarlijkse exploitatieoverschotten, die nodig zijn om te kunnen investeren en om een buffer op te bouwen voor slechte tijden. 
Kringloop Kampen wil ook een sociaal bedrijf zijn. Aan zijn medewerkers wil Kringloop Kampen ruimte geven zich te ontwikkelen. Daarbij staat Kringloop Kampen garant voor een veilige werksfeer waarin mensen zich welkom voelen en elkaar respecteren. Kringloop Kampen wil ook een bedrijf zijn dat aan mensen met een achterstand tot de arbeidsmarkt of een (tijdelijke) problematiek een veilige arbeidsplek beschikbaar stelt om zo bij te dragen aan herstel, integratie en sociale participatie.

Name: Michigan Ewaste
Description:
At the forefront of environmental innovation, our company leads in recovering valuable resources from e-waste, significantly reducing landfill use and fostering job growth. We excel in extracting reusable plastics, metals, and glass from post-consumer electronics, transforming waste into opportunity. Our commitment extends beyond e-waste, embracing a holistic approach to recycling. We actively participate in curbside recycling, efficiently processing a wide range of materials including plastics, paper, glass, and cardboard, ensuring their reintroduction into the production cycle.

Our services also encompass toll milling, where we offer customized solutions for material processing, adapting to diverse client needs. This process aids in converting a variety of materials into finer grades, ready for reuse and manufacturing, thereby contributing to a circular economy.

In addition to resource recovery and recycling, we prioritize data security through our comprehensive data-destruction services. Recognizing the sensitivity of information contained in electronic devices, we employ stringent methods to ensure complete data eradication, providing our clients with peace of mind and upholding our commitment to privacy and security.

Our approach is not only about recycling and recovery; it's about redefining the lifecycle of materials. We believe in a future where waste is a resource, and our extensive efforts in e-waste recovery, curbside recycling, toll milling, and data destruction services embody this vision. Through our innovative practices, we are setting new standards in the recycling industry, contributing to environmental sustainability, and paving the way for a greener, more responsible future.

Name: RÉTOGRAPHIE

Rétographie, né de la contraction entre la rhétorique et le graphisme, est un moyen de sensibiliser autrui par l'art.

N'hésitez pas à aller sur mon instagram @retographie.  

Nassim Haramein :

C'est important pour les gens, surtout pour les gens qui sont plus conscients de c'qui se passe, qu'ils ne tombent pas dans les théories plus négatives que les gouvernements, que les entreprises ont kidnappé l'humanité en fait. Y'a beaucoup d'choses qui sont vraies là dedans, mais si on se fixe là d'ssus, enfin on participe à cette négativité. C'est important de ne pas devenir c'qu'on combat, c'est-à-dire on ne peut pas changer ce système en faisant la même chose que ce système a fait. Si on devient aussi négatif qu'eux, et qu'on les combat de cette façon, on en arrive au même point. Ça n'aide pas, il faut rester positif, en restant conscients de c'qu'il s'passe sans l'ignorer. Il faut avoir cette joie de vivre, cette ouverture, cette positivité, parce que la négativité, elle, se détruit par elle-même. Tout c'qu'il faut faire, c'est qu'il faut construire le monde qu'on veut voir dans notre futur.

Name: En till fest
Description:
En till fest består dels av en nischad second hand-butik där ni hittar allt som behövs till bröllop och fest. Brud- och balklänningar, smycken, näbb- & tärnkläder, skor, väskor, dekorationer och festtillbehör. Alla varor säljs på kommission och du är varmt välkommen att lämna in just dina saker, så ska jag hjälpa dig med försäljningen. 

Efter 20 år i bröllopsbranschen har jag samlat på mig kunskaper och ett stort kontaktnät och erbjuder därför sedan ett par år tillbaka tjänster inom bröllopskoordinering. Jag älskar när man som bröllopspar tänker utanför ramarna och skapar sin alldeles unika bröllopsdag.

Jag hjälper er gärna från den enskilda rådgivningen, stöttar med jämna mellanrum eller sköter allt från början till slut, utifrån era behov och önskemål.

Att tänka klimatsmart och hållbart även när man planerar en fest eller ett bröllop kommer för mig naturligt. Många år av loppisintresse och välgörenhetsarbete har gett mig erfarenheter såväl nya idéer som möjligheter.

Mitt bröllopsarbete och mina rådgivningar är självklart uppbyggda efter hållbara sätt att konsumera lyxprodukter – i allt från blommor, trycksaker, kläder, dekorationer, mat och dryck till resor, bröllopsgåvor och hur man både väljer och ställer krav på ens leverantörer.

Ni hittar En till fest på hemsida, sociala media och på Karl Knutssonsgatan 5 i Söderöping.

Name: Ecogreenzest
Description:
Ecogreenzest is a circular economy platform that makes recycling simple, rewarding, and impactful. We connect households, communities, businesses, and organizations with convenient recycling services for bottles, plastics, glass, paper, and e-waste—turning everyday recycling into real value.

Users can schedule home pickups or use nearby drop-off points, with all verified recycling activities recorded for transparent impact tracking. Every successful action earns eco points, which are credited to a digital wallet and can be redeemed in the Eco Shop for sustainable products, discounts, and special offers. Eco points can also be donated to community initiatives and verified food banks, allowing users to support meaningful social and environmental causes.

Beyond recycling and rewards, Ecogreenzest empowers users to shop sustainably, track their environmental impact, earn badges, join challenges, and learn best practices through insights and community features. Businesses and sellers can onboard to offer eco-friendly products, reach conscious customers, and participate in green promotions.

Our mission is to accelerate sustainable living, build cleaner cities through community participation, and advance circular economy practices by keeping materials in use and out of landfills. With a focus on transparency, local partnerships, responsible retail, and secure data handling, Ecogreenzest delivers one seamless platform for recycling, rewards, sustainable shopping, and community impact—making it easier for everyone to live greener and create measurable change.

Name: Eagle Tech Salvage
Description:
Welcome to Eagle Tech Salvage, a reputable auto recycling firm, our aim is to safeguard the environment and promote global sustainability. Name: NotBasura
Description:
Reflexionando sobre qué hacer con los desechos reciclables que íbamos acumulando en casa -a la espera de poder llevarlos al punto limpio- exploramos diferentes emprendimientos que nos ayudaran y notamos que estaban todos dispersos. 
Notbasura es, en su capa externa, un sistema de venta y envío de productos construidos por emprendedores en base a la valorización -mediante arte, diseño o innovación productiva- de materiales de desecho.  
Detrás de esta capa, quiere ser una plataforma de colaboración que promueva la clonación de iniciativas exitosas, con el acuerdo, promoción y estímulo de sus creadores, haciendo un guiño a las reglas que han dado crecimiento al código abierto y la economía circular, aplicada a la construcción de objetos valorizados.

El crecimiento sostenido de proyectos que revalorizan materiales de desecho no ha venido acompañado de herramientas necesarias para promover su validación y escalamiento. 
Este problema, junto a nuestra cultura de protección sobre la propiedad intelectual, representan un freno para el ecosistema.
NotBasura levantará esta traba con un sistema de producción y venta colaborativo, donde los productos reciclados pueden ser comprados y clonados por cualquiera. Cada emprendedor, además de tener a disposición un comercio electrónico estándar, entregará todas las herramientas para que la comunidad lo replique desde cero, de forma clara y ágil, inspirados en las reglas del código abierto.

Name: Spieloversum
Description:
Kennst du das? Du stehst im Spieleladen, begeistert von vielen Spielen – aber die hohen Preise machen dir Kopfschmerzen.

Genau hier setzt unser Spieleverleih an: Wir bieten dir die Möglichkeit, Spiele kostengünstig zu leihen/ testen. Wenn dir ein Spiel gefällt, behältst du es. Wenn nicht, gibst du es einfach zurück.


So fing es an: 

Zuhause beim Ausmisten und Aufräumen ("Frühjahrsputz") stand ich (Nils) vor mehreren Spieleregalen und dachte mir: "Man, so viele dieser Spiele spiele ich nicht und habe ich nicht wirklich gespielt. Teilweise habe ich für diese Spiele 50 Euro ausgegeben. Das Geld hätte ich besser woanders reingesteckt. 

Nach ein paar Gesprächen mit meinem Bruder habe ich gemerkt, dass wir in einer Idee von einem Spieleverleih Potential sehen, denn uns beide stört, dass man Spiele zuhause hat, die man nicht braucht.

So geht's weiter: 

1. Mitgründer*innen finden (siehe Jobs)
Wenn du jemanden kennst, der spielebgeistert ist oder du selbst dir vorstellen kannst, mitzumachen, melde dich gerne. 

2. Target Audience bestimmen, hier sind unsere Ideen: 
B2B: Kindergarten, Altenheime, Schulen, Arbeitgeber (Benefits neben Gehalt), Spielevereine

B2C: Spielbegeisterte, aber auch Gelegenheitsspieler

3. MVP starten und schauen, ob's anläuft.

Name: GreenBluelife
Description:

In order to accomplish this, there is need to spread awareness about how to reuse solid waste and provide different ways to up-cycle it. 
The Objectives of our organisation GreenBlueLife are- 
• To provide knowledge of how to up-cycle solid waste and convert it into valuable utility products and thereby promoting a circular economy 
• To network with schools/colleges/organizations/corporates/NGOs to conduct workshops for teaching how to convert solid waste into beautiful utility products

Name: CIRCULAR PLAYGROUND
Description:
Circular Playhouse is your hands-on non-profit consulting partner helping your organisation turn textile waste into circular value, with a strong focus on end product-led solutions. From closed-loop product development to targeted connections with collectors or recyclers, we focus on solutions that are both circular and meaningful for brands. We keep out finger on the pulse for the latest innovations, market realities and upcoming EU regulations.

About the founder:
I’m Valeria Siniouchkina. I work at the intersection of fashion, textiles and circular economy, helping textile waste find its next life by design. I worked with such brands as 'be the fibre, KOMONO, Essentiel Antwerp, Woody, Kipling, JBC aswell as ran my own brand OMSK which sold across Europe, Asia and Russia. 
With over 20 years of experience in the fashion and textile industry, my circle is deliberately round. My expertise spans the entire supply chain, from design and product development to production, sales, retail, second-hand, end-of-life collection, sorting and closed-loop recycling.
I aim to translate your circular economy ambitions into practical strategies through concrete recycling projects, partnerships and viable business models, aligned with EU circular economy priorities and regulations.

Name: Weareroberta
Description:
Roberta er på en mission om at blive Danmarks største platform for køb og salg af genbrugstøj til børn. Det skal være let og sikkert at købe og sælge genbrugstøj, og Roberta skaber rammerne for dette. Det skal være slut med at tage forgæves til fysiske genbrugsbutikker, betale fragt hos flere forskellige sælger, bruge tid på at aftale køb og afhentning, men i stedet få det hele samlet ét sted. Roberta tager brugeren i hånden fra start til slut, og gør det muligt at tjene penge og klikke varer hjem fra sofaen. Du kan altså shoppe lige dén størrelse dit barn er på vej op i, dit yndlingsmærke, efter pris eller bare gå på udkig i vores store sortiment. Har du også kælderen fyldt med tøj, som dit barn nærmest har sprunget igennem, men ikke orker at skulle sætte det hele til salg og stå med hele processen derfra? Så tvivl ej, for det klarer Roberta for dig 

Følgende er processen ved salg af genbrugstøj:

1) Roberta modtager børns aflagte tøj vasket og uden huller, store plamager, illelugt eller lignende.

2) Roberta sorterer tøjet og kvalitetssikrer, at varene egner sig til videresalg.

3)Tøjet fotograferes, beskrives og prissættes af Roberta.

4) Afslutningsvist lagres det hos Roberta og sættes til salg frem mod, at en ny ejer kan få glæde af lækkert kvalitetstjekket børnetøj til en brøkdel af nyprisen.

5) Ved salg dampes tøjet således at det ankommer til din hoveddør forfrisket og nystrøget.

Se mere om Roberta på hjemmesiden www.roberta.store og glæd dig til at opleve Roberta-appen

Name: Lombi.com S.A.
Description:
Spółka technologiczna Lombi.com S.A. powstała w 2020 r. Przez pierwsze lata działalności zdobyliśmy ogromne doświadczenie, rozeznanie rynku i potrzeb Klienta. Początkowo umożliwiliśmy sprzedawanie rzeczy używanych w modelu częściowo online'owym. W 2023 r. postanowiliśmy wejść na wyższy poziom poprzez całkowitą automatyzację procesu sprzedaży, co pozwoliło nam stworzyć unikalne miejsce, które oferuje skup używanych przedmiotów w 100% online, z wykorzystaniem zaawansowanych technologii i autorskiego systemu, który sprawia, iż każda interakcja Klienta z Lombi.com od momentu wyceny aż do finalizacji sprzedaży jest intuicyjna, łatwa, bez jakichkolwiek opłat czy prowizji oraz bardzo szybka. Sprzedaż przedmiotów używanych nigdy dotąd nie była tak prosta. Koniecznie wypróbuj Lombi.com! 

Misja Lombi.com:
W ciągu całego życia kupujemy tak wiele rzeczy - wiele z nich zostaje z nami na lata, kochamy je lub używamy aż do zużycia. Równocześnie, często także wiele przedmiotów gromadzimy w zakamarkach naszych domów - tych, które były nieprzemyślanym zakupem lub prezentem i jednak nam się nie podobają, czy tych, które są nam niepotrzebne i wymieniliśmy je na inne i nowe.
W Lombi.com wierzymy, że możemy dawać rzeczom drugie życie i że jest to dużo lepsze dla nas samych (mniej zagracone domy), naszych portfeli (możemy zarobić bez wysiłku), innych osób (mogą kupić używaną dobrą rzecz, z której będą się cieszyć), a także dla naszej planety.
Naszą misją było i jest stworzenie miejsca doskonałego technologicznie, które będzie zachęcało do sprzedawania rzeczy używanych, a także wprowadzenie ich do drugiego obiegu.

Name: Restmateriaal voor Kunstenaars
Description:
In 2022 liep ik alle kringloopwinkels af en ik struinde ik marktplaats af op zoek naar gebruikte sieraden. 
Dat schoot niet op.
Daarom plaatste ik een oproep op facebook.
Maanden later bracht een collega kunstenares me in contact met een groothandel in sieraden.
Kratten vol oude collecties kralenkettingen mocht ik meenemen.
Dankzij deze restpartij kon ik eindelijk in het groot werken!
Dat heeft me op het dit idee gebracht om ook andere bedrijven en hun restmateriaal aan kunstenaars te koppelen. 

Duurzaam werken, delen en elkaar inspireren.
Geeft jouw bedrijf ook restmateriaal aan kunstenaar(s)?
Daar worden we allemaal beter van!

De facebookgroep die ik als platvorm heb ingezet heeft al 2.500 leden. 
Kunnen we dit op LinkedIn ook leven inblazen!?

Deel deze pagina en help mee onze gezamenlijk onze footprint te verminderen.

Bianca Runge april 2024



Toch ook wat regels:
Alleen kunstenaars en professionele creatieve makers mogen reageren. De materialen moeten voor het maken van kunst, mode, decors of andere creatieve toepassingen ingezet worden.

De aangeboden materialen mogen niet in dezelfde vorm gebruikt worden voor doorverkoop of handel. 

Kunstenaars moeten het aantoonbaar inzetten en gebruiken om te schetsen, vorm te geven en in eigen werk om te zetten.

Dit platform is alleen een doorgeefluik en is niet aansprakelijk voor misbruik. Controleer als bedrijf dan ook altijd zelf of de kunstenaar een eigen website heeft en legitiem is als je bepaalde voorwaarden stelt.
Succes!

Name: Ferrous Metal Processors
Description:
At FMP Recycling, we’re redefining sustainability by recycling metal, plastic, and glass with a purpose. Our mission is to create a cleaner planet while empowering communities through innovative recycling solutions. Based in Gauteng, we’re proud to lead the charge in building a circular economy that benefits both people and the environment. We recycle thousands of tons of metal, plastic, and glass annually, diverting waste from landfills and reducing environmental harm. Our state-of-the-art processes ensure materials are reused efficiently, with a focus on transforming plastic waste into high-quality reusable pellets. These pellets power industries, from packaging to manufacturing, cutting the need for virgin plastic and lowering CO2 emissions. 
 At FMP, recycling is about people as much as it is about the planet. We partner with local waste pickers and communities, providing fair wages, training, and safe working conditions. Through our buy-back centers, we enable individuals to earn sustainable incomes by collecting recyclable materials, fostering economic inclusion and dignity for informal workers.  Recycling metal saves up to 95% of the energy needed for new production, glass recycling preserves natural resources, and our plastic-to-pellet process reduces ocean-bound waste. By choosing FMP, you’re supporting a greener future and a socially responsible supply chain. Connect with us to learn how FMP can support your sustainability goals

Bij veel aangesloten winkels werken mensen die een opstapje nodig hebben naar de arbeidsmarkt en nu krijgen óók zij de kans om aan hun digitale vaardigheden te werken. Het systeem achter Onlinekringlopen.nl is namelijk speciaal voor de branche ontworpen. Dit betekent dat het geschikt is voor alle unieke producten die bij de kringloopbedrijven binnen komen. Het uploaden van nieuwe producten en verwerken van bestellingen gaat stap voor stap en kan op verschillende werkniveaus worden toegepast. En zo is Onlinekringlopen.nl groen en voor iedereen!

Name: Apple Green IT
Description:
We are an IT and WEEE recycling company working in the IT sector since 2010. We have been successfully running an IT Refurbishing operation on a very large scale since 2010 at our state-of-the-art facilities in West Midlands and West Yorkshire.  Our organisation expanded from only refurbishment to recycling in 2019 by securely collecting and recycling used IT equipment and mix WEEE.

We are currently collecting over 5000 tons per annum of IT equipment and exporting it to our approved recycling facilities abroad. We have managed to refurbish over 1 million IT equipment and have re-marketed in the last year alone.

We follow the most secure IT collection and certified data destruction by employing the most reputable tools such as Blancco and Securaze. Our data destruction facilities meet the highest standards set by ISO 27001 and Cyber Essential. We provide data destruction certificates issued by these most secure data erasure methods.

We are committed to a cleaner and greener Britain by adopting excellent standards set by the Environment Agency and ISO 14001. We are humbled to be the shareholder of “Ripple Africa”, a project of planting trees in Malawi. We are also proud to claim that we are currently maintaining the target of a 0% landfill policy for the last 2 years.

Name: Re Place
Description:
Re Place is a community-led textile recovery hub redefining how Australians think about clothing. Based in Sydney’s Inner West, we work across three levels — grassroots, consumer, and policy — to tackle fashion waste and create real, local impact.

We make it easy and affordable for people to do the right thing with their clothes. Every item that comes through our doors is carefully sorted, weighed, tracked and sent into the most sustainable pathway — reuse, repurposing, repair or ethical recycling. And nothing goes to landfill.

We’re proud to operate from the Inner West Sustainability Hub in Summer Hill, alongside changemakers like The Bower, Green Living Centre and Dress for Success. Together, we form a vibrant local ecosystem where sustainability, education and community action go hand in hand.

At Re Place, the circular economy isn’t a concept — it’s our daily practice. Whether we’re reselling quality secondhand garments, giving new life to damaged items through creative reuse, or partnering with local makers and recyclers like Upparel, everything we do is grounded in keeping materials in circulation.

We also believe change begins with knowledge. That’s why we’re committed to education, empowerment and hands-on learning — helping people rethink their habits, understand the impact of overconsumption, and take practical steps toward a more sustainable future.

And importantly, we back our work with data. We track every single item by type, weight and brand — building a unique dataset that shines a light on the fast fashion crisis and strengthens our calls for industry reform.

This is about more than just clothes.
It’s about shifting systems, together.

Name: SKS Store - Ons duurzaam kringloopcentrum
Description:
Al sinds 1973 is SKS Store een begrip in Soest en Soesterberg. Met ons inmiddels 50-jarig bestaan zijn wij één van de oudste kringloopbedrijven van Nederland. Door de inzet van 22 beroepskrachten en ruim 40 vrijwilligers, staat aan De Schans een prachtig kringloopcentrum. Hier zijn we trots op!

Het uitbreiden van vaardigheden en mogelijkheden betekent dat medewerkers beter zijn toegerust voor hun taken. Dit komt de kwaliteit van het werk ten goede, is goed voor het zelfvertrouwen en vergroot bovendien de kansen op de arbeidsmarkt.

Wij zijn daarnaast een erkend leerbedrijf van Kennis Centrum Handel en bieden een aantal stageplaatsen aan voor leerlingen uit het (v)mbo onderwijs. Zij krijgen bij ons deskundige begeleiding tijdens hun stageperiode door de bedrijfsleider en hoofd winkel.

SKS Store is van oorsprong een sociaal bedrijf dat kansen wil creëren voor mensen met een afstand tot de arbeidsmarkt. Dat doen wij door middel van het scheppen van werkgelegenheid (kringloopbedrijvigheid), het aanbieden van stages, werkervaringsplaatsen, reactiveringsplaatsen, werk voor taakgestraften en dagbesteding.

In 2017 en 2018 hebben wij 2 nieuwe banen weten in te vullen met langdurig werklozen/afstand tot de arbeidsmarkt. In 2018 hebben wij 25 werkervaringskandidaten geplaatst, waarvan er één succesvol is uitgestroomd naar een nieuwe baan. Voor drie kandidaten hebben wij een nieuwe baan gecreëerd; zij zijn bij ons in dienst getreden.  Momenteel bieden wij aan 19 medewerkers een vast dienstverband. Er werken tussen de 80-90 vrijwilligers bij SKS Store.

Verder bieden wij vrijwilligerswerk ten behoeve van het behouden van arbeidsritme, activering en behoud uitkering. Wij bieden ook arbeid aan voor dagbesteding en taakgestraften. Wij streven ernaar dit in 2019 verder uit te breiden.

Wij werken nauw samen met o.a. Afdeling Werk & Inkomen van de Gemeente Soest, Amerpoort, Reclassering Nederland en Stichting Balans.

Nous sommes LES 9 VIES DU CHAT, une association pour promouvoir le réemploi, la réutilisation, la solidarité, chez nous, sur le  territoire de Retz en Valois (à 1h au nord-est de Paris).

Nous concevons un lieu inclusif, au service des habitants, pour donner une nouvelle vie professionnelle à nos salariés, qui donneront à leur tour une nouvelle vie à nos objets du quotidien !

2025 fut consacrée à l'étude de faisabilité. En 2026 commence la phase expérimentale.

Name: ByStroemsholt
Description:
Velkommen til OUReuse - Din partner i secondhand handel! 

Om Os:
Vi gør det nemt for vores kunder at sælge gode brugte varer, uden besvær. Hos OUReuse tager vi os af alt - fra fotografering, håndtering, prissætning, forsendelse, kundekontakt og meget mere. Vores mission er at forenkle og optimere secondhand-oplevelser online, så  de kunder som er trætte af selv at stå for deres salg kan fokusere på det ting betyder mere i deres hverdag.

Hvad Gør Vi:
 Fotografi: Vi fanger dine varers skønhed fra enhver vinkel og sørger for, at de præsenteres på deres bedste måde.
 Håndtering: Vi håndterer alt fra beskrivelser til emballering, sikrer, at dine varer ankommer sikkert til deres nye ejere.
 Prissætning: Vi anvender vores ekspertise til at fastsætte den mest konkurrencedygtige pris, der giver dig den bedste fortjeneste.
 Forsendelse: Vi tager os af forsendelsesprocessen, så du ikke behøver at bekymre dig om logistikken.
 Kundekontakt: Vi sørger for professionel og venlig kommunikation med købere, der skaber tillid og positiv feedback.

Hvorfor Vælge Os:
 Bekvemmelighed: Spar tid og besvær ved at lade os tage over.
 Synlighed: Ved at arbejde sammen med os øger du synligheden af dine varer da vi stræber efter at nå ud i hele Danmark.
 Fortjeneste: Vi arbejder hårdt for at maksimere din indtjening og minimere dine bekymringer.

Sæt fart på din secondhand-salg med OUReuse. Lad os hjælpe dig med at få det bedste ud af dine brugte varer og opnå de resultater, du fortjener.

Kontakt os i dag for at komme i gang! 

OUReuse

Name: Social Recycling vd Berg
Description: Consumenten worden vaak omringd door middelen die ooit betekenis of geluk boden, maar die deze subjectieve waarde in de loop van de tijd hebben verloren - ook al behouden ze hun objectieve nut. We onderzoeken het potentieel voor sociale recycling - het weggooien van gebruikte goederen door andere consumenten ze gratis te laten aanschaffen - om ongebruikte fysieke hulpbronnen om te zetten in meer consumentengeluk. Zes onderzoeken suggereren dat sociale recycling het positieve effect vergroot ten opzichte van afval, recycling en donaties van goederen aan non-profitorganisaties. Zowel percepties van het helpen van het milieu als het helpen van andere mensen zorgen voor deze toename van positief affect.
Location: Krimpen aan de Lek, Zuid holland

Nos engagements clés :

 Qualité certifiée : chaque appareil est testé, réinitialisé et prêt à l’usage.

Nous sommes fiers d’accompagner chaque jour nos clients dans leur transition vers une technologie plus responsable, alliant performance, durabilité et économies.

Name: GREENVEST AFRICA
Description:
Greenvest Africa is an innovative recycling marketplace committed to creating a cleaner, safer, and more sustainable environment in Nigeria and across Africa. Founded in 2024, we are building a technology-driven platform that connects individuals, communities, and businesses to recycling opportunities turning waste into value.

Our model incentivizes users through a points-to-cash rewards system, encourages responsible waste disposal, and establishes nationwide collection hubs for plastics and other recyclables. We partner with recycling plants to convert collected waste into reusable, market-ready products, driving both environmental impact and economic empowerment.

At Greenvest Africa, we are not just tackling waste management we are designing a circular economy ecosystem that educates, rewards, and sustains itself. Our vision is to make recycling a lifestyle, reduce pollution, and contribute to climate resilience across the continent.

Focus Areas:
 Recycling Marketplace Technology
 Circular Economy Solutions
 Community Education & Awareness
 Waste-to-Value Innovation
 Climate & Environmental Sustainability

Name: GREENPACT AFRICA
Description:
Greenpact Africa represents the strategic evolution of Greenvest Africa. While our foundational commitment to a cleaner, safer, and more sustainable continent remains unwavering, our mission has expanded. We are moving beyond recycling to become a comprehensive catalyst for green innovation across Nigeria and Africa.

Our core focus is on developing and scaling technology-driven solutions that address the most pressing environmental challenges. We are building a platform that connects individuals, communities, and businesses with a new generation of sustainable practices, products, and services.

Our model is designed to:
Promote Circularity: Champion the principles of a circular economy by facilitating the reduction, reuse, and repurposing of materials.

Incentivize Green Action: Leverage technology to reward sustainable behavior, making it accessible and beneficial for all.

Foster Strategic Partnerships: Collaborate with innovators, businesses, and communities to implement impactful green solutions.

At Greenpact Africa, we are designing an ecosystem that educates, empowers, and sustains. Our vision: To build Africa’s leading integrated green technology platform transforming waste to value, powering communities with clean energy, and enabling low-carbon mobility for a sustainable, resilient future..

Focus Areas:
 Recycling Marketplace Technology
 Circular Economy Solutions in clean energy
 Community Education & Awareness
 Waste-to-Value Innovation
 Climate & Environmental Sustainability

Name: Dream Lucky Scrap Metal
Description:
Dream Lucky Scrap Metal in Bayswater, Western Australia, is your go-to place for scrap metal recycling and car removal. We've been in business for over 21 years, so we know our stuff when it comes to handling metal waste responsibly.

Our yard is easy to get to, even for big trucks. We're all about making things simple for you while also doing our bit for the environment.

Here's what we offer:
1. Scrap Metal Recycling
We'll take pretty much any metal off your hands - steel, copper, you name it. And we'll pay you good money for it too.
2. Car Removal
Got an old car you want to get rid of? We'll buy it from you on the spot and take it away. Doesn't matter if it's running or not.
3. Demolition Clean-Up
If you're knocking down a building, we'll come in and clear away all the metal waste. We'll make sure your site is clean and ready for whatever's next.
4. Scrap Metal Bins
Need to collect a fair bit of metal? We've got bins of different sizes that'll do the job nicely.

We're serious about looking after the environment. By recycling metal, we're keeping it out of landfills and that's good news for everyone.

Plus, we pay well for your scrap - some types of metal can get you up to $50 per kilo. Want to know more or need our services?

Give us a call at 0411 747 174 or check out our website. At Dream Lucky Scrap Metal, we're all about giving you great service, fair prices, and doing right by the environment.

Name: de kleine kringloop
Description:
Bij de kleine kringloop geloven we dat tweedehands kinderspullen – van kleding tot speelgoed en boeken – nét zo waardevol zijn als nieuwe spullen, misschien zelfs meer! Elk item vertelt een eigen verhaal, is met liefde en plezier uitgezocht, gegeven en gebruikt. En nu is het tijd voor een nieuwe eigenaar, voor nieuwe verhalen en herinneringen.

Ons ideaal is dat kinderen opgroeien in een wereld waar hergebruik en duurzaamheid de norm zijn. Waar producten meegroeien met behoeften en avonturen. Zo helpen we besparen, en creëren we samen een mooiere toekomst voor alle kinderen.

Door te kiezen voor hergebruik dragen we bij aan een duurzamere wereld, waarin we bewuster omgaan met wat we al hebben, krijgen en geven.

Name: ISC Recycle
Description:
ISC Recycle est une entreprise spécialisée dans l’achat, la rénovation, la vente et la remise en service d’équipements d’intralogistique d’occasion.
Nous accompagnons les entreprises – logisticiens, industriels, transporteurs, PME ou artisans – qui recherchent des solutions à la fois fiables, économiques et respectueuses de l’environnement.

Notre mission : donner une seconde vie aux matériels de manutention et de stockage, tout en garantissant performance, sécurité et durabilité.

Nos activités
. Achat et reprise de matériel
Nous rachetons vos équipements inutilisés, avec une expertise particulière sur :
Convoyeurs, trieurs et équipements connexes.
Notre objectif : vous libérer de vos installations tout en valorisant leur potentiel de réemploi.

. Reconditionnement et rénovation
Chaque équipement est soigneusement :
- Inspecté et remis en état
- Révisé mécaniquement et testé
- Ajusté si nécessaire pour garantir fiabilité et longévité

. Vente de matériel d’occasion reconditionné
Nous proposons une large gamme de solutions disponibles immédiatement, testées et garanties.
Chaque machine est prête à être intégrée directement dans vos installations.

. Démontage, transport et installation
Nous assurons :
- Le démontage sécurisé de vos installations existantes
- La logistique complète (emballage, chargement, transport)
- La réinstallation sur site du matériel reconditionné ou déplacé

Pourquoi choisir ISC Recycle ?
- Fiabilité : chaque équipement est certifié conforme après test
- Réactivité : stock disponible rapidement, partout en Europe
- Économie circulaire : prolongez la durée de vie de vos matériels
- Éco-responsabilité : réduisez vos déchets industriels

Description:
Plantehub - Alt liv har værdi

DECOPLANT har udviklet et cirkulært koncept til salg af secondhand planter ud fra et ønske om, at planter aldrig er affald. Plantehubben skal bidrage til at mindske ressourceforbrug og miljøbelastning samt inddrage lokalsamfundet og skabe muligheder for borgere med en svag tilknytning til arbejdsmarkedet.

Hvorfor hedder det "plantehub"?
Ordet "hub" er oprindeligt brugt til at beskrive en it-enhed, der fordeler og omformer data i et computernetværk. I dag bruges ordet i en bredere betydning og beskriver et samlingssted. Plantehubben er et samlingssted, hvor både mennesker og planter kan trives og udvikle sig.

Description:
"The technological boom has led to a fierce increase in the demand of electronic products in India. These electronic products; which were considered to be a luxury in the past, in present have become a burning need of almost every individual. In other words, they have become an integral part of our daily life cycle and have led to the generation of increasing amount of e-Waste in India. The e-Waste by nature is as hazardous as any other form of waste and hence requires equally important treatment"

...and this is where we at Nirvana Recycling come into the picture!!!

The promoters of Nirvana Recycling are one of the pioneers of e-Waste Recycling in India. Nirvana Recycling was founded in the year 2016, to safeguard the Indian environment from the atrocities of the precarious e-Waste.

Nirvana Recycling specialises in eco-friendly solutions for material recycling and metal recovery through its state-of-the-art e-waste recycling plant. Recycling by Nirvana Recycling includes recycling of old, obsolete and unwanted electronics that lacks any re-use potential and are considered to be worthy of being disposed of.

At Nirvana Recycling, our aim is to preserve India’s natural resources by using its own unwanted resource… and hence save the Precious Metals. Our source of e-Wastes include- outdated IT & Telecom Equipments, Domestic Appliances, FMCA, Sport & other Utility Gadgets, Medical & Monitoring Devices and many more.

Name: Mack and Rose
Description:
Mack and Rose is a sustainable custom and wholesale embroidery business founded in 2014 by Katy Rose Christopher. We provide merchandise, clothing repairs and customisation using embroidery.

Located in a studio 10 minutes from Glasgow Central Station we provide our services to clients all over Scotland and the UK.

Mack and Rose was founded to provide sustainable alternatives to fast fashion. We started out by creating and selling our own embroidery designs on to vintage and second-hand clothing as well as offering repairs and customisations to our customers. Not long after we started embroidering our own designs we started working with other small businesses, musicians and creatives to embroider their designs. We quickly realised that working with other people was more fun than working alone. Our focus became creating custom and wholesale products for our customers.

Today we have established ourselves as Glasgow’s leading specialist in
embroidery.

All our products are ethically and sustainably sourced and we don’t compromise on the quality of our products. We encourage our clients to use vintage garments but if preloved clothing isn't your thing we can also provide you with garments using organic cotton or recycled polyester through one of our eco-friendly suppliers.

Alternatively, we also recycle old stock (deadstock merchandise) or you can provide your own garments for embroidery.

We offer one-to-one design development to make sure that your vision is brought to life exactly as you imagine it.

Please feel free to contact us if you have any questions.

We would love to hear from you!

Name: Goodbuy
Description:
Welcome to Goodbuy - where your wallet and the planet high-five! 

We're not your average thrift trove; we're the Robin Hood of retail, making it ridiculously easy and cool to save the planet, one pre-loved treasure at a time. Think of us as the fairy godmother of your budget and eco-warrior dreams, turning 'once-loved' into 'love-again' faster than you can say "reuse-revolution"!

1. Circular Chic-ness: Dive into an ocean of options where products get more lives than a cat - all without the hocus-pocus of re-manufacturing. From last-season's "it" bags to gadgets that still got groove, everything here has a flair for reincarnation!

2. Simplicity is our Middle Name: We're making eco-friendly the new easy-peasy. Forget the bin, we've got a win-win solution where scoring deals is as simple as a swipe. Welcome to the guilt-free side of shopping, where every buy is a high-five to Mother Nature!

3. Frugal can be Fabulous: Who says saving the planet has to cost the earth? Not us! Live that green dream without giving your wallet nightmares. We're here to prove that sustainable living is not just smart, it's wallet-friendly fabulousness.

4. Pre-loved, Re-loved: Say goodbye to the 'ew' in used! We're scrubbing away the stigma around pre-owned goodies. Our treasure trove is proof that what's had a past can have a chic, shiny future. So, why buy new when you can make both eco and economical sense?

So come on in, bring your sense of humor, and let's make saving the planet the coolest thing since sliced bread. After all, it's not just shopping, it's a movement - and we're pretty sure it's the most fun you'll ever have saving the world!

Name: Terraole
Description:
Terraole - From Bharat’s Soil to Your Soul—this is our responsibility, our promise. 

At Terraole, we’re not just making clothes—we’re redefining sustainability with every stitch. We believe fashion should be as kind to the planet as it is to you, and that’s why we craft high-performance activewear using bamboo, sorona, hemp, and organic cotton. It’s not just fabric; it’s a statement—one that blends comfort, durability, and eco-consciousness into your everyday wear.

 Why We Exist?
Because the world doesn’t need more waste—it needs solutions. We’re here to disrupt fast fashion, turn waste into worth, and make sustainability the new normal.

 How We Keep It Circular?
 Wear. Recycle. Repeat. – Send back your worn-out gear, and we’ll upcycle, recycle, or repurpose it—zero guilt, zero waste!
 Buyback & Resale Program – Why dump when you can earn and give back? Let’s keep fashion in motion.
 One Tree Per Purchase – Because looking good shouldn’t mean harming the planet. Every order helps us plant a greener tomorrow.

 Join the Movement!
We’re not just building a brand—we’re building a community. A diverse, passionate, and purpose-driven team working towards a greener, better tomorrow. If you believe in sustainability, innovation, and making an impact, we’d love to have you on board! Let’s create, collaborate, and revolutionize fashion together.

Depuis notre création en 2021, nous nous engageons à offrir à chaque jouet, jeu ou livre une seconde chance, tout en garantissant des produits de qualité, respectueux de l’environnement et accessibles à tous les budgets. Notre démarche s’inscrit dans une approche écoresponsable, valorisant la consommation durable. Ainsi, chaque article possède une histoire unique, et en choisissant de leur offrir une seconde vie, vous contribuez avec nous à réduire les déchets et à préserver les ressources naturelles.

Notre boutique à Cherbourg se veut un espace chaleureux et accueillant, où les familles peuvent découvrir des trésors rares et des pièces uniques souvent introuvables ailleurs. Que vous soyez à la recherche d’un livre passionnant, d’un jouet vintage ou d’un jeu éducatif, chaque visite promet des découvertes enrichissantes et amusantes.

Pour vous simplifier la vie, notre boutique est également disponible en ligne, vous permettant de parcourir et d’acheter nos produits à distance. Notre équipe est toujours prête à vous conseiller et vous guider, afin de vous aider à trouver l’article parfait pour vos enfants, tout en soutenant une consommation éthique et responsable.

Name: Liberty Recycling Solutions
Description:
Liberty offers a global solution to lithium-ion battery recycling. We can safely and sustainably recycle many types of products from vapes, phones, drill batteries and electric vehicle (EV) batteries. We have a global presence and are fully compliant with all relevant legislation.

At Liberty we have developed innovative environmentally friendly lithium-ion and plastic recycling technology. We have solved how to recycle vapes, phones, drill batteries and EV batteries in an automated, safe and cost effective method. With our technology partner ERMAFA, we’ve built the machines, tested them and now have recycling sites in the UK and Europe.

We have dared to develop and then invest in the first automated, inert environment recycling solution to the global recycling timebomb of lithium-ion products.

Most of the UK vape “recycling” schemes we have encountered involve a Third World like manual process whereby the vape is cut with a pair of garden shears, exposing the hazardous liquids to atmosphere, (and the individual doing the cutting), the dangerous battery containing charge and electrolytes is then extracted and exported. Everything bar the battery is incinerated.

We believe that recycling should be about recovering materials, and also that the processes should be safe for the operators and environment. Inside a vape or EV battery there are valuable materials to be recovered such as aluminium, plastic, silicone, copper, black mass and cables. So at LRS we found a solution to this problem that is scalable, safe and kinder to the environment. In short we go beyond collection.

Name: CircuFoam
Description:
At CircuFoam, we transform post-consumer polyurethane waste into high-quality raw materials for new foam production. Using proprietary chemical recycling technology, we recover polyol from discarded mattresses - enabling true circularity within the polyurethane value chain.

 Why we exist
Every year, millions of mattresses end up in landfills or incinerators. We believe this waste has value. By converting it into RePoliol and Rebond foam, we help reduce the demand for virgin fossil-based resources and offer manufacturers a circular alternative that performs.

 What we offer
Our recycled polyol is industrial-grade, batch-tested, and designed to meet the technical demands of flexible foam production - for use in mattresses, furniture, automotive, and more. It seamlessly integrates into existing production lines and is backed by ISO-certified quality control.

 How we do it
We are part of RetourMatras Group, Europe’s leading mattress recycling company. Our supply chain is vertically integrated: from mattress collection and dismantling to foam separation and chemical recovery. All under one roof.

 Who we work with
We collaborate with foam producers, furniture brands, mattress manufacturers and forward-thinking procurement teams looking to improve sustainability without compromising on performance.

 Where we’re based
Our operations are based in the Netherlands, with local presence across Europe through the RetourMatras Group network.

—

Ready to make your foam more circular?
Contact us or visit www.circufoam.com for more information.

Name: NuSource
Description:
NuSource wasn’t made to sell secondhand. It was made for the people who do it best.

In secondhand, store owners are often left behind, buried in bulk lots, stuck with inconsistent quality, and squeezed by pricing games that kill margins. We’ve been there. So we built something better.

NuSource is the sourcing platform that puts store owners first. Every item is hand-picked, scanned, sorted, and transparently priced, so you get the inventory you want, minus the guesswork. Trending brands. Luxury surprises. Orders you can trust. Backed by real support from people who’ve been in your shoes.

And it works because of how we source. We partner directly with brands, distributors, and retailers to transform their excess inventory into high-value resale opportunities, rather than liquidation. Our sales channel segmentation protects brand equity, ensuring that products reach the right audience at the right price while maintaining brand integrity.

 What makes us different:
 • Brand-sorted inventory with real resale value.
 • Transparent, per-unit pricing. No scales. No games.
 • Custom order options tailored to your store.
 • Hands-on support from resale pros, not call centers.


Behind NuSource is Jessica Rennard, a former reseller, Plato’s Closet buyer, and merchandising lead at Helpsy Source. After years inside the system, she saw its flaws firsthand and set out to build something better. In late 2024, she teamed up with investor David Lukrich of Angel Rush Ventures. Both believed the future of resale depends on empowering the people closest to it: The store owners. That shared vision led to the launch of NuSource as an independent company with a clear focus, making sourcing work for store owners and the partners who supply them.

Early users already see the shift:
  “We’re finally getting trending inventory that moves.”
  “NuSource listens. We’ve never had sourcing support like this.”

Coming Summer 2025 → nusource.io

Encourage the sale of lower-priced items within communities, promoting re-use and recycling, and keeping items out of landfill. 

 Fundraising: GarageSaleIt is a brilliant tool for schools , sports clubs , church groups , etc., to raise funds. Simply request donations of pre-loved items from your community members, and transform them into cash for a good cause. Plus, it's a fantastic way to teach our younger generation about the importance of reducing, reusing, and recycling.

The beauty of GarageSaleIt lies in decentralizing online shopping to local markets - ensuring money raised locally stays local while fostering the principles of reducing, reusing, and recycling. 

So join us in this exciting journey towards creating a more sustainable future and changing the way we buy and sell second-hand goods. Let's GarageSaleIt!

Name: The Nest Community
Description:
The Nest Community is a registered charity the promotes sustainable living practices, hand making skills and skill sharing. Our social enterprise, The Nest Haberdashery, is based on circular economy principles and is a retail outlet for reclaimed textile resources that supports Brisbane's maker community.

Our volunteer program is the backbone of our social enterprise and it attracts talented women, many of whom are experienced makers and are invested in the value of the resources we are reclaiming. Through the program the women develop social connections, have opportunities to be part of a team or take on leadership roles.

The Exchange Project, is our free mentoring program that teaches hand making skills to vulnerable teenage girls. Partnering with local high schools, students are matched with our more mature volunteers who share their skills to teach the young girls resilience and self confidence.

The Exchange Project is hosted in our workshop space, Gladys Mary Studio where we house our heritage collection of craft and sewing ephemera. We also use the space to run our workshop program where we support local makers to run craft workshops and start their own small business.

Our vision is to foster intergenerational connections by creating a resilient community of women and provide opportunities for them to connect purposefully through craft.

Name: Holy Swap!
Description:
We help people to maximize the use phase of products, thereby minimize the impact of their consumption on the planet. The goal is to prevent as much as unnecessary new production and waste as possible.  

We’re on a mission to inspire people to stop craving new and more, seek closer and celebrate life with what’s already there. 

To achieve this mission, we came up with an alternative circular form of consumption (swapping), which allows us to continue to experience the thrill of replacing our stuff, but with minimal impact on the planet and our wallets.

We apply this consumption form to our platform, the holy grail among marketplaces. Circular, fun and hybrid. Which means you can connect with like-minded individuals, offline at swap events, and soon online in an app too. Whichever way you enter, you will enter an environment where swapping used stuff is made simple, affordable, and ridiculously exciting!

Sign up for the newsletter on our website to get priority on event tickets and be the first to know when they launch our app.

Name: Adam Hewitt Limited
Description:
We were established in 1946 after World War II when my father opened a body repair business called John Hewitt Garages, and we now have over 70 years experience in the Motor and Agricultural Salvage Industry.

Michael and Adam joined the business in the 1970’s and the business expanded into the salvage management arena and became a limited company – John Hewitt and Sons Garages Ltd. By 1985 the sale of Motor Salvage had become the main focus of the business.

Over the next quarter of a century Hewitt International Salvage moved five times culminating in a 50 acre site in Wombourne, Staffordshire handling around 30,000 salvage units a year for many major insurers.


In April 2017 we are very proud and honored to re-establish our working relationship with NFU Mutual for the disposal of all Farm, Plant and Machinery salvage collected throughout the UK.

Name: conSHINEment
Description:
Welcome to conSHINEment, the largest and ultimate destination for fashion-forward individuals in Jersey City who are passionate about sustainable fashion. As a leading retail fashion consignment store, we are dedicated to offering our customers a carefully curated collection of high-quality, pre-owned fashion at unbeatable prices.

At conSHINEment, we believe that fashion should be both accessible and sustainable. That's why we offer a unique shopping experience that is both eco-friendly and affordable. Our knowledgeable and friendly staff are always on hand to help you find the perfect piece for any occasion, and our expert buyers are constantly on the lookout for the latest trends and timeless classics to add to our collection.

We take pride in our commitment to sustainability, and by giving pre-loved fashion a second life, we are doing our part to reduce waste and promote responsible consumption. Our extensive collection includes a mix of designer labels, vintage finds, and modern styles, ensuring that there's something for everyone.

Whether you're looking to update your wardrobe, find a one-of-a-kind vintage piece, or sell your gently used items, conSHINEment is the perfect place to do it. As the largest consignment store in Jersey City, we offer competitive prices for your pre-owned fashion and pay you on the spot, so you can feel good about giving your fashion a second life.

Thank you for choosing conSHINEment for all your fashion needs. Our team is dedicated to providing you with the best possible experience, and we can't wait to help you find your next favorite piece!

Name: LET
Description: At LET, we’ve transformed the game on and off the court. Founded by two Boston University doubles partners, we collect old tennis strings and repurpose them into polyester yarn for clothing manufacturing. By closing the loop between the end of tennis string life cycles and the beginning of polyester clothing production, we prevent trillions of microplastics from polluting our water sources daily and cut CO2 emissions from polyester manufacturing by 70%. LET isn’t just recycling—it’s reimagining sustainability.

Name: Antropia
Description:
Antropia, une montagne de ressources
Recyclerie Tiers Lieu 

 Une recyclerie-Tiers Lieu
Antropia a ouvert ses portes en avril 2023 en Savoie, dans le centre-ville d’Aime La Plagne. Ce nouveau modèle économique est né de l’envie de s’engager pour une transition.  
5  5 piliers font les valeurs d’Antropia: l’écologie, l’économie sociale et solidaire, l’ouverture culturelle,
l’apprentissage du faire soi-même et le numérique responsable. 
Chaque activité portée ou accueillie par le tiers-lieu répond à ces principes : respect de l’environnement, convivialité, créativité, réemploi et partage. 
 Que trouve-t-on chez Antropia ? 
 Un espace recyclerie avec vente : meubles, décoration, vaisselle, jouet, article de sport, outillage, bijoux, coupon de tissu… Ainsi que des livres sélectionnés par la Librai’Bulles, des vêtements hommes-femme et enfants avec l’Atelier 815 et des vêtements outdoor upcyclés par One Tree At a Time.
  Un troquet (bar, table, terrasse), softs, bières et vins locaux, sans oublier les gourmandises sucrées de Maison Rhubarbe. Afterwork les vendredis. 
 La Cantine d’Antropia : Tous les midis Laurie propose 2 menus (carné et végétarien) avec des produits locaux et majoritairement bio, à prix solidaire ou engagé. Les vendredis planches pour les afterworks et brunch certains samedis.
 Une salle modulable, Lokita, à louer pour des formations, réunions, ateliers…
 L’Allée des Arts un lieu d’exposition dédié aux artistes plasticiens du territoire, gérée par l’association Edel’Art
Un atelier, Céramosa, où se déroulent des initiations à la mosaïque et des ateliers de céramique (tour et modelage) gérés par Edel’Art. 
 Une Micro-Folie, un musée numérique en accès libre. 
 Une super programmation tout au long de l’année : scène ouverte, yoga du rire, ateliers DIY… à retrouver sur notre site et les réseaux.
Mais aussi : un cordonnier et un menuisier .

Name: HUMANA People to People Austria
Description:
Über HUMANA People to People - Verein für Entwicklungszusammenarbeit

HUMANA Österreich wurde 1986 als Verein für Entwicklungszusammenarbeit gegründet, um Menschen im Globalen Süden zu unterstützen. Die Vision von HUMANA Österreich ist es, mit Hilfe von geschlossenen Kleiderkreisläufen die Entwicklung von Menschen weltweit und die Erhaltung der Umwelt zu fördern. Jährlich werden in etwa 8.000 Tonnen an Kleidung und Schuhen über HUMANA-Kleidercontainer in Österreich gespendet. Mit den Mitteln aus den Kleiderspenden unterstützt HUMANA Österreich gemeinnützige Projekte im südlichen Afrika und Indien in den Bereichen Bildung, Gesundheit, Dorfentwicklung und und nachhaltige Landwirtschaft. Mittlerweile betreibt das Social Enterprise 22 Second Hand Filialen in Wien, Salzburg und Graz.

Name: KAMILOU
Description:
Notre concept est simple racheter des vêtements d'occasion en lot, se déplacer les récupérer pour limiter les frais, chiner à droite à gauche, accepter les dons.
Puis ensuite ma mission consiste :
-	Trier les vêtements sur leur qualité, la taille et leur marque
-	Les nettoyer, les désinfecter, les repasser
-	Les arranger si besoin un bouton à recoudre, un petit accroc, un fils qui dépasse
-	 Les remettre dans le circuit de la vente de seconde main 

Tâches, troués, trop abîmés ?
Tout d’abord, le vêtement sera mis en vente en l’état, avec une description très précise et des photos à un tarif attractif. Et si malgré mes efforts sur la mise en valeur du produit , il ne se vendait pas , Kamilou tentera de lui donner une seconde vie avec nos créatrices en le transformant en un autre vêtement, un sac, un jouet, une lingette, les possibilités sont multiples. Et nos créatrices sont là pour ramener leur fraicheur, leur imagination pour rendre à ce tissu une vie encore plus belle que la première.
Quand on c’est qu’entre 10.000 et 20.000 tonnes de produits textiles sont jetés chaque année en France  POUR MOI IL ETAIT EVIDENT QU’IL FALLAIT FAIRE QUELQUE CHOSE
On estime en effet que 85 % des vêtements finissent à la poubelle et qu'en moyenne, un Français jette 12 kg de vêtements, de chaussures et de linge de maison chaque année !
Alors maintenant que vous le savez, avant de jeter contactez Kamilou.

Name: Recoll Europe bv
Description:
Recoll has been collecting empty inkjet and toner cartridges for 25 years and facilitates the empty cartridge return program for retailers and dealers throughout Europe. With this program we want to prevent that empty cartridges end up in a garbage dump, in a shredder or in an incinerator. Usable empty inkjet and toner cartridges can be reused 2 to 3 times. Every reused cartridge means that one has to produce less. In this way we save raw materials, energy and waste.
We make it as easy as possible for our collection partners by offering good service and logistical solutions.
Together we work towards a more sustainable world!
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Recoll  zamelt al 25 jaar lege inkjet- en tonercartridges in en faciliteert het lege cartridge retourprogramma voor retailers en dealers in heel Europa. Door middel van dit programma willen we voorkomen dat lege cartridges op een vuilnisbelt, in een shredder of in een verbrandingsoven belanden. Bruikbare lege inkjet- en tonercartridges kunnen wel 2 à 3 keer hergebruikt worden. Iedere opnieuw gebruikte cartridge betekent dat er eentje minder geproduceerd hoeft te worden. Zo besparen we grondstoffen, energie en afval.
We maken het onze inzamelpartners zo makkelijk mogelijk door het bieden van een goede service en logistieke oplossingen.
Samen werken we aan een duurzamere wereld!

Name: Georgetown REUSE
Description:
A group of Georgetown students founded Georgetown REUSE in 2022 to reduce waste and increase access to affordable clothes, school supplies, and dorm materials in their community. During their first semester on campus after the 2020/2021 virtual school year, they observed the excess consumption of new clothes and dorm items which led to an overwhelming quantity of unnecessary waste. Recognizing the problem, they envisioned creating a space where dorm materials, school supplies, and clothing could be diverted from the dumpsters and repurposed for students to buy at an extremely reduced price. To test their vision, throughout 2021 and 2022, they developed a series of pilot projects including hosting clothing swaps and launching re-used clothing racks in campus coffee shops. In the Spring of 2022, the founders won a Greens Commons grant which they used to host their first large-scale pop-up at the start of the Fall 2022 semester where they sold donated pre-loved dorm materials, clothing, and school supplies that they collected during the Spring 2022 move-out. 
In an attempt to formalize their operations and expand their projects, the 7 students became incorporated in the Fall of 2022. Since the founders first developed the idea for Georgetown REUSE, the team has worked through various local projects and partnerships and has continued to increase accessibility, reduce waste, and promote a circular system of consumption in the Georgetown community.

Name: 2USE

This secure, online platform is being designed specifically for students and will enable the buying and selling of used goods to reduce waste, educate on and contribute to a circular economy campus.

Our vision is to improve the lives of students globally, providing the top platform for creating a circular economy campus.

Name: iPull-uPull Auto Parts
Description:
iPull-uPull Auto Parts’ owners, management and crew consist of some of the top auto recycler industry leaders around, who possess a fresh new vision for salvage auto parts and vehicle scrapyards. The days of going to a typical junkyard are a thing of the past.  When you step into iPull-uPull Auto Parts, you will journey into a top-of-the-line, self-service auto parts location with hundreds and hundreds of fresh Cars, Trucks, Vans and SUVs to pull auto parts from.  

Fresh vehicle inventory is set daily at each of our locations giving our customers access to quality, O.E.M. auto parts, at very affordable prices.  Our auto parts are backed by a Free 60 Cash Back Guarantee giving our customers peace of mind knowing we have their back.  

Each of our locations also have a large selection of low-cost salvage title vehicles for sale.  This “Builder” inventory changes daily and no reasonable offers will be refused.  Just another way we are able to do our part in responsibly recycling and repurposing vehicles.  All the while helping to protect our environment. One vehicle at a time.  

If you lack the knowledge, tools or time needed to pull an auto part off one of our vehicles, don’t worry!  We are proud to offer Full-Service Part Removal for those customers who need a little help completing their projects.

But the absolute most important aspect of our business is buying cars from the local community.  To keep an ever-changing flow of vehicle inventory in our yards, we buy vehicles from the public and pay you in CASH for all unwanted, old, wrecked and junk, Cars, Trucks, Vans & SUVs.  Whether they run or not!  We can tow them if needed.  

Stop by and visit a location near you today and let our team help you keep your car on the road longer, with quality auto parts for less.  iPull-uPull Auto Parts, A Better Way To Buy Auto Parts, Guaranteed!

Name: Recupwood
Description:
Herwerkt hout doen herleven. Een nieuwe thuis geven, dat is waar wij bij Recupwood voor leven. Handgeselecteerde topkwaliteit van de bovenste plank. Wij vinden het beste hout voor jou. Dat kan je dan tot een uniek stuk vakmanschap vervaardigen. Dat helemaal persoonlijk bij je past. Zo maakten onze klanten al prachtige tuinmeubelen, fietsstallingen en interieur elementen. Allemaal uit recuperatiehout. Met respect voor materiaal structuur en moeder natuur. De mogelijkheden zijn werkelijk oneindig.

- Herontdek hoe onze oude perfecte planken je inspireren tot gevelbekledingen in hedendaagse vorm.

- Proef de zilte smaak van zeehavenpalletten in het interieur dat je zelf met eigen hand hebt vormgegeven.

- Hernieuw je interieur of (gevel)bekleding met planken van houten kisten, houten verpakkingsmateriaal of ander houtafval stromen.

Hoe doen we dat? Door afvalstromen tot prachtige ruwe herbruikbare planken te schrijnwerken. Volgende stap? Die is aan jou. Want jij weet het best hoe dat uniek stuk natuur tot haar recht komt in je wanden, plafonds, gevel, terras en of meubelelementen. Bij ons zit je dus helemaal goed.

Name: Reciclajes Lugon
Description:
Reciclajes Lugon es un referente nacional e internacional en materia de economía circular y sostenibilidad. Nuestra acción se centra  en reutilizar materiales industriales, eléctricos y de automatización susceptibles de ser desechados. Excedentes nuevos y de segunda mano; sistemas antiguos y los más modernos del mercado, todos ellos forman parte de nuestro ecosistema. España, Reino Unido, Alemania, Suecia y EE.UU son solo algunos de los muchos países en los que ya hemos comenzado a trabajar.

Desde el año 2022 nos ocupamos de dar una segunda vida útil a infinidad de materiales, componentes y equipos de automatización que se retiran de instalaciones en los que ya no son necesarios. De esta forma conseguimos reducir las emisiones, aprovechando los equipos ya creados durante un mayor periodo de tiempo y evitando que sean desperdiciados.

En Reciclajes Lugon somos un equipo joven, emprendedor y con ganas de apostar por la sostenibilidad y el medioambiente. Sabemos que reutilizar es posible, solamente es necesario tener los conocimientos adecuados, ofrecer un servicio óptimo y transmitirle a la sociedad que nuestra opción es una apuesta segura. 

Opta por la economía circular!

Name: Strade
Description:
Strade is a technology-driven impact venture that turns textile waste into high-performance insulation and sustainable packaging solutions. Our product development centers on circularity, human health, and climate impact — not just “less harm” but measurable environmental and social benefit.

How we create impact:

Circular production: We transform post-consumer and post-industrial textiles into new, durable materials that close the loop and reduce virgin resource demand.

Health-first formulations: Products are free from harmful additives and designed to protect indoor air quality and occupant health.

Proven performance: Engineered for thermal insulation, acoustic absorption, fire performance and easy installation to meet building and industrial standards.

Low carbon footprint: We optimize materials, manufacturing and logistics to minimize lifecycle emissions and support corporate decarbonization targets.

Scalable & practical: Solutions built for fast integration in B2B and B2G projects, from pilot deployments to full rollouts.

Who we serve: sustainable construction projects, public infrastructure, manufacturers seeking circular packaging, and companies aiming to reduce scope-3 emissions and improve ESG reporting.

Why Strade: we combine technical performance with genuine environmental impact — delivering sustainable alternatives that don’t compromise on safety, functionality or cost-effectiveness.

Name: Kosovo Glass Recycling
Description:
Kosovo Glass Recycling originally started as a neighborhood initiative in the Municipality of Gjakova. We saw that the glass waste was the only thing that was not being recycled in Kosovo. While cleaning in the neighborhood, the idea came up to collect this material and recycle it.
After collecting a considerable amount of glass in our neighborhood, we saw the opportunity. The interest of the citizens and the media was very high, as there was no company in Kosovo that dealt with the collection and processing of glass.

To ensure the continuity and sustainability of the project, we have 2019 decided to start a company and continue to deal with glass waste. Since then we employ six people and cooperate with numerous businesses in Gjakova and Prishtina. To the date, Kosovo Glass Recycling has managed to recycle and upcycle over 500 tones of glass waste by using it for different purposes.
Some of our products include: terazzo tiles, glass cullet, pool filtration glass media, interior and exterior elements, artisan handmade products.

Name: Pasaly

For Buyers: We offer affordable access to curated, pre-loved pieces from beloved brands. No endless scrolling, no surprises—just timeless fashion with a story.

For Sellers: We handle the entire resale process—from pick-up to payout—so you can clear your closet with zero effort.

For Brands: We create co-branded resale channels that help fashion houses unlock new revenue, strengthen sustainability credentials, and deepen customer loyalty.

At Pasaly, we believe that fashion doesn’t need to be fast to feel fresh—and that circular style should be effortless, beautiful, and accessible.

Curated. Accessible. Trusted.

Description: Greenway Auto Recycling is a Toronto and GTA-based used cars and scrap cars, junk cars buyer. We are a family-owned business. We are also equipped with low-profile tow trucks that are capable of removing cars from the basement and low underground areas. We promise unbeatable prices for all your scrap cars.

Name: Pishgaman Entekhab Sabz (PES company)
Description:
انتخاب سبز بهعنوان یکی از پیشگامان بازیافت در صنعت لوازم خانگی ایران، گام در مسیر جدیدی گذاشته است. ما در اینجا با هدف تبدیل مدل اقتصاد خطی به چرخشی، در تلاش برای ایجاد یک چرخه پایدار هستیم تا به حفظ محیط زیستمان متعهد بمانیم.
هر لوازم خانگی که دیگر کارایی ندارد، میتواند فرصتی برای خلق ارزش باشد. 
در انتخاب سبز، به لوازم خانگی فرسوده نه به چشم زباله، بلکه بهعنوان کالایی قابل استفاده و ارزشمند نگاه میکنیم. ما این محصولات را جمعآوری کرده، بازیافت میکنیم و آنها را دوباره به چرخه صنعت باز میگردانیم.
در انتخاب سبز با استفاده از روشهای نوآورانه و با هدف جلوگیری از هدررفت منابع مالی، فرصتی برای ایجاد مشاغل جدید نیز فراهم میآوریم. البته این مسیر آسانی نیست، اما با همکاری و مشارکت همه افراد جامعه، میتوانیم این تغییر را رقم بزنیم بهسوی آیندهای سبزتر حرکت کنیم.

Name: Al Kasir Scrap Metal Trading LLC
Description:
Welcome to Al Kasir Scrap Metal Trading, a leader in the metal recycling and demolition industry. Since our founding in 2015, we have been committed to excellence, sustainability, and customer satisfaction, establishing ourselves as a trusted partner for businesses and individuals seeking reliable scrap metal solutions and demolition services in the UAE.

Who We Are
Al Kasir Scrap Metal Trading was founded in 2015 and is located in the heart of the United Arab Emirates. Over the years, we have grown to become a premier provider of scrap metal recycling and demolition services. Our experienced professionals and state-of-the-art equipment ensure we deliver efficient, safe, and environmentally responsible solutions tailored to meet the unique needs of our clients.

Our Mission
Our mission is to provide top-quality scrap metal recycling and demolition services while promoting environmental sustainability. We strive to maximize the value of recyclable materials and minimize the environmental impact of demolition activities, ensuring a better future for our community and the planet.

What We Do
Metal Scrap Recycling
At Al Kasir Scrap Metal Trading, we specialize in the collection, processing, and recycling of various types of scrap metal. Our comprehensive recycling services ensure that valuable materials are recovered and repurposed, contributing to resource conservation and environmental protection.

Demolition Services
Our demolition services are designed to meet the highest standards of safety and efficiency. From small-scale residential demolitions to large industrial projects, we handle each task with precision and care, ensuring minimal disruption and maximum safety.

Site Cleanup
After the demolition process, we offer thorough site cleanup services to prepare the area for future use. Our team ensures that all debris is removed, and the site is left clean and ready for the next phase of development.

We Opperate in Saudi Arabia and UAE

Name: Skiep
Description:

Je gerechten blijven urenlang warm zonder dat je er naar om moet kijken. Smaken en aroma's trekken goed in je gerechten. Je hoeft er niet meer naar om te kijken! Het kan niet aanbranden of overkoken.

Name: DBCstore.fr
Description:
DBCstore.fr est une start-up spécialisée dans l'achat, la vente et la réparation de smartphones d'occasion et reconditionnés, offrant des appareils de qualité à des prix compétitifs. Notre mission est de répondre aux besoins de nos clients tout en réduisant notre impact environnemental. Nous proposons une variété de marques et modèles, chacun soigneusement inspecté, testé et réparé si nécessaire.

Nos services incluent l'évaluation et le rachat de smartphones, une garantie et un service après-vente, des conseils et une assistance à l'achat, ainsi qu'un engagement envers l'environnement et la responsabilité sociale. Nous sensibilisons nos clients à l'économie circulaire, encourageons le recyclage des appareils électroniques, utilisons des emballages durables, collaborons avec des organisations environnementales et formons notre personnel aux enjeux écologiques.

En choisissant DBCstore.fr, les clients soutiennent une entreprise soucieuse de l'environnement et de la responsabilité sociale, tout en réduisant leur propre impact écologique et en prenant soins de leur portefeuille.

Name: MiljöProtector

Hva vi gjør:

 Havplast-Resirkulering: Vi samler plast fra havet og forvandler det til flotte og praktiske produkter.
 Miljøvennlige Mobildeksler: Våre deksler er laget av resirkulert havplast og biologisk nedbrytbare materialer, slik at du kan beskytte telefonen din med god samvittighet.
 Byggekomponenter: Vi lager resirkulerte plastkomponenter for byggebransjen og støtter en sirkulær økonomi.
Vi tror på en renere, grønnere planet der vi alle bidrar til en bærekraftig fremtid. 

Vi er alltid på utkikk etter nye ideer og samarbeid, så hvis du har noen tanker eller vil jobbe med oss, send oss gjerne en e-post! 
hei@miljoprotector.no

Følg oss for å bli med på vår reise mot bærekraft!

Name: De Pelgrimshoeve
Description:
De Pelgrimshoeve is al jaren een kanjer in de stad Zoetermeer; een plek waar maatschappelijke betrokkenheid, duurzaamheid en menselijkheid samenkomen. Met ruim honderdzestig vrijwilligers zetten wij ons dagelijks in om impact te maken: voor mensen, voor goede doelen en voor het milieu.

Onze kringlooporganisatie is veel meer dan een winkel. We zijn een bruisende gemeenschap met sociale relevantie voor iedereen die wat extra aandacht of steun kan gebruiken. Ouderen vinden er gezelligheid en zingeving, mensen met een beperking krijgen de kans om hun talenten in te zetten en zich gewaardeerd te voelen, en klanten komen er voor een goed gesprek, een tweedehands schat en het gevoel dat hun aankoop bijdraagt aan iets groters.

De Pelgrimshoeve is trots op haar bijzondere bijdrage aan de stad. Jaarlijks verwerken, verkopen en recyclen wij vele tonnen goederen; een concrete bijdrage aan een duurzamere wereld. Met de opbrengsten steunen wij ruim 200 goede doelen, die samen in 2024 een bedrag van meer dan €250.000 ontvingen. Zo maken we verschil, ver voorbij de muren van onze Hoeve.

De kracht van De Pelgrimshoeve zit in haar mensen: betrokken vrijwilligers met het hart op de juiste plaats. Samen zorgen zij ervoor dat spullen, mensen en middelen een tweede kans krijgen. Dat maakt ons niet alleen duurzaam, maar ook menselijk en bovenal een bijzondere organisatie met grote impact in Zoetermeer en daarbuiten.

Name: Wick ReUse
Description:
Wick ReUse 𝗶𝘀𝘁 𝗱𝗮𝘀 𝘀𝗰𝗵𝘄𝗲𝗶𝘇𝘄𝗲𝗶𝘁 𝗲𝗿𝘀𝘁𝗲 𝗞𝗼𝗺𝗽𝗲𝘁𝗲𝗻𝘇𝘇𝗲𝗻𝘁𝗿𝘂𝗺 𝗳ü𝗿 𝗸𝗿𝗲𝗶𝘀𝗹𝗮𝘂𝗳𝗴𝗲𝗿𝗲𝗰𝗵𝘁𝗲 𝗕𝗮𝘂𝘄𝗶𝗿𝘁𝘀𝗰𝗵𝗮𝗳𝘁 𝗶𝗻 𝗪𝗶𝗻𝘁𝗲𝗿𝘁𝗵𝘂𝗿.

Das Herzstück dieses Zentrums ist der neue Wick ReUse Baumarkt. Auf knapp 1’000 m2 entsteht eine offene Verkaufsfläche mit einem breiten Baumarktangebot aus wiederverwendetem Material.
Von der Demontage auf Abbrüchen, Umbauten und Umnutzungen retten wir wertvolle Bauteile, Rohmaterialien, Maschinen, und alles, was ohne Qualitätseinbusse weiter- oder neu verwendet werden kann. Dieses Material bieten wir als breites Sortiment in unserem Re-Use Baumarkt in Winterthur-Hegi zum Verkauf an.
Mit attraktiven Öffnungszeiten, kompetenter Beratung und einem qualitativ hochstehenden Angebot zu fairen Preisen, sind wir eine sinnvolle und spannende Alternative zu den herkömmlichen Baumärkten in der Region.
In unserer hauseigenen Schreinerei sowie Schlosserei tätigen wir Auftragsarbeiten oder schneiden dein bei uns gekauftes Produkt in die richtige Länge oder Form.

Zusätzlich teilen wir unsere Erfahrung in der Wiederverwendung und bieten Kurse an, in denen wir mit euch professionell auf Baustellen den Rückbauprozess durchexerzieren. Gemeinsam demontieren wir sauber Bauteile sowie Rohmaterialien, und bereiten sie für den Transport vor. Wir diskutieren über Befestigungssysteme, den klassischen Bauablauf sowie die Ökonomie der Wiederverwendung.

𝗪𝗲𝗯𝘀𝗶𝘁𝗲: https://wickreuse.ch/
𝗜𝗻𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗴𝗿𝗮𝗺: https://www.instagram.com/wick_reuse/
