Name: RESCATE SUPRARRECICLAJE SPA
Description:
Rescate Suprarreciclaje es una empresa dedicada a la gestión de residuos. A través del suprarreciclaje, el cual es una de las prácticas de la "Economía Circular", se define como el reajuste o readapatación de los materiales o deshechos de una manera más creativa disminuyendo la huella de carbono. Además, busca crear conciencia alargando la vida útil de los materiales destinados a desechos mitigando el impacto ambiental de las empresas productivas, un tema cada vez más sensible para su continuidad operacional y su reputación con la responsabilidad social empresarial.

La gestión de residuos no peligros incluye principalmente:

*Retiro – Transporte – Reparación y/o Reutilización -Revalorización.
*Compra y venta de residuos no peligros reciclables, reutilizables o reparables.
*Instalación de puntos verdes de reciclaje en sitios públicos y/o privados.
*Venta de Contenedores con publicidad en puntos con generación de residuos masiva con alta exposición de marca.

MISIÓN
Gestionar soluciones medioambientales considerando una economía circular como marco auto regulatorio que busca un resultado significativo en la disminución de la huella de carbono mediante el suprarreciclaje

VISIÓN
Ser una empresa líder en suprarreciclaje, que desarrolle soluciones ambientales integrales a través de una economía circular

VALORES
Responsabilidad, seguridad, sustentabilidad, inclusión, trabajo en equipo, comercio justo, pasión, creatividad, impacto social, aprendizaje y mejora de procesos

Name: Ag Choice
Description:
Ag Choice was established in 2005 as New Jersey’s first and only commercial food waste and livestock manure on-farm composter. Over the years our focus has shifted from livestock manure collection to specializing in food waste recycling. We work closely with, and are permitted by, the New Jersey Department of Environmental Protection (NJDEP) to collect and compost a wide array of organics which includes food waste, leaves, manufacturing organics such as coffee, spent leaf, nut and bean products.

In addition to our compost site, we operate a 22,000 square foot warehouse location where we specialize in single-serve coffee capsule recycling. 

The Ag Choice Capsule Connections Program started with our owner’s passion to create a program in the community to serve the under-served; specifically, students with disabilities. When he was in high school, he worked alongside students with disabilities and saw how dedicated and hard-working they were, but then how those same individuals were often overlooked when it came time to get a job after high school.

With the expansion of the company, Ag Choice was able to bring this passion to a reality.  The Capsule Connections Program was launched with the owner’s high school alma mater through their work-based learning program. These students come to work in our warehouse environment for a few hours a day, several times a week. They get to experience new ways to gain transferrable skills that we hope will prepare them for a job after high school. 

While the company grows, Capsule Connections will too.  Our vision is to be able to offer this program to as many students as possible.

Name: Rekall Industries AU
Description:
Rekall Industries AU is the original force behind a multi-division innovation platform focused on sustainable manufacturing, recycling, and circular economy solutions.

Founded and based in Australia, Rekall AU delivers real-world impact through environmentally conscious design, advanced manufacturing, and systems thinking. We work across industries to reduce waste, extend product life cycles, and drive operational transformation through technology.

Divisions & Focus:
	•	ReVive – 3D printing and AI-powered part replacement for broken, out-of-production components.
	•	ReUse – Large-scale plastic, cardboard, and paper recycling focused on material recovery and reuse.
	•	ReFabricate – Custom B2B component manufacturing built on recycled inputs and design-for-disassembly principles.
	•	ReDine – Sustainable food production systems rooted in modular design and efficiency.
	•	ReCode – Digital platforms and tools for ESG reporting, lifecycle tracking, and sustainability data.

Our Purpose:

Name: ملابسك لتجارة الملابس المستعملة لغرض اعادة التدوير
Description:
من نحن:
تعتبر ملابسك شركة رائدة في إعادة تدوير الملابس، ملتزمة بتقليل النفايات النسيجية وتعزيز الموضة المستدامة. تأسست في عام 2023، وتتمثل مهمتنا في توفير حلول صديقة للبيئة للتخلص من الملابس غير المرغوب فيها، والمساهمة في تقليل التأثير البيئي لصناعة الأزياء.
مهمتنا:
في شركة ملابسك نسعى للمساهمة في مستقبل أكثر استدامة من خلال تقديم خدمات إعادة تدوير الملابس والنسيج بطريقة فعالة ومسؤولة. نهدف إلى تقليل كمية النفايات التي ينتهي بها المطاف في المكبات من خلال تشجيع الناس على إعادة تدوير ملابسهم القديمة بمسؤولية.
خدماتنا:
نقدم مجموعة من الخدمات المصممة لجعل إعادة تدوير الملابس سهلة ومريحة للأفراد والشركات:
•	جمع الملابس: نوفر نقاط إسقاط وخدمات جمع الملابس للتبرعات بسهولة.
•	فرز ومعالجة النسيج: تمتلك منشآتنا القدرة على فرز ومعالجة وإعادة تدوير النسيج، مما يضمن إعادة استخدام أو إعادة تدوير كل قطعة.
•	مبادرات التدوير: نتعاون مع المصممين والحرفيين لتحويل الملابس القديمة إلى منتجات جديدة ومبتكرة.
•	برامج الشراكة: نعمل مع الشركات والمدارس والمنظمات المجتمعية لإقامة حملات جمع الملابس وبرامج إعادة التدوير.
لماذا تختارنا؟
•	التأثير البيئي: نحن ملتزمون بتقليل البصمة البيئية لصناعة الأزياء من خلال تحويل النسيج بعيدًا عن المكبات.
•	التركيز على الاستدامة: صممت عملياتنا لتقليل النفايات وتعزيز الاقتصاد الدائري.
•	مشاركة المجتمع: نشارك بنشاط مع المجتمع من خلال برامج تعليمية وورش عمل وفعاليات تشجع على العيش المستدام.
•	عمليات شفافة: نحرص على الشفافية في عمليات إعادة التدوير، لضمان أن يعرف عملاؤنا وشركاؤنا كيفية استخدام تبرعاتهم بشكل دقيق.
أثرنا:
منذ تأسيسنا، قامت ملابسك بإعادة تدوير أكثر من [……] طن من الملابس والنسيج، مما ساهم في توفير موارد قيمة وتقليل انبعاثات الكربون. لقد ساعدت جهودنا في زيادة الوعي بأهمية الاستدامة في عالم الأزياء وألهمت العديد من الأفراد والشركات لاتخاذ خيارات بيئية أكثر وعيًا.
فريقنا:
يتألف فريقنا من محترفين شغوفين يكرسون جهودهم لإحداث تأثير إيجابي على البيئة. من ممثلي خدمة العملاء المتمرسين إلى فنيي إعادة التدوير الماهرين، يلتزم كل شخص في ملابسك بالتميز والاستدامة.

Name: Pacific Reclaimed Lumber & Supply
Description:
PRLS is the brainchild of reuse colleagues in the Bay Area who want to collaborate more efficiently. After several trial and error projects, we decided to form Pacific Reclaimed Lumber & Supply (pacificreclaimed.com), an online marketplace for all of us to list our products. Incorporated as a California Benefit Corporation in 2017, the mission of PRLS is to promote and grow the reuse and repurposing of reclaimed lumber and materials from the built environment, to lead to a reduction in solid waste and carbon emissions.

We are a project of Jim Steinmetz of Reusable Lumber and Nicole Tai of GreenLynx, with our latest addition Max Wechsler, formerly of Urban Ore.

Why another listing site? 

We all have used Craigslist, eBay, OfferUp, and now Facebook Marketplace, but something has always been missing. Other reuse marketplaces have been attempted, and failed. We are a notoriously nuanced industry. Our purpose is to bring reclaimed lumber together on one platform to make it easy for customers like architects, builders, and woodworkers to find what they need, faster and more efficiently. It provides one marketplace for all of us to list our products, that has integrity and quality control.

Pacific Reclaimed was designed by reuse industry experts for the reuse industry. We know how our transactions work and that margins can be low. Many new listing services require a monthly subscription fee of over $100, with additional high transaction fees of 15%. Our transaction fee is only 3%. 

Through a tightly controlled membership process, our goal is to ensure everyone listing on the platform has done deconstruction or reuse work, and has the provenance of their materials locked in. On the flip side, we are invite-only for customers, with vetting done by members and Pacific Reclaimed. Contact us at hello@pacificreclaimed.com.

Name: METAFIGITAL
Description:
Benefits of a Phygital System of Waste to Energy, 3D Printing Microfactory, and Shipping Container Farm with Retail Discovery and Experience and Fulfillment All Colocated in Shipping Containers Powered by Shared Co-Generated Renewable Energy
Benefits to All
Reduced costs: The system reduces costs for consumers, businesses, and governments. Consumers save money by being able to purchase products and services at a lower cost, while businesses save money by being able to produce goods and services more efficiently. Governments save money by being able to reduce waste management costs.
Increased environmental sustainability: The system reduces environmental impact by reducing waste, conserving resources, and using renewable energy. The waste-to-energy plant converts waste into clean energy, reducing the need for landfills and incinerators. The 3D printing microfactory uses recycled materials to create new products, reducing the need for virgin materials. The shipping container farm uses hydroponics to grow crops in a controlled environment, reducing the need for pesticides and fertilizers. The shared co-generated renewable energy system provides clean energy to power the entire system, reducing the need for fossil fuels.
Improved social equity: The system improves social equity by providing jobs and training opportunities for people who are traditionally underserved. The waste-to-energy plant creates jobs for people who are unemployed or underemployed. The 3D printing microfactory provides training opportunities for people who want to learn how to use 3D printing technology. The shipping container farm creates jobs for people who are interested in sustainable agriculture. The shared co-generated renewable energy system provides jobs for people who are interested in renewable energy.
Increased community engagement: The system increases community engagement by providing a space for people to come together and learn about sustainability

Name: Onze Groene Koe! Eco Shopping. "For a Better Life"
Description:
Hoe leef je vanuit je hart in een wereld waar hebzucht en begeerte de dienst uitmaken? Hoe vind je een evenwicht tussen noodzakelijke materiële behoeften en gevoelswaarden zoals welzijn en geluk?
Geluk is evenwicht tussen WELVAART en WELZIJN.
Je vindt het op het middelpunt van de balans, tussen deze twee polen, waar de stilte van het evenwicht heerst en de vrije keuze bestaat.

Balans geeft vrijheid van keuze ‘hoofd’ of 'hart’.              
Ons hoofd... Ons hoofd dient ons tijdens ons fysieke bestaan te beschermen. IQ - geheugen en slimheid.
Ons hart... Ons hart dient om de liefde voor het bestaan te ervaren en te leren. EQ - Emotie en medegevoel.
Onze spirituele basis... Als hoofd en hart in balans zijn, als ratio en gevoel samenwerken komt het SQ vrij, dan zijn wij gereed om de zingevingsvraag, die bij ieder individu anders is, te ontdekken en gepassioneerd vorm te geven..

---

"Het is onze visie dat een mens in zijn leven de rol heeft van een kapitein op een schip. Soms komen stromen die ons doen afdwalen en zijn we het kompas kwijt. Een verblijf in Het Bezinningshotel, helpt u weer op de juiste koers te komen ."

~ Wilma Post

Das Herzstück dieses Zentrums ist der neue Roto Re-Use Baumarkt. Auf knapp 1’000 m2 entsteht eine offene Verkaufsfläche mit einem breiten Baumarktangebot aus wiederverwendetem Material.
Von der Demontage auf Abbrüchen, Umbauten und Umnutzungen retten wir wertvolle Bauteile, Rohmaterialien, Maschinen, und alles, was ohne Qualitätseinbusse weiter- oder neu verwendet werden kann. Dieses Material bieten wir als breites Sortiment in unserem Re-Use Baumarkt in Winterthur-Hegi zum Verkauf an.
Mit attraktiven Öffnungszeiten, kompetenter Beratung und einem qualitativ hochstehenden Angebot zu fairen Preisen, sind wir eine sinnvolle und spannende Alternative zu den herkömmlichen Baumärkten in der Region.
In unserer hauseigenen Schreinerei sowie Schlosserei tätigen wir Auftragsarbeiten oder schneiden dein bei uns gekauftes Produkt in die richtige Länge oder Form.

Zusätzlich teilen wir unsere Erfahrung in der Wiederverwendung und bieten Kurse an, in denen wir mit euch professionell auf Baustellen den Rückbauprozess durchexerzieren. Gemeinsam demontieren wir sauber Bauteile sowie Rohmaterialien, und bereiten sie für den Transport vor. Wir diskutieren über Befestigungssysteme, den klassischen Bauablauf sowie die Ökonomie der Wiederverwendung.

Name: Ciclo 3 Engenharia e Gerenciamento de Resíduos
Description:
Uma empresa de solução sustentável que realiza, com responsabilidade técnica, o processo da logística reversa prevista na lei n° 12.305/10 dos produtos eletroeletrônicos.

Ana Paula Luiz Engenheira, Gestora Ambiental e responsável técnica dos processos da Ciclo 3, trabalhou durante 15 anos em empresas de telefonia e informática e também em gerenciadoras de resíduos em geral.

Com know-how e observação dos processos, se deu conta da necessidade do descarte correto do lixo eletrônico gerado na operação das empresas sem conhecimento de causa. E assim nasce a Ciclo 3.

O nosso objetivo é realizar as cinco fases que compõem o macro processo da Logística Reversa dos produtos eletroeletrônicos: Coleta, Triagem, Desmontagem/Descaracterização, Separação e Destinação Correta.

A Ciclo 3 visa uma solução ambiental de extrema responsabilidade para que empresas comprometidas e responsáveis possam fazer o descarte correto de todo seu Resíduo Eletrônico, tendo como foco:
Cliente Satisfeito: Atender as necessidades de nossos clientes com seriedade e comprometimento.
Melhoria Contínua: Qualidade e melhoria contínua dos processos.
Colaboradores: Promover o desenvolvimento e bem-estar dos colaboradores.

 Welcome to our Sustainable Carpet Recycling page! 

At FIBR Carpet Recycling, we are committed to revolutionizing the carpet industry through innovative and eco-friendly recycling solutions. Our mission is to reduce waste, conserve resources, and create a more sustainable future for our planet.

We offer Large quantities of Commercial Carpet tile.shipped nationwide

Buy by the sqft, pallet, or truckload

 Sustainable Carpet Recycling: Redefining the Industry 

As pioneers in the field of sustainable carpet recycling, we are dedicated to minimizing the environmental impact of carpet disposal. By utilizing cutting-edge technologies and responsible practices, we transform used carpets into valuable resources, reducing landfill waste and conserving natural resources.

 Our Eco-Friendly Process:

1 Collection: We partner with businesses, institutions, and individuals to collect and divert used carpets from landfills, preventing them from becoming environmental hazards.

2 Sorting and Separation: Our state-of-the-art facilities employ advanced sorting techniques to separate carpet fibers, backing materials, and other components for efficient recycling.

3 Recycling and Repurposing: Through innovative recycling methods, we transform the recovered materials into new products, such as carpet tiles, insulation, and other sustainable alternatives.

4 Sustainable Solutions: We provide eco-friendly carpet products that meet stringent sustainability standards, ensuring our customers can enjoy high-quality flooring while reducing their environmental footprint.

 Our Environmental Impact:

By choosing our sustainable carpet recycling services, you contribute to:

 Landfill Reduction: Diverting carpets from landfills helps reduce waste and prevents the release of harmful pollutants into the environment.

 Resource Conservation: Through recycling, we conserve valuable resources like petroleum, water, and energy that are used in the production of new carpets.

 Carbon Footprint Reduction: By opting for recycled carpet products, you significantly decrease carbon emissions associated with the manufacturing process.

 Circular Economy: We actively participate in the circular economy by closing the loop, transforming used carpets into new products and minimizing the need for virgin materials.

 Join the Sustainable Carpet Recycling Movement:

Follow our page to stay updated on the latest trends, innovations, and sustainable practices in carpet recycling. Together, we can make a significant impact on waste reduction, resource conservation, and the creation of a greener, healthier world.

 Keywords for SEO optimization: Sustainable carpet recycling, eco-friendly carpet disposal, carpet recycling solutions, landfill waste reduction, circular economy, resource conservation, recycled carpet products, environmentally responsible flooring.

 Together, let's pave the way for a sustainable future with responsible carpet recycling! Join us today.

Name: Trash2Product
Description:
An estimated 8 million tons of plastic waste enters the oceans every year. Plastics pose threat to nature by being non-biodegradable and toxic. A simple plastic bag can take up to 500 years to decompose while a plastic bottle can take around 300 years! Unfortunately, plastics account for 65 percent of the total waste in Pakistan; 55bn plastic bags are being used in the country with an expected annual increase of 15 per cent in their usage. Immediate and effective steps are required to curtail the usage of plastics to save our country and our planet.

Here is where Trash2Product comes in, a company providing a solution for plastic waste by using our integrated process which results in high quality eco-friendly verified recycled fiber, used in the manufacturing of uniforms, corporate wears , merchandises , and any type of clothing required.

Through our simple process we are able to provide solution to one of the biggest issue faced by our planet.

Name: Kringloop de Kempen
Description:
Stichting Kringloop de Kempen is een non-profit organisatie die zich inzet voor optimaal hergebruik van goederen en restmateriaal.  
Dit doen we met ca. 235 medewerkers werkzaam in meerdere winkelfilialen en een circulair ambachtscentrum.

Wij zetten mensen in hun kracht en
bieden een vertrouwde en zinvolle werkomgeving.

Als stichting zijn wij actief met 4 kringloopwinkels aangevuld met tijdelijke pop-up stores. 
Wij werken nauw samen met diverse sociale partners zoals SW bedrijven Ergon en Kempenplus, stichting Severinus, regionale voedselbanken, Stichting Leergeld, vluchtelingenwerk, reclassering en uiteraard de gemeenten Bergeijk, Veldhoven, Eersel en Waalre. 
Doel is om met onze activiteiten laagdrempelig en zinvol werk te organiseren voor mensen die in het reguliere werkcircuit moeilijk plaatsbaar zijn. Daarnaast is het ons doel om spullen een tweede leven te geven en zodoende het milieu te ontlasten.
Op afspraak halen wij herbruikbare goederen op en hebben we in al deze gemeenten ook inleverpunten bij onze winkels en milieustraten; naast goederen zijn wij ook de inzamelaar en verwerker van alle textiel in de gemeenten Bergeijk, Eersel en Waalre.

Alle ingezamelde goederen worden gesorteerd op bruik- verkoopbaarheid en daar waar nodig gerepareerd, schoongemaakt en getest. Op deze manier bieden wij kwalitatief goede producten aan die weer een levensduur verlenging krijgen. Veel elektrische produkten en fietsen worden dan ook met garantie aangeboden.

Ons doel is om mensen in hun kracht te zetten en daar waar mogelijk te streven naar het ontwikkelen van arbeidsvaardigheden; vele successen zijn hier het resultaat van.

Name: Atelier Re-sourcé
Description:
Atelier Re-sourcé est un projet à impact qui vise à reconditionner des mobil-homes en solutions d’habitat temporaire, durables et accessibles.

Pensé comme une réponse concrète à plusieurs enjeux de société – précarité, urgence écologique, exclusion professionnelle – le projet combine économie circulaire et insertion par l’activité économique, en s’appuyant sur un modèle hybride: récupération de mobil-homes usagés, rénovation en atelier par des personnes en parcours d’insertion, puis remise sur le marché sous forme de location solidaire ou de vente responsable.

Les usages sont multiples :
 hébergement d’urgence pour les collectivités,
 logement saisonnier en zone touristique,
 base vie ou espace modulaire pour professionnels,
 alternative engagée pour les particuliers.

L’ambition? Structurer une filière locale et réplicable autour de la revalorisation d’habitats légers, en mobilisant un écosystème d’acteurs engagés. Le tout, en créant de l’emploi inclusif, en évitant des tonnes de déchets, et en rendant le logement plus flexible et plus responsable.

Un projet en construction, à la croisée du social, de l’écologie et du design utile.

We are driven by a singular mission - to empower individuals and communities to embrace a sustainable future. We create innovative, eco-friendly products that reduce waste and inspire positive change, nurturing a greener world for generations to come.

Name: Bærebyg ApS
Description:
Det er ofte en god idé at bruge genbrugsbyggematerialer, da det kan hjælpe med at mindske affaldet og beskytte miljøet. Genbrugsbyggematerialer er materialer, der er blevet brugt før, men stadig er i god stand til at blive brugt igen.
En af de store fordele ved at bruge genbrugsbyggematerialer er, at det kan spare penge. Disse materialer kan ofte købes til en lavere pris end nye materialer, da de allerede er blevet produceret og transporteret en gang. Derudover kan det også hjælpe med at give kreativitet og personlighed til dit byggeri, da de kan være unikke og har en historie.
Brugen af genbrugsbyggematerialer kan også hjælpe med at reducere brugen af råstoffer og energi, som er nødvendige for at producere nye materialer. Dette kan hjælpe med at reducere udledningen af klimagasser og beskytte miljøet.
Generelt er brugen af genbrugsbyggematerialer en win-win situation for både økonomi og miljø. Så næste gang du planlægger et byggeprojekt, overvej at bruge genbrugsbyggematerialer for at gøre en positiv forskel for både din tegnebog og planeten.
Bærebyg har adgang til en ekspertise i at nedrive og indsamle byggematerialer på en miljømæssigt forsvarlig måde, så disse vil kunne genbruges. Derved sikrer vi en mere miljørigtig tilgang til brugbare materialer og installationer og samtidigt får vi ting, der har stor håndværksmæssig værdi, tilbage i et kredsløb til alles fordel.

Name: Revive EcoTech
Description:
At Revives, we are driven by a simple but powerful idea: recycling in India should be easy, accessible, and impactful—for everyone.

We are guided by four key principles:

Customer-first thinking across households, businesses, and industries

Innovation over convention—rethinking how waste is collected and valued

Operational excellence in logistics and quality control

Long-term vision to drive both environmental and economic progress

We’re building a digital platform that simplifies recycling—turning everyday waste into verified, reusable resources. From doorstep pickups to industry-ready raw materials, our technology enables a clean, connected, and circular supply chain.

We combine the scale of a growing nationwide service with the agility and heart of a startup. Every decision we make—from platform features to logistics models—is shaped by our commitment to solving a real-world problem: recyclable waste going uncollected, and opportunities for value being lost.

Our mission is to make recycling simple, rewarding, and scalable.
Our vision is to become India’s leading digital recycling network, closing the loop on waste and opening new pathways for sustainable growth.

At Revives, it's always "Day 1"—because we believe that the future of recycling will be built by those who stay nimble, think boldly, and act with purpose.

Etant à votre écoute, il pourra indifféremment vous être proposé de vendre vos biens aux enchères ou de gré à gré. Les caractéristiques à prendre en compte sont le besoin de place, de liquidités, la rareté et le positionnement de vos biens sur le marché. Notre expérience est alors nécessaire pour vous conseiller comme il se doit afin de permettre une revente dans les meilleures conditions.

Maintenant acceptée, l'acquisition et la revente d'un bien de seconde main prend tout son sens. Les motivations peuvent être environnementales, culturelles, historiques, plaisir d’avoir un bien unique, de collectionner ou pour les plus pragmatiques économiser ou investir. 

Disposant de compétences variées, nous avons à disposition tout un réseau d’experts réputés et reconnus dans les ventes aux enchères pour authentifier vos oeuvres d’art et vos objets de collection. A côté de cela, notre expérience nous autorise à être compétent pour revendre vos véhicules (collection, utilitaires…) ou votre matériel d’entreprise (parc informatique, machines outils…).

En cas de besoin, nous nous tenons également à votre disposition pour expertiser vos biens dans le cadre de vos transactions entre particuliers et garantir le paiement si cela s’avère nécessaire.

Name: AVRO Recycling limited
Description:
We are more than just a company; we are pioneers in sustainability, innovation, and responsible manufacturing. For over 22 years, we have dedicated ourselves to transforming plastic waste into meaningful, durable, and value-driven products that contribute to a cleaner planet. Our mission is simple yet powerful: to create value from what others discard.

At AVRO, we specialize in recycling plastic waste and converting it into high-quality plastic furniture that is strong, aesthetically appealing, and built to last. Every product we create represents a step toward reducing the environmental burden of plastic pollution. Our process integrates advanced technology, efficient recycling systems, and a deep commitment to environmental stewardship. This ensures that our products don’t just serve customers, they serve the planet.

Headquartered in India, AVRO has become a trusted leader in the plastic recycling and molded furniture industry. With the capability to recycle 6,000 metric tons of plastic waste annually and manufacture up to 5 million pieces of furniture, we demonstrate the true potential of circular innovation. Our products are used across homes, institutions, commercial spaces, and public environments, reflecting both quality and environmental responsibility.

As we look toward the future, our ambition is bold. We are working to expand our recycling capacity to 12,000 MTPA by FY25, doubling our impact and reinforcing our commitment to sustainability. This step strengthens our role in combating plastic pollution and advancing a circular economy where resources are reused, renewed, and preserved for generations.

At AVRO, we are not just producing furniture, are shaping a cleaner, greener future.
Location: Puthi, Village Dinanathpur, Ghaziabad , Uttar Pradesh

Name: King Size Recycling Ltd
Description:
Welcome to King Size Recycling! We are a mattress and bed recycling centre that provides an outlet for end-of-life mattresses across Scotland. Our comprehensive collection service extends to Glasgow and surrounding areas for individuals, and throughout Scotland for commercial customers or public sectors. Our clientele includes student accommodations, hospitality, contractors, landlords, individuals, mattress/bed retailers, and local authorities. By tailoring our services to this diverse range of customers, we are committed to fostering sustainability and protecting the environment.

Our unwavering commitment to sustainability drives every aspect of our operation. Embracing the principles of a full circular economy, we meticulously deconstruct each mattress or bed into individual components. These components are then baled and reintegrated into relevant industries for manufacturing new goods. For the small portion of materials that cannot be reintegrated (e.g., contaminated mattresses and waste ticking), they are sent for processing as biofuel. This strategic approach ensures that every mattress or bed we handle avoids the fate of ending up in a landfill. By providing a cost-effective solution for disposing of these bulky items, we offer a moral and ethical duty to protect the environment.

Ready to make a meaningful contribution to a greener world? Connect with us today! Reach out by calling us at 0141 442 0320, sending an email to info@kingsizerecycling.co.uk, or filling in our convenient enquiry form on our website. If you prefer a hands-on approach, feel free to drop off your mattresses at our premises in Glasgow. Our dedicated team is ready to assist you with unloading your vehicle. Join us on the journey towards a brighter, greener, and more sustainable future. Let's work together to create positive environmental change!

Name: Recycletroop
Description:
RecycleTroop is a sustainability-driven electronics and telecommunications wholesaler, helping businesses across Europe extend the life of devices through responsible reuse, repair, and recycling. We support repair shops, refurbishers, insurance companies, distributors, and corporate partners with circular solutions that reduce waste and lower CO₂ emissions.

 1. Circular Buyback & Recovery Programs

We operate eco-friendly buyback systems for:
	•	Broken screens
	•	Damaged components
	•	Faulty cameras & motherboards
	•	Used iPhones, iPads & other devices

Every item goes through a traceable, responsible pathway—prioritizing reuse over recycling, minimizing electronic waste, and supporting clients with CO₂e savings reports for ESG and sustainability reporting.

 2. Sustainable Spare Parts & Components

We supply high-quality components sourced through vetted, responsible partner factories.
Our goal is to reduce unnecessary manufacturing by promoting:
	•	OEM-quality parts
	•	Pulled genuine parts
	•	Long-lasting repair components

 3. Used Devices

We offer EU-spec and mix spec used phones sourced through:
	•	Carrier trade-in programs
	•	Operator ASIS channels
	•	Apple trade-in partners

Every device is fully tested, compliant with EU requirements (Reverse VAT & MVAT), and selected to promote maximum device lifespan while reducing the carbon footprint compared to new production.

 Why Sustainability Matters to Us
	•	Extending product lifecycles is the fastest way to reduce e-waste
	•	Reusing one smartphone can save up to 70–90% CO₂e compared to producing a new one
	•	Our clients receive documentation that strengthens their ESG reporting
	•	We work globally but prioritize local EU support, transparent sourcing, and environmentally responsible operations
	•	Trusted partner for leading refurbishers and insurance companies

 Our Promise

You focus on sustainable growth — we power your circular tech ecosystem.

Name: Petit Fox Portugal
Description: A Petit Fox está direcionada para todas as pessoas que se preocupam com o planeta e adoram roupas de qualidade. Acreditamos que todos os pais deveriam conseguir adquirir roupa de qualidade para os seus filhos, sem terem necessariamente de gastar uma fortuna ou prejudicar o ambiente. A “fast fashion” (moda rápida) tem um efeito devastador sobre o ambiente e sobre a sociedade - dar uma segunda vida às suas roupas através da economia circular é o caminho para um futuro mais verde e um planeta mais limpo. A Petit Fox foi idealizada e lançada por Aurélie Torres-Hastie na Cidade do Cabo, África do Sul, inspirada pela sua própria dificuldade em encontrar roupa de qualidade para acompanhar o rápido crescimento dos seus filhos, sem ir à falência. Entretanto, as roupas nas quais as crianças já não cabiam, acumulavam-se em gavetas e caixas, à semelhança do que acontece com tantos outros pais. Ao mudar-se com a família para Portugal em 2022, surgiu a vontade de continuar o sucesso da Petit Fox neste novo país. Em 2023 conhece Maria João Proença, uma mãe portuguesa apaixonada pelo conceito de economia circular. Não demorou muito até perceberem que podiam unir esforços para espalhar o conceito de moda sustentável e consciente em Portugal. E assim nascia a Petit Fox Portugal.

Name: LoadTell
Description:
LoadTell is the Recycling Operating System for industrial packaging and material waste.

Industrial recycling happens every day across manufacturing plants, warehouses, and distribution networks. Paper, plastics, and secondary packaging materials move through buyers, carriers, and processors at scale. But as volume increases, the systems around that activity often break down. Documentation fragments. Reporting is rebuilt after the fact. Confidence erodes as material moves across facilities, partners, and regions.

LoadTell was built to close that gap.

LoadTell provides a shared system where recycling is defined, coordinated, executed, and confirmed across an organization. It connects operations, logistics, procurement, sustainability, and downstream partners around the same workflow, so activity, data, and outcomes stay aligned as material moves. Reporting exists because the material has actually moved, not because someone reconstructed it later.

The platform standardizes how recycling is coordinated without changing how material flows in the real world. Materials are defined once, associated with a facility, and posted with clear expectations before movement occurs. Approved buyers respond under known terms. Pickups, processing, confirmation, and payment are coordinated through a single workflow, creating a verified chain of custody for every executed load.

As EPR regulations expand and scrutiny increases, LoadTell embeds traceability, documentation, and compliance directly into recycling execution. Chain-of-custody records, audit trails, material specifications, weight verification, and EPR-ready reporting are generated from real transactions, giving teams data they can stand behind.

Headquartered in Buffalo, New York, LoadTell is building the digital backbone for circular intelligence, where every load tells a story.

Name: r•Plastic
Description:
r•Plastic stand for "recycled plastic". When plastic gets recycled, for example PolyPropylene, the abbreviation changed from PP to rPP. Also when pronouncing r•Plastic it sounds like "our plastic". And thats what we should become aware of: we are responsible, it is all our plastic! We buy it, we use it, we bin it. This realisation gives us great power: we can influence and make change! 

r•Plastic stands for playful. The main thing is to have fun and approach live in a playful way. We take it way to serious most of the time! I believe our kids are our greatest teachers and they are most in flow when they have fun!

r•Plastic stands for minimalistic. Don't confuse minimalistic for boring, on the contrary! Minimalistic for us means to be conscious of what we buy and consume. Are the products we buy useful or is it just more stuff? When we create product out of recycled plastic it will be a useful product, it will replace virgin plastic or natural resource, it can be used for many years, it will be recyclable and it will add to a circulair economy. It will be local recycled plastic, the products will be locally produced and offered on the local market. 

r•Plastic stands for Tri Hita Karana. This is a Balinees philosophy of life. It boils down to 3 relationships: person to God, person to person and person with nature. All these relationships have to be maintained to achieve harmony and prosperity. This is reflected by r•Plastic in different ways if you pay close attention.

r•Plastic is a PT New Moon Collective company

Name: Salvage Studio Recycling Co.
Description:
Founded in April of 2023, Salvage Studio is a micro-recycling studio based in Hollywood, FL. We are dedicated to removing plastic and other harmful waste from the ocean, local natural ecosystems, and urban community spaces to craft functional products and creative compositions.

All recycled products are sorted, cleaned, shredded and formed in-house. We take pride in our commitment to preserving the recyclability and biodegradability of materials that are inherently sustainable. Our in-house processes ensure that we never compromise the future of our planet by altering these materials in a way that prevents recycling or natural biodegradation.

To reduce carbon emissions, we promote local pickup and exclusively use recycled, lightweight, and reusable materials to package and ship sustainably. We are working to expand our collection service for plastics, metals, and other materials that cannot be recycled curbside to the public.

Beyond our eco-conscious practices, we are dedicated to education, advocacy, and community engagement. Through social media, we raise awareness about climate change, pollution, sustainable lifestyle, and the importance of preserving our environment through collective action. We amplify the voices of indigenous environmental advocates, promote local clean-ups, and advocate for political action to keep corporations and politicians accountable. 

At Salvage Studio, our mission is to be a driving force in environmental preservation and sustainable creativity. We aim to inspire action-oriented advocacy and empower individuals to make a positive impact on our planet. Together, we can create a sustainable future for all.

Name: Risain
Description:
Kierrätysoperaattori Risain on ennakkoluuloton uudelleenkäytön edelläkävijäyritys. Kiertotaloutta vauhdittava palvelumme pidentää tuotteiden,materiaalien sekä rakennusosien elinkaarta ja aikaansaa säästöä. Tyypillisiä kohteitamme ovat kiinteistöjensisätilamuutokset, purkulupaa odottavat rakennukset ja yritysten muutot. Myös teollisuudenylijäämissä ja poistuvissa mallistoerissäon paljon potentiaalia uudelleenkäytön näkökulmasta. 

Vastuullamme on saavuttaa projekteissamme mahdollisimman suuri uudelleenkäyttöprosentti eli saada tuotteet ja materiaalit kiertoon.Toimintamme on vaivatonta, vastuullista ja resurssiviisasta. 

Käytännön toteuttamisen lisäksi neuvomme uudelleenkäytön kannattavuudessa, projektien aikataulutuksessa ja materiaalitietoudessa.  Lähdemme mielellään yhteistyöhön resurssitehokkaan uudelleenkäytön lisäämiseksi. 

Risain. Käytöstä käyttöön. 

*** 

Kierrätysoperaattori Risain is an open-minded, experienced pioneer in the field of circular economy and reuse. Our service accelerates the circular economy, creates savings and extends the life cycle of products, materials and construction parts. We mainly focus on companies’ relocation situations, interior facelifts and buildings awaiting demolition permits. There is also a lot of reuse potential in industrial suppliers’ discontinued models. 

During collaboration our responsibility is to get products and materials recycled i.e. achieve maximum reuse percentage for the project. Our service is effortless, responsible and resource-wise for the customer. 

In addition to our practical work, we gladly advise on project scheduling, material knowledge and the profitability of reuse. We are happy if co-operation increases awareness and the amount of reuse. 

Risain. From use to reuse.

Name: HAPPY TROC BLOTZHEIM
Description:
Happy Troc Blotzheim c'est l'occasion de nouvelle génération ! 

Dépôt-vente, achat cash, réparation (smartphones, tablettes,), livraison et enlèvement à domicile, produits testés et garantis, notre magasin vous propose d'équiper toute la famille et toutes les pièces de la maison en sélectionnant rigoureusement tous les produits d'occasions, neufs ou destockés qui franchissent chaque jour les portes de notre antre ! 

Nos clients déposants, particuliers ou professionnel participent avec nous au grand mouvement de l'économie circulaire : on ne jette plus (ou presque, en tout cas on recycle !), on redonne une seconde, une troisième ou une quatrième vie! Mobilier, salon, électroménager, PC, consoles, smartphones, livres, bijoux, vaisselle, décoration, luminaires, articles de sport et de bricolage, etc... sans oublier notre passion pour les curiosités, la brocante et le vintage !

Avec Happy Troc Blotzheim, la confiance c'est notre transparence ! Débarrassez vous de la corvée de vendre, de prendre des photos, de recevoir chez vous de potentiels acheteurs/négociateurs ! On s'en charge !

Nous sommes au service de nos clients et d'une cause qui nous tient à cœur depuis la création de l'enseigne (anciennement Troc de l'Ile puis Troc.com) en 1982 : consommer mieux et avec un impact maîtrisé!

N'hésitez pas à nous confier vos biens, vos histoires, vos peines aussi parfois... Nous sommes là pour vous épauler de la prise de contact jusqu'au paiement de vos biens vendus chez nous, et même après!

Notre super équipe au super sourire saura vous conseiller:

- Achat cash ou dépôt-vente sur toutes les catégories de produits 
- Service de Vide Maison (appartement, garage ou local pro)
- Service Livraison / Enlèvement à domicile
- Extension de Garantie
- Carte de Fidélité 
- Service Réparation & SAV
- Estimation à domicile
- Articles neufs à petit prix : literie, électroménager, multimédia...

Vous souhaitez nous rejoindre ? Envoyez votre CV ou passez nous voir, c'est encore mieux !

Name: Karteko

Zapraszamy do współpracy.

Yapılan bütün işlemler firmamızın yazılım sistemi olan Burplas AYS’ ye (Burplas Atık Yönetim Sistemi) işlenmekte ve daima güvenilir şekilde izlenebilmektedir.

BURPLAS olarak amacımız sizlere en iyi hizmeti vermekle birlikte, atıkların çevreye zarar vermeden gerekli teknolojiler ile geri dönüştürülmesini sağlamak, yapılan işlemlerle atıkları hammaddeye dönüştürerek döngüsel ekonomiye katkıda bulunmak ve sürdürülebilirlik ilkeleri doğrultusunda gelecek nesillere daha güzel yarınlar bırakmaktır.

Name: NXTLiFE- Sport ReCommerce Service
Description:
NEXTLiFE is a pioneering technology startup revolutionizing the sporting goods industry with its Resale-as-a-Service platform. Through NEXTLiFE's cutting-edge technological innovations, sporting goods retailers can seamlessly integrate resale and recycling options for their clientele directly within their online shopping experience. NEXTLiFE offers bespoke solutions for brands and multi-brand retailers, including specialized e-commerce platforms and tailored marketplace technology. Moreover, NEXTLiFE provides access to its extensive global network of over 30 resale marketplace partners and a vast customer base exceeding 100 million individuals.

At the heart of NEXTLiFE's mission lies the vision of fostering a culture of sustainable consumption. By facilitating efficient circular models, NEXTLiFE empowers sporting goods brands to embrace sustainable practices while encouraging consumers to recognize the enduring value of their equipment. Through these efforts, NEXTLiFE aims to prolong the lifespan of products and foster meaningful connections between brands and their customers.

Name: Clonnect
Description:
We understand that the Indian textile and apparel industry generates about 72 million tons of waste annually, of which only 30% is recycled. We saw this huge gap between the clothes being dumped and the clothes put up for sale in thrift shop companies, and thought of enhancing the supply chain. 
Introducing Clonnect, a Saas platform that connects discarded clothes from fast fashion brands to thrift shops and textile recyclers. Our platform allows fast fashion brands and landfill owners to sell their discarded clothes to thrift shops and textile recyclers, reducing textile waste and increasing the recycling rate. We aim to reduce textile waste and bridge the gap in the supply chain for discarded clothes. Our platform is designed to make sustainable fashion more accessible and help reduce the environmental impact caused by textile production.

Name: CYCLE סייקל כלכלה מעגלית למכלי משקה בע"מ
Description:
סייקל (CYCLE) הוקמה במטרה לספק שירותי איסוף ומיחזור ליצרני ויבואני משקאות, לקמעונאים, לרשתות שיווק ולבעלי חברות, ארגונים ומוסדות וכך לקיים את חוק הפיקדון בקלות ולהתקדם לכלכלה מעגלית ישראלית חדשנית. חברת CYCLE מספקת פתרון מלא באמצעות השכרה או מכירה של מכונות אוטומטיות חדשניות לקליטת מכלי משקה ולהשבת דמי הפיקדון (RVM - Reverse Vending Machine). מכונות ה – RVM מותאמות לגודל בית העסק ולקצב החזרת מכלי המשקה ומעניקות פתרון יעיל לקליטת מכלי המשקה ולהשבת דמי הפיקדון.
בכדי להבטיח עבודה יעילה וחסכונית פיתחה CYCLE פורטל דיגיטלי ייעודי המאפשר הזמנה וניהול שוטף של כל מערך האיסוף וצי משאיות אשר נוסעות בין לקוחותיה ודואגות לשנע את מיכלי המשקה לאתרי המיחזור והייצור של החברה. עם CYCLE קיום חובות חוק הפיקדון עבור יצרני המשקאות ועבור הקמעונאים הופך קל יותר.
מחפשים ראש שקט, חיסכון והתייעלות? –הצטרפו גם אתם, כי עם CYCLE: הופכים בקבוק ישן לחדש

We simplify the textile recycling industry by providing an innovative, user-friendly directory where textile recyclers can effortlessly find verified buyers and sellers, manage offers, communicate instantly, and build reliable partnerships without relying on brokers or middlemen.

Our powerful features include:

 Instant Access: Connect directly with hundreds of qualified textile recyclers worldwide.
 Easy Offers: Send, manage, and respond to load offers with a single click—no more tedious individual emails.
 Transparent Ratings: Upvote or downvote recyclers based on real experiences, creating accountability and trust within the industry.
 Verified Listings: Enhance credibility and attract better business with a verified badge.
 Direct Messaging: Simplify your communications with our built-in messaging platform, creating an exclusive inbox for textile recycling interactions.
 Freight Solutions: Connect directly with freight providers offering special pricing tailored specifically for textile recycling shipments.

Our mission is clear: Empower textile recyclers by putting control back into their hands, improving profitability, efficiency, and transparency across the global textile recycling market.

Welcome to the future of textile recycling—built by recyclers, for recyclers.

Name: deuzio
Description:
Deuzio, c’est un accompagnement personnalisé pour les GSA/GSS dans la création d’une offre de 2nde main. 

En 3 ans, nous avons contrôlé plus de 100 000 jeux. On travaille main dans main avec les magasins pour créer des corners de 2nde main de produits ludiques : jeux de société, jeux vidéo et les jouets.
On met cette expertise de la 2nde main au service des magasins, afin de les aider à faire leurs premiers pas dans la seconde main. 
GSA, GSS, boutique indépendante, bar à jeux, marketplaces : on travaille avec tout type de magasin pour faire rayonner la 2nde main

Comment ça marche ?

1 Des jeux sont collectés directement en magasin auprès des clients d’enseignes partenaires. L'estimation de la reprise se fait via API ou via une page développée en propre.

2 On les trie, on les vérifie, on les référence avec un code barre puis on les scelle, prêts à être renvoyés vers des magasins revendeurs. 

On peut ainsi prétendre à concurrencer les standards de qualité 1ère main.

3 On vous accompagne dans le développement de votre corner 2nde main (politique tarifaire, réassort, etc).

Notre objectif : réduire les déchets, préserver les ressources et structurer une filière locale de réemploi fondée sur les principes de l’économie circulaire et de l’éco-conception.

Parallèlement, nous construisons un projet inclusif et solidaire :
En créant des activités économiques utiles au territoire, nous permettons à des personnes privées d’emploi de retrouver confiance, monter en compétences et avancer vers un retour à l’emploi durable.

Ce que nous défendons :
– Des emplois de qualité, porteurs de sens et utiles au territoire
– Une réduction de l’impact environnemental de la construction
– Une organisation participative et accessible
– Un engagement pour la justice sociale et la réduction des inégalités

Knof is the second registered social enterprise in Slovenia, we employ 30 people in Knof business community.

Name: B2D LLC
Description:
B2D - Back To Diam - is a recycling program that strives to reduce environmental impact for Point Of Sale Merchandising.

Working closely with our Luxury Brand customers, we offer an A-to-Z turn-key solution articulated around four pillars: collecting, sorting, disassembling, and recycling.
Today’s retail products are composed of multiple materials, making it challenging to sort, disassemble and recycle. What makes B2D unique is the possibility for its partnering brands to send back their POS merchandising. B2D will then handle sorting, disassembling and offer two types of recycling:

•   Open Loop Recycling (for standard materials like paper, cardboard, etc.): After sorting and disassembling, B2D partners with local recyclers to handle recycling 
•   Closed Loop Recycling (for acrylic, polystyrene, and all other plastics): B2D handles the entire process internally and, with the plastic collected, recreates new parts that will be used for next-generation displays.

By organizing the recycling market for retail, B2D contributes to the circular economy and reduces our environmental impact with a zero-waste policy. Finally, B2D can provide a complete report to our partners; detailing the positive impact on the environment working with B2D.

Name: Blauwe Bagger
Description: Blauwe Bagger is een onderneming die gelooft in een duurzamere en meer circulaire toekomst voor de Nederlandse bagger en bouwindustrie. Het opwaarderen van baggerspecie kan hierin een grote rol spelen. Van baggerspecie naar grondstof: wij maken circulaire ambities werkelijkheid. Waar anderen afval zien, zien wij grondstof. Onze mobiele verwerkingsunit zuivert, scheidt en verwerkt baggerspecie direct op locatie, zonder dat er eerst vele kilometers gereden hoeft te worden. Zo winnen we een secundaire bouwstof uit een 'afvalstroom'.

Name: Smedegaarden A/S
Description:
Smedegaarden A/S blev i 2014 købt af de 3 brødre, Eddie, Klaus og Morten Smedegaard. Firmaet blev opstartet af Henning Smedegaard som ejede og drev firmaet med 3 af sine sønner frem til salget i 2014. Forretningen har siden gennemgået en teknologisk transition, hvor alt er blevet omstruktureret, digitaliseret og moderniseret.

Som virksomhed i det maritime genvindings miljø er vi stolte af at være på den europæiske liste over godkendte virksomheder for skibsophugning i Europa.
Firmaet besidder en Local og national godkendelse med miljøtilladelse til udførelse af sådanne projekter, og har arbejdet med dette siden 1962.
Skibe og andet flydende materiel som skal skrottes, opkøbes til genvinding på vort anlæg i Esbjerg.

Skibene og konstruktioner dekontamineres, demonteres og efterfølgende ophugges på vort miljøgodkendte anlæg i Esbjerg havn. Vores placering ved grænsen til Nationalpark Vadehavet forpligter, hvorfor vi altid er helt i front mht. miljømæssige love og regler i hht. de gældende Nationale og internale regler.

At ophugge et skib kræver en stor ekspertise, håndværkersnilde samt arbejdssikkerhed og miljøbevidsthed udøves på højeste plan, og ville ikke være muligt uden et dygtigt team og en ledelse med mange års praktisk erfaring indenfor feltet.

Smedegaarden A/S er ISO 9001, 14001 samt 45001 Certificeret foruden førnævnte miljø godkendleser samt det at være grøn listet i EU.

Name: Ecoplaex Recycling
Description:
Creemos que es nuestra responsabilidad contribuir a la conservación del medio ambiente. Por eso, al utilizar materiales reciclados para la producción de nuevos objetos y al disminuir los residuos del planeta, contribuimos a los Objetivos de Desarrollo Sostenible de las Naciones Unidas.

Nuestra misión es crear productos innovadores, prácticos y útiles que contribuyan a la conservación del medio ambiente
Location: Villanueva de la Serena, Badajoz, Badajoz

Name: EcarPOWER
Description:
De EcarPOWER is geschikt voor het leveren van stroom aan foodtrucks, geluidsinstallaties, verlichtingsinstallaties of complete evenementen. De toepassingen zijn vrijwel eindeloos. Het mooiste aan de EcarPOWER is dat hij door een gewone auto of bestelwagen getrokken kan worden, als de bestuurder in het bezit is van een BE-rijbewijs. Dit betekent dat de EcarPOWER vrij eenvoudig van/naar een bepaalde locatie kan worden verplaatst.

Zoals eerder vermeld maakt de EcarPOWER gebruik van de tweede levensbatterijen van EcarACCU. De modules in combinatie met een Victron-omvormer creëren de vitale functies die de EcarPOWER laten draaien. Naast de modules en omvormer is de EcarPOWER voorzien van veel veiligheidsmaatregelen, zoals het automatische brandblussysteem. In verschillende delen van de EcarPOWER bevinden zich veel veiligheidsvoorzieningen die het systeem automatisch uitschakelen en een melding sturen naar ons online monitoringsysteem.

Name: EDELSTAHL VIRAT IBERICA in Portugal
Description:
EDELSTAHL VIRAT IBERICA is an emerging importer – Exporter, Supplier of Tool steel, Die Mould Steels from Various countries. 

Moving ahead globally with explore Business Opportunities in various countries like USA, Canada, Europe, Australia, UAE, Singapore, Japan, South Korea, India , Philippines etc. Our business scope in B2B & B2C in different stages from Virgin material, Scrap to Recycling products etc. distinguish us from other companies in this sector.

We have been dealing with large number of Drop Forging, Aluminum Extrusion, Automotive, Mining, PDC, Power Generation, Petrochemical, Aviation, Railways, Agricultural, Oil and Gas, Drilling, Hand Tools, Bulk Material Handling Industries Etc.

Name: DBC
Description:
DBC Electronics : La technologie haut de gamme, accessible à tous.

Créée en 2020, DBC Electronics transforme la manière de consommer la technologie. Spécialisée dans les produits électroniques reconditionnés, notamment les iPhones et MacBook, notre entreprise propose une alternative économique et écologique au neuf. Avec 10 magasins physiques en France et une marketplace en ligne, nous offrons des produits garantis, testés et certifiés, à des prix jusqu’à 70 % moins chers.

Notre mission ? Rendre la technologie accessible, tout en luttant contre le gaspillage électronique. Nous croyons fermement que consommer mieux ne doit pas coûter plus cher. Grâce à des stratégies innovantes et un service client exemplaire, nous réalisons plus de 30 000 ventes par an.

Chez DBC, nous ne faisons pas que vendre des produits : nous participons à construire un avenir où technologie rime avec responsabilité. Le futur, entre vos mains.

Name: Cirkulärfabriken
Description:
Cirkulärfabriken – Din partner för hållbara inredningslösningar i kontorsmiljöer!

Vi är cirkulära problemlösare som erbjuder cirkulära och hållbara helhetslösningar för kontor och offentlig miljö, med fokus på att förlänga livscykeln för möbler och inredning. Vi skapar hållbara inredningskoncept och erbjuder strategisk vägledning för cirkulära möbelflöden, så att ni kan ta smarta och hållbara beslut för er arbetsmiljö.

Våra tjänster inkluderar:
- Transport och kontorsflytt
- Hållbara och resurseffektiva inredningstjänster
- Reparation och renovering
- Upcycling och återbruk
- Inventering och värdering av inredning
- Förmedling och försäljning
- Avyttring

Vi hjälper er att skapa en hållbar arbetsmiljö med mindre klimatpåverkan. 

Kontakta oss för mer information!
 hello@cirkularfabriken.se

Name: Manchester Bike Kitchen
Description:
The Manchester Bike Kitchen is a not for profit organisation established by three experienced community development officers with decades of credible experience developing successful community initiatives. MBK is formed as a not for profit Community Interest Company (CiC)  
and it’s mission is to support people in becoming self-sufficient and proficient in bike maintenance and offer volunteering opportunities alongside training, advice and standard bike shop activities such as repairs and services with social value and community at its heart.

The organisation operates a pop up shop in Stanley Square Sale in Trafford, Clarendon Square Mall in Hyde and Wythenshawe Civic alongside regular pop up community events and the service contract for repairs and course delivery for Seashell Trust, Cycling UK, TfGM (Bee Network) and Greater Manchester Police. All staff are Industry recognised qualified bike mechanics and both Ride and Mountain Bike Leaders via Cycling UK. 

Manchester Bike Kitchen is a Park Tool School and affiliated training provider for Cycling UK. 

Manchester Bike Kitchen can found on social media (Instagram, Twitter and Tik Tok) as @mcrbikekitchen or @manchesterbikekitchen on Facebook.

We are an accredited Living Wage employer.

Name: AtriaMove Movilidad Eléctrica
Description:
AtriaMove le da una segunda vida a cualquier vehículo eléctrico logrando reducir miles de toneladas de CO2. Nuestro objetivo principal es poder reutilizar, reusar y reciclar cualquier vehículo eléctrico fomentando la economía circular.

YOU CAN HELP THE PLANET TOO

Name: Puvanameta Sdn Bhd (Zero to Landfill Solutions )
Description:
Puvanameta is a dynamic recycling company that is dedicated to empowering the planet, one recycling effort at a time. With over 12 years of experience in the industry, we have developed a reputation for providing innovative, eco-friendly solutions to clients all over Malaysia.

Our vision is to create a cleaner, greener world by reducing waste and promoting sustainability. We believe that by working together, we can make a positive impact on the planet and help to create a brighter future for generations to come.

Our mission is to provide high-quality recycling services to our clients, while also educating the public on the importance of recycling and sustainability. We strive to be a leader in the industry by offering a wide range of innovative solutions and services that are designed to meet the needs of our clients.

At Puvanameta, we understand the importance of making recycling easy and accessible for everyone. That's why we offer free transportation and labor services, as well as free in-house or Zoom training on creating awareness about the importance of recycling and sustainability.

Whether you are a small business or a large corporation, we are here to help you reduce your waste and make a positive impact on the environment. Our team of experts is always on hand to provide you with the support and guidance you need to succeed.

If you are interested in learning more about Puvanameta and how we can help you, please don't hesitate to reach out to us at npuvana@puvanameta.com.my. You can also visit our website to learn more about our services and solutions.

Thank you for considering Puvanameta as your recycling partner. We look forward to working with you to create a cleaner, greener world.

Our Address:
1, Jalan Utama 2/19, Taman Perindustrian Puchong Utama, 47100 Puchong, Selangor.

Empowering the planet, one recycling effort at a time.

Name: Recycling Albania
Description:
Recycling Albania (RecycAl LLC) was founded by Lulzim Baumann and Vilma Zela in 2022. RecycAl is a product of the NGO ENFORCE, founded in 2020, whose base we created within the framework of a program of the DIASPORA 2030, funded by the German Government.
We work as a social enterprise where 25% of the profit goes to social and environmental projects and our goal is environmental justice. 

Our vision is Zero Waste and we advocate for solutions that are environmentally sound, socially just, economically feasible and politically enforceable. We focus on helping residents, communities and businesses implement environmental, social and governance (ESG) criteria.

We recognize our responsibility to contribute to the achievement of the UN Sustainable Development Goals (SDGs) and stand for locally appropriate, cutting-edge, evidence-based win-win projects that have a significant impact in Albania, the Balkans and beyond.  

Our "zero waste" concept is close to our hearts and we are committed to establishing the zero waste hierarchy in practice. 
Our goal is to reduce first and then reuse everything where possible.
We believe that reuse is a very valuable thing that has a great positive impact on the environment and also brings economic benefits.

Our mission is to help private and legal persons in the management of their waste through a first-class team, services and solutions, protecting the environment and human health, in compliance with the relevant legislation. 

It is very important for us to teach children the importance of recycling and environmental protection. In our waste education center, we will provide children with the opportunity to receive the necessary environmental education and involve them in solving environmental problems in the region. Children are the future and we need them as much as they need us to create a healthy environment.

Name: SUAY
Description:
Imagine a world where manual laborers can thrive. 

At SUAY, we are dedicated to building such a world by becoming a globally recognized and trusted brand focused on a new economy that stands in solidarity with both the planet and its people. As a closed-loop recycling hub based in Los Angeles, SUAY is at the forefront of transforming the fashion industry by converting textile waste into valuable opportunities. By innovating in recycling, reuse, and repair, we are not only extending the life of garments but also making a meaningful economic impact in the lives of those involved in textile waste management.

Since our inception in 2017, SUAY has:
Diverted more than 3.7 million pounds of textiles from landfills, repurposing them into apparel and home goods.
Extended the lifespan of over 2 million pounds of textiles through our dyeing and repair services.
Created over 42 sustainable, green jobs that recognize and honor the essential skills and creativity required to tackle the textile waste crisis.
Invested over $3.8 million in human-powered reuse and recycling efforts, paving the way for effective, impactful solutions.

In July 2024, we launched an ambitious campaign to raise $2 million to build the recycling hub of the future in downtown Los Angeles. Our goal is to divert 80 million pounds of textiles from landfills by 2029 through SUAY's comprehensive circular solution. With the support of our community, we aim to fuel this community-centered, grassroots initiative that challenges industry norms often riddled with exploitation and abuse. 

Join us in reimagining what sustainability can look like.

Name: Orobo
Description: Orobo is a clearing house for sustainability data, acting as a neutral verification body between sustainability regulations and the world. Our Digital Product Passport (DPP) simplifies compliance and enhances our clients’ green premium by providing a single source of verifiable sustainability data.

Name: Mobile Recycle
Description:
Vous avez besoin d’acheter, de louer ou de revendre des smartphones en flotte ? 
Mobile Recycle est fait pour vous ! 

Mobile Recycle, entreprise de reconditionnement de téléphone situé à Toulouse, tient aux valeurs de l’écologie et du local. 
C’est pour cela que pour le reconditionnement des smartphones nous utilisons des pièces génériques 100% made in France et un tri sélectif est effectué à chaque réception de colis. 

Notre local situé à Montaudran permet de venir nous voir en direct, demander des conseils, émettre une demande et récupérer les produits auprès de notre équipe. 

Mais ce n’est pas tout car nous avons également deux filiales : « La Mobile » et « Loue ton mobile ». 

La Mobile est notre site internet consacré à l’achat et la revente de mobile en flotte à distance avec une livraison de 24h à 48h et une garantie de 1 an. 

Loue ton mobile est notre site internet consacré uniquement à la location de flotte de smartphone avec une garantie casse et vol durant toute la durée.

N’hésitez pas à nous appeler ou à aller sur nos sites internet pour prendre des renseignements.

Name: Clothstory
Description: Bienvenido a Clothstory, donde cada prenda cuenta una historia única. Nuestro lema "Love me again" refleja el compromiso de dar una segunda oportunidad a la moda, permitiendo que cada pieza encuentre un nuevo hogar y cuente con una narrativa renovada. Al elegir nuestras prendas y accesorios, no solo adoptas moda sostenible, sino que también das vida a una historia por contar. Nos enorgullece ofrecer una colección escogida con esmero de prendas de segunda mano, inspirando a nuestros clientes a escribir su propio capítulo de estilo y sostenibilidad. Únete a nosotros en este viaje para dar nueva vida a la moda, porque en Clothstory, cada prenda merece ser amada de nuevo. Juntos, estamos construyendo un capítulo de moda consciente y significativa.

Name: ZEAL TEAM Co. Ltd.
Description:
私たちは、日本の商用車を世界へと橋渡しするリユースのリーディングカンパニーとして、 2003年10月より国内の業界をリードしてきました。その「リユース」が今、注目されています。 SDGsにも定められた「つくる責任つかう責任」。 「今あるものを再利用し、長く使う」というモデルが、  今ではスタンダードです。  それは、「循環型社会」の形成にもつながっていきます。  その実現を目的とし、私たちは、リユースに関わるあらゆる分野をそれぞれ事業会社化し、  それらのシナジーを生み出す企業としてZEAL. TEAMを設立。 

各事業がプロフェッショナルとしての役割を全うすることはもちろん、  チームワークを発揮してシナジーを創出することで、  今までになかったようなサービスを次々と生み出し、  「世界から必要とされる企業」を目指します。

ZEAL. TEAMの更なる発展と活躍に、どうぞご期待ください。

Founded in 2003, ZEAL TEAM is the leading global company of the Reuse Industry. Building a full range of services related to commercial vehicles through diversified businesses, we are the holding company of 6 subsidiaries. As of October 2023, our organization boasts a network of 16 branches spanning the nation, all operating under the headquarters in Tokyo, and powered by a workforce of more than 470+ dedicated professionals. 

24卒・25卒ともに新卒採用を継続中！
ZEAL. TEAMでは、 「やる気に満ちた」「グロースマインドセットを持った」「何事にも熱意をもって行動できる」人材を求めています。
私たちと一緒に、前進と成長に満ちたキャリアを歩んでいきませんか？
 
就職活動を通して自分自身と向き合う中で、どの道に進むべきか悩む事もあると思います。
しかし、どんな道に進もうと大事なことは「正しい道を選択」することより、「選択した道を成功させる」こと！
どんな道であれ、転んだり壁にもぶつかったりもしますが、壁を破るのはチームの力であり「正しさ」ではなく「情熱」、すなわち”ZEAL”です。 
説明会を通して実際の「ZEAL. TEAM」を知り、興味を持っていただけましたら嬉しい限りです！

recruit@e-zeal.jp まで、お問い合わせください。

皆さんとお会いできることを心より楽しみにしております。

[On going recruitment for 2024 & 2025 graduates]
We invite you to connect with us at recruit@e-zeal.jp
We look forward to welcoming you into our dynamic and forward-thinking organization. Join us in shaping the future!

Name: Charity Retail Ireland
Description:
Charity Retail Ireland is the all island representative body for registered charities who operate in the retail space as part of their fundraising activities. Charity Retail Ireland members benefit from sharing information and the support we receive from each other. Over 40 members range from large national charities to locally based charities and currently our members operate 500 shops nationwide. All our members are registered with the Charities Regulator or teh Cahrity Commision of Northern Ireland.

OUR MISSION:
Charity Retail Ireland supports the Charity Retail Sector in Ireland to:
* model best charity retail practice
* influence government policy
* promote positive social, economic and environmental change

OUR VISION:

Name: Pioneiro Ecometais
Description:
A Pioneiro Ecometais é responsável pela produção de ligas de chumbo para o mercado nacional, a partir da reciclagem de baterias inservíveis.

Com capacidade de produção para 4.000 toneladas de chumbo/mês, o projeto da Ecometais foi desenvolvido baseado nas melhores tecnologias do segmento, visando um melhor desempenho no processo de reciclagem. A produção é baseada nas necessidades de cada cliente, portanto, atualmente, a empresa produz 40 ligas de chumbo, com controle de 25 elementos químicos por liga.

Além disso, a empresa implantou o projeto da pirólise, que transforma pneus inservíveis em produtos como, carvão, óleo e limalha de ferro. Dessa forma, não é mais necessária a extração de recursos naturais para produção desses produtos, que são utilizados no processo de fundição das ligas de chumbo.

Name: La Ressourcerie Des Futurs
Description: La Ressourcerie Des Futurs gère la récupération, la valorisation et la revente d'objets, en menant une action de sensibilisation et d’éducation à l’environnement sur le territoire marseillais. En proposant un accompagnement social et professionnel aux personnes sans emploi rencontrant des difficultés multiples et variées.

Name: COPAINS DES JOUETS
Description:
Chaque année, 150 000 tonnes de jouets sont achetées.
Chaque année, 100 000 tonnes de jouets sont jetées. 
Chaque année, 2 jouets sur 3 sont jetés !! 

Quelles solutions pour ces jouets négligés, abandonnés, maltraités et finissent souvent en situation de handicap ?

COPAINS DES JOUETS est un écosystème qui collecte, valorise les jouets et leurs déchets (1kg collecté = 1kg valorisé), en vendant jouets d'occasion, de collection et objets déco, œuvres d'art.... Nous travaillons avec des autistes, des artistes et des altruistes.

L'association de loi 1901 "Copains Des Jouets COLLECTE" assure, comme son nom l'indique, la collecte des jouets. Et pour la première fois en France, de TOUS LES JOUETS, quels que soient la matière et l'état. 
Un jouet cassé, un éclat de jouet, une particule de jouet, nous collectons tout sans discrimination !!

Les gisements collectés, seront ensuite livrés à la SAS "Copains Des Jouets VALORISATION". Celle-ci se charge de la valorisation et de la revente de ces produits réemployés et recyclés en e-commerce. (Le site est en cours de construction)

Cette société de l'Économie Sociale et Solidaire, se place aussi dans le champ de l'inclusion, avec une équipe principalement constituée d'adultes dans le spectre autistique. (90 à 95% des autistes sont sans emploi...)
Elle a vocation aussi à soutenir la créativité, l'art et les talents de tous bords.

VOUS AUSSI, DEVENEZ UN HÉROS ! SAUVEZ LES JOUETS ABANDONNÉS !
ACTIVEZ VOTRE SUPER POUVOIR EN REJOIGNANT NOTRE BANDE DE COPAINS !
.

Name: Green Recovery Organizacja Odzysku

Klientami GREEN RECOVERY Organizacji Odzysku są wprowadzający baterie i akumulatory, sprzęt elektryczny i elektroniczny, opakowania i produkty w opakowaniach oraz opony, oleje i preparaty smarowe. Powierzając nam swoje

Name: Nationwide Foam Recycling

40% of all landfill waste comes from construction projects. We're here to alter this negative impact.

Nationwide Foam recycles all types of foam insulation board and roofing membrane at re-roofing job sites across North America. We've recycled over 575 million pounds so far!

Name: Kliksel
Description:
Welcome to Kliksel.lv, a platform revolutionizing the resale market by helping physical and e-commerce stores sell refurbished, used, returned goods. Our mission is to promote a sustainable environment and reduce CO2 emissions by ensuring that every product finds a new home rather than being left in warehouses or ending up as waste. We believe in the value of every item and strive to connect sellers and buyers in a trusted environment for second-hand trading.

At Kliksel.lv, we offer a seamless and efficient solution for getting your products ready for sale. We handle the entire digitization process, from photographing your items to assigning product IDs and creating detailed descriptions. Our platform provides access to a broad customer base eager to find great deals on slightly damaged or defective goods. Additionally, we support your business with flexible shipping options, ensuring that your products reach customers quickly and efficiently. To allow you to focus on growing your business, we also take care of customer service and marketing.

Partnering with Kliksel.lv means more than just increasing your profits; it means contributing to responsible consumption and resource conservation. We are committed to helping you manage and sell products that might otherwise go unused, giving them a second chance and making a positive impact on the environment. Join us in shaping a future where every product finds a new purpose.

Name: Envirocycle London Ltd
Description: Envirocycle London reclaim & reuse quality office interiors, fixtures & fittings throughout London & the South East whilst building greener portfolios for the UK stripout & demolition sector

Name: Green ALU
Description: "Green ALU - Revolutionizing aluminum recycling since 2024. Our company specializes in restructuring and transforming aluminum waste using advanced 4G technology. We collect and recycle various aluminum waste, including soft drink containers, through a sustainable process. Description: Established in 1994, Svensk Däckåtervinning AB is a not-for-profit recycling company. Working with dynamic partners we have established a unique and world-leading recycling organisation, to ensure that tyres are disposed of in a sustainable way. WESTPLAST est né de la volonté de 6 entreprises de s'associer dans ce projet commun. 
ces entreprises ont toutes un développement dans le recyclage des plastiques rigides post consommations des ménages et des entreprises.
WESTPLAST est une unité de préparation des ces plastiques pour leur intégration dans la plasturgie. C'est aussi une unité dédié à la recherche et au développement.
WESTPLAST a pour objectif  d'alimenter la plasturgie  locale , en fournissant une matière à recycler pouvant intégrer leurs productions.
Le système permet de calibrer , de sur trier , de laver , de broyer et de sécher les catégories de plastiques. 
Le produit se présente sous forme de paillettes ( 12 mm), conditionné en big bag d'une tonne.
Les qualités traitées sont du Polypropylène postconsommation ( injection), du polyéthylène postconsommation ( injection et extrusion), des mélanges de PEPP différenciés suivant les sources et les provenances. 
le process utilisé est la flottation de densité 1.

Name: BrickVillage
Description:
Hey daar! Welkom op BrickVillage.nl. Wij zijn jouw go-to plek als je LEGO wilt kopen of verkopen zonder gedoe.

Ons avontuur begon in oktober 2022 toen Wolf van Dijk, een echte LEGO fan en slimme knutselaar, dacht: "Waarom is er geen simpele plek waar je LEGO kunt ruilen zonder je zorgen te maken of alles wel goed komt?" Dus ging hij aan de slag om BrickVillage.nl te bouwen.

Wolf's idee was simpel maar briljant: een platform maken waar iedereen makkelijk en veilig LEGO kan kopen en verkopen. Een plek waar je niet hoeft te stressen over of je spullen wel aankomen of dat alles klopt met wat je koopt of verkoopt.

In augustus 2023 kreeg Wolf hulp van Bas en Han van FormatC, twee tech wizards die meteen snapten hoe tof dit project was. Samen spannen zij zich in om het platform nog beter te maken, hier is het ook hulp voor nodig van de gebruikers. De missie is nu om BrickVillage super gebruiksvriendelijk te maken, maar ook voor te laten lopen met de nieuwste snufjes.

“We willen de beste zijn in wat we doen, vooral als het gaat om technologie en het makkelijk maken voor jou”

Bij BrickVillage.nl zijn we constant bezig met verbeteren en vernieuwen, zodat het platform perfect werkt voor iedereen die van LEGO houdt. Dus, of je nou op zoek bent naar dat ene LEGO setje dat je altijd al wilde hebben, of je hebt LEGO dat je wilt verkopen, je zit goed bij ons. We zijn een community waar de liefde voor LEGO en de zekerheid van een goede deal hand in hand gaan.

Kom erbij en ontdek hoe makkelijk en leuk LEGO handelen kan zijn op BrickVillage.nl. Laten we samen iets geweldigs bouwen!

Name: Plasback NZ
Description:
Plasback operates a Product Stewardship scheme to recover used farm plastics for recycling. Plasback came to New Zealand in 2006, and has gone from strength to strength. Operating their original bin and liner system, which when combined with on farm collection, has contributed to Plasback not only running a simple and effective system but has meant over 30,000 tonnes of waste collected since the scheme’s inception. 

As part of our continued commitment to Product Stewardship we now operate nine purpose built balers designed to improve the onward transport logistics from our main centres to the recycling plants, and have introduced new products made from recycled plastics, Tuffboard, Tuffdeck, and Plaswood. We have a reliable network of Contractors who run the collections, and cover the whole of New Zealand.

Plasback was the first product stewardship scheme for agriculture to receive accreditation from the Ministry for the Environment in 2010.

Idéen om Dewdrop Tiles født, da vi indså det enorme miljømæssige potentiale i de tilsyneladende oversete fliserester. Drevet af passionen for naturen og en vision om æstetisk design begyndte hun at omdanne disse overskydende materialer til unikke og kvalitetsfulde fliseløsninger.

Vores designs kan strække sig fra små dekorationer til overflader på op til 100 m². Mange små løsninger kan til sammen opnå en stor miljømæssig effekt, og det er netop det, vi stræber efter: At hjælpe med at skaffe en bæredygtig fremtid.

Name: Re:SPIN
Description:
It started with a simple question:What happens to a tennis ball after its last serve?   

At Re:SPIN, we’re turning an overlooked waste stream into something valuable — a premium yarn designed for the demands of modern athletic wear.

Our waste-to-yarn process is reimagining sports waste as a raw input for high-performance textiles. By targeting high-friction, hard-to-recycle materials like used tennis balls, we aim to close the loop on one of the most ignored corners of the apparel ecosystem.

We're in the early days. Deep in R&D, collaborating with labs, and running feasibility tests, but our ambition is clear: 

To build circularity into performance from the ground up.

If you're an innovator in sustainable materials, an R&D partner, or someone who thinks a waste-free future starts with better design — we’d love to connect.

Name: SwapRight co
Description:
Swap Right was born out of necessity. After 20 years in the home rehab and general contracting space, I was constantly running from store to store searching for materials, struggling with project delays due to supply issues, and often underbidding jobs because of unpredictable material costs. I knew I couldn't be the only one facing these challenges—and there had to be a better way

Our Mission

At Swap Right, our mission goes beyond simplifying the construction and remodeling process—we’re also committed to protecting the planet. Each year, over 160 billion tons of building-related materials end up in U.S. landfills, making up more than 40% of all landfill waste. If we can help reduce even a fraction of that, we consider it a win. By providing a marketplace where people can buy and sell used construction and home renovation materials, we're not only keeping valuable items out of landfills but also putting money back into your pocket.

Our Audience

Our customers are everyone—from savvy DIYers tackling weekend projects to seasoned general contractors with a full roster of clients, and everyone in between. Swap Right is designed for you. We aim to be your go-to destination for sourcing materials for any current or upcoming project—all in one place.

Name: Wool Minerals
Description:
Sheep wool fertilizer: an economical and environmentally friendly choice for farms Modern agriculture faces challenges: how to reduce fertilizer costs, increase yields and at the same time minimize the impact on the environment. One of the innovative solutions is fertilizer made from sheep wool. This natural product offers a unique combination of environmental sustainability and economic benefits, which makes it attractive to farm managers.
What is sheep wool fertilizer?
Sheep wool fertilizer is made from scraps or substandard wool that is not suitable for textile production. The wool is processed into granules or used in loose form. The production process preserves its natural properties, which ensures a gradual release of nutrients.

Mattress foam, which is ground up, mixed with natural binders, and formed into foam padding for use under carpets, inside exercise equipment, within car seats, and other cushioning applications.
Metal and steel wire for sales to manufacturers of benches, metal poles, and light posts.
Wood to be chipped up and used as mulch for landscaping, natural biomass fuel, and wood pellets for building.
