We continue to grow and look for new innovative solutions to make a stronger contribution to an even cleaner environment by recycling used textile. 

At the moment, in addition to our great work, we are busy realizing our new business premises in Breda. The completion of our beautiful new building is expected in 2024.

Name: Ristopanno
Description:
Ristopanno si distingue per l’impegno a donare una seconda vita ai tessuti di cotone, che vengono recuperati e trasformati in panni per la pulizia dalle caratteristiche uniche. Il processo produttivo si basa su diverse fasi specifiche, che permettono di realizzare prodotti resistenti, pratici e adatti all'uso professionale nell'ambito della ristorazione:

1. Seconda vita al cotone: Recupero degli avanzi di materiale tessile non suscettibili al reimpiego diretto, che vengono sottoposti a un trattamento rigenerativo: taglio, selezione e igienizzazione (conforme al DM del 5.2.1998). Questo processo trasforma materiali di qualità, altrimenti destinati allo scarto, in nuovi panni resistenti e sicuri.
2. Caratteristiche uniche e capacità assorbente: Attraverso questo trattamento, i panni di Ristopanno risultano notevolmente rafforzati nella capacità assorbente e una notevole efficacia nella rimozione dello sporco, consentendo di eliminare l'uso di carta e ridurre quindi notevolmente anche l'impatto ambientale.
3. Prodotto Made in Italy: Il nostro intero ciclo produttivo è italiano e rispetta elevati standard di qualità e conformità. Ogni panno è concepito per rispondere alle esigenze professionali, combinando praticità ed estetica in un prodotto funzionale e affidabile.
4. Disponibilità e assistenza celeri: Grazie a un’efficiente rete logistica e a un team di assistenza reattivo, viene garantita una reperibilità tempestiva del prodotto e supporto continuo per ogni necessità, dal semplice riordino all’assistenza post-vendita. Il team di Ristopanno è sempre a disposizione per rispondere con tempestività alle richieste dei clienti.

Scegli Ristopanno e sii parte del cambiamento!

Name: NEXTGEN.SHOES
Description:
Given the fast-paced modern lifestyle we lead today, we deem shoes as an impactful component of our lives. Shoes enable us to be on the go. With great support and cushion, shoes provide comfort to the feet of people that go through the hustle-and-bustle of Metro Manila everyday. 

Owning good shoes could also spell the next chapter of a person who wants to take control of their fitness. It's so much more motivating to go for a run when your athletic shoes perform the way they are supposed to. 

However, we couldn't help but notice that athletic shoes are becoming more and more expensive, inaccessible to some. With the rising cost of living, the normal person struggles to afford good sneakers the delivers comfort and durability. 

NEXTGEN.SHOES was started to offer the next generation of Filipinos affordable yet high-performance sneakers from trusted brands. By leveraging emerging technologies like robotics and AI, we believe we can make pre-loved athletic shoes mainstream. 

Good for the planet, and good for your pocket. Revolutionizing a traditional industry will be tough. But we will find comfort in knowing that we're empowering normal people to become healthier and more confident versions of themselves. 

We’re here to make pre-loved athletic shoes fun to buy and cool to wear.

Name: Cue Cycle
Description:
At Cue Cycle, we believe every item deserves a second chance, and that sustainability begins with simple, meaningful choices. Our mission is to reduce waste, inspire conscious consumption, and give back to the community through responsible upcycling and charitable donations. Each pre-loved item can become someone else’s treasure while supporting a greener, more sustainable planet.

We specialize in sourcing, restoring, and reselling quality second-hand goods, from everyday essentials to unique, one-of-a-kind finds. Each item is carefully inspected and transformed — through cleaning, repair, or creative upcycling — so it can be enjoyed for years to come. By giving items new life, we prevent usable goods from ending up in landfills and promote a circular economy, where resources are valued and reused.

Our purpose extends beyond resale. Items that cannot be reused or sold are donated to local charities, shelters, and community organizations that support individuals and families in need. Every contribution, big or small, creates meaningful impact and fosters a culture of generosity and social responsibility.

We envision a world where sustainability, creativity, and kindness intersect. Whether shopping for something special, donating pre-loved items, or exploring new ways to live consciously, we empower our community to make choices that benefit both people and the planet.
We are more than a business — we are a movement. By choosing Cue Cycle, you join an effort to reduce waste, support charitable causes, and promote a lifestyle that values resourcefulness, environmental stewardship, and human connection. Together, we can make second-hand the first choice for a better, brighter future.
#Upcycling #Sustainable #SecondHand #CircularEconomy #Reuse #Charity #EcoFriendly #ConsciousLiving #CommunityImpact

Name: Ecotransform
Description:
EcoTransform Innovations ist ein führendes Unternehmen im Bereich der Kreislaufwirtschaft, das sich auf die Umwandlung von Abfällen in hochwertige, nachhaltige Produkte spezialisiert hat. Mit modernster Upcycling-Technologie verwandeln wir Müll in wertvolle Güter wie Möbel, Modeaccessoires, Baustoffe und vieles mehr. Unser Ziel ist es, die Umweltbelastung zu reduzieren und gleichzeitig stilvolle und funktionale Produkte zu schaffen, die den Alltag unserer Kunden bereichern.

Unser Ansatz basiert auf Innovation, Nachhaltigkeit und sozialer Verantwortung. Wir setzen auf fortschrittliche Technologien, um Abfallmaterialien effizient zu verarbeiten und ihnen neues Leben einzuhauchen. Dabei legen wir großen Wert auf die Qualität und Ästhetik unserer Produkte, um sicherzustellen, dass sie nicht nur umweltfreundlich, sondern auch ansprechend und langlebig sind.

Bei EcoTransform Innovations glauben wir daran, dass Nachhaltigkeit und Wirtschaftlichkeit Hand in Hand gehen können. Wir arbeiten eng mit verschiedenen Partnern, darunter Unternehmen, öffentliche Einrichtungen und NGOs, zusammen, um nachhaltige Lösungen zu fördern und die Kreislaufwirtschaft voranzutreiben. Unsere Projekte umfassen Bildungsinitiativen, soziale Programme und Kooperationen mit Gemeinschaften, um das Bewusstsein für Umweltschutz zu stärken und positive Veränderungen zu bewirken.

Unsere Mitarbeiter sind das Herzstück unseres Unternehmens. Wir fördern eine inklusive und unterstützende Arbeitskultur, die Kreativität und Engagement wertschätzt. Durch kontinuierliche Weiterbildung und Entwicklungsmöglichkeiten stellen wir sicher, dass unsere Mitarbeiter ihre Fähigkeiten erweitern und gemeinsam mit dem Unternehmen wachsen können.

EcoTransform Innovations ist mehr als nur ein Unternehmen – wir sind eine Bewegung, die darauf abzielt, die Welt durch nachhaltige Praktiken zu verändern. Gemeinsam mit unseren Partnern und Kunden setzen wir uns dafür ein, eine umweltfreundlichere Zukunft zu gestalten.

Name: Petit Requin
Description:
Chez Petit Requin on récupère des jeans de seconde main qu'on remet au goût du jour.

Pour ça, on passe beaucoup de temps à les chiner, les trier, les nettoyer, les réparer, les repasser et les shooter.

On associe également chaque jean à une espèce de requins, que vous reconnaitrez à travers un petit écusson requin cousu à la main sur les jeans.

Un jean vendu = 5€ reversés à l'Association AILERONS

L’association AILERONS, œuvre depuis 2006 pour la protection et la conservation des espèces de requins et de raies de Méditerranée française au travers de différents projets et partenariats.

L'association AILERONS est notamment investie au travers de projets de sciences participatives pour permettre l’amélioration des connaissances et la conservation des espèces de requins et raies en Méditerranée (peau bleue, diable de mer, requin pèlerin, ange de mer, etc.).

Au travers de ces différents projets, AILERONS a tissé différents partenariats solides avec les acteurs locaux (associations, fédérations de pêche, institutions publiques) et constitue un acteur reconnu du tissu associatif méditerranéen.

Name: Kei's Shop House
Description:
Where thrift meets purpose, and motherhood sparks magic

Kei’s Shop House isn’t just a preloved fashion brand — it’s a story stitched together with bold decisions, late-night dreams, and a mom’s unshakable belief that you can build something beautiful between diaper changes and dinner preps.

Founded by a former hospitality professional who swapped hotel check-ins for checkout bags full of curated thrift, Kei’s Shop House started as a side hustle and became a heart-led mission: to bring style, sustainability, and empowerment into one playful, powerful space.

 What we offer:
Handpicked thrift & preloved fashion treasures — from vintage vibes to timeless classics — all wrapped in love, story, and second chances.

 What we stand for:
Moms who dream big. Women who pivot bravely. People who shop consciously. We’re here for every woman ready to create, express, and take that first (or next) leap.

 What we believe:
Motherhood doesn’t slow us down — it sets us on fire. Tech is our toolkit, storytelling is our spark, and fashion? That’s just our fun way of saying, “We’re here, and we’ve got style and substance.”

From living rooms to launchpads, Kei’s Shop House is proof that with a little creativity (and a lot of heart), you can turn a closet clean-out into a calling.

 Follow us for thrift gems, mompreneur real talk, and a whole lot of secondhand soul.

Name: E Tech Recycling Ltd.
Description:
E-Tech Recycling Limited is a Zambian-based leader in sustainable electronic and electrical waste (e-waste) management. We specialize in the secure collection, dismantling, and recycling of electronic devices, ensuring responsible disposal while recovering valuable resources such as metals, plastics, and circuit boards.

Our mission is to create a cleaner, greener future by transforming e-waste challenges into opportunities for circular economy growth. Beyond recycling, we place strong emphasis on data security, offering safe handling and destruction of storage devices to protect sensitive information.

Through partnerships with regulators, schools, and communities, we also run awareness programs on sustainable waste practices and promote innovation by exploring how e-waste can contribute to alternative energy solutions.

At E-Tech Recycling, we believe in a future where technology and sustainability go hand in hand — turning today’s waste into tomorrow’s value

More than just a project, REDO creates positive change by not only repurposing waste but also creating job opportunities and fostering community support. It embodies unity and collaboration, uplifting communities, transforming spaces, and nurturing a shared sense of pride.

REDO is an initiative by Associated Response CIC.
